Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**********************************************************************************

 The Bicategory of Double Categories

 In this file, we define the bicategory of univalent double categories, and we
 prove that this bicategory is univalent. To do so, we make heavy use of the
 machinery of displayed bicategories.

 The idea behind this construction is to split up the notion of double category into
 several layers. More specifically, a univalent double category is a
 univalent category with another collection of morphisms and a collection of squares.
 As such, the starting point of this construction is the univalent bicategory of
 univalent categories.

 First, we add the collection of morphisms and squares to the structure, which is
 done by a 2-sided displayed category. This construction is defined in the file
 `DispBicatOfTwoSidedDispCat.v` where it is also proven that this gives rise to a
 univalent bicategory.

 Next, there are two pieces of data to add: identity morphisms and horizontal
 composition. So, we define two displayed bicategories on top of the bicategory of
 categories with a 2-sided displayed category
 - The displayed objects of the first one are horizontal identities, the displayed
   morphisms are squares that witness the lax preservation of identities, and the
   displayed 2-cells are coherences (i.e., the coherence for horizontal identities
   for double transformations).
 - The displayed objects of the first one are functions that take horizontal
   compositions, the displayed morphisms are squares that witness the lax
   preservation of composition, and the displayed 2-cells are coherences (i.e., the
   coherence for horizontal composition for double transformations).
 We take the product of these two displayed bicategories, and we continue with the
 resulting total bicategory. While the 2-cells in this bicategory are double
 transformations, we need to add more structure in order to get double categories
 as objects and double functors as morphisms.

 As such, we define three displayed bicategories on top of that total bicategory.
 - The displayed objects of the first one are left unitors, and the displayed
   morphisms are coherences (i.e., the coherence equation for left unitors by
   double functors).
 - The displayed objects of the first one are right unitors, and the displayed
   morphisms are coherences (i.e., the coherence equation for right unitors by
   double functors).
 - The displayed objects of the first one are associator, and the displayed
   morphisms are coherences (i.e., the coherence equation for associator by
   double functors).
 Again we take the product of these three displayed bicategories, and we look
 at the resulting total bicategory. The 1-cells are double functors and the 2-cells
 are double transformations. However, the objects are not yet double categories:
 the triangle and pentagon coherence are missing.

 We finish the construction by taking a full subbicategory where the condition that
 we require is precisely the triangle and the pentagon equation. As a consequence,
 the objects of the resulting bicategory are actually double categories.

 In every step, we also prove the displayed univalence of the involved displayed
 bicategories. This allows us to prove in the end that the bicategory of double
 categories is a univalent bicategory.

 Contents
 1. Two-sided displayed categories with identities
 2. Two-sided displayed categories with horizontal composition
 3. Two-sided displayed categories with identities and horizontal composition
 4. Two-sided displayed categories with left unitors
 5. Two-sided displayed categories with right unitors
 6. Two-sided displayed categories with associators
 7. Two-sided displayed categories with unitors and associators
 8. Displayed bicategory of double categories

 **********************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.

 ∏ x y : bicat_twosided_disp_cat,
 obd x → obd y → bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  ?pr1

  
bicat_twosided_disp_cat → UU
 exact (λ CD, hor_id (pr12 CD)).
  
(λ obd : bicat_twosided_disp_cat → UU,
 ∏ x y : bicat_twosided_disp_cat,
 obd x → obd y → bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  (λ CD : bicat_twosided_disp_cat, hor_id (pr12 CD))
 exact (λ CD₁ CD₂ I₁ I₂ FFF, double_functor_hor_id (pr2 FFF) I₁ I₂).
Defined.

       b) (ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : x -->[ h] y),
ff ==>[ r] gg → gg ==>[ s] hh → ff ==>[ r • s] hh
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F, G, H: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
θ: G ==> H
I₁: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
  CD₁
I₂: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
  CD₂
IF: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
IG: I₁ -->[ G] I₂
IH: I₁ -->[ H] I₂
Iτ: IF ==>[ τ] IG
Iθ: IG ==>[ θ] IH
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  ((λ (x y : pr1 CD₁) (xy : pr2 CD₁ x y),
    pr2 τ x y xy ;;2 pr2 θ x y xy),,
   comp_twosided_disp_nat_trans_laws (pr2 τ) (pr2 θ))
  IF IH

    exact (comp_twosided_disp_nat_trans_hor_id Iτ Iθ).
  
∏ (a b c : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g1 g2 : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : g1 ==> g2)
(x : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
       a)
(y : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
       b)
(z : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
       c) (ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg1 : y -->[ g1] z)
(gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
gg1 ==>[ r] gg2 → ff ;; gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] ff ;; gg2
 
CD₁, CD₂, CD₃: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
G₁, G₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₂, CD₃ ⟧
θ: G₁ ==> G₂
I₁: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
  CD₁
I₂: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
  CD₂
I₃: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
  CD₃
IF: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
IG₁: I₂ -->[ G₁] I₃
IG₂: I₂ -->[ G₂] I₃
Iθ: IG₁ ==>[ θ] IG₂
IF ;; IG₁ ==>[ F ◃ θ] IF ;; IG₂

    exact (pre_whisker_twosided_disp_nat_trans_hor_id IF Iθ).
  
∏ (a b c : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f1 f2 : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ b, c ⟧) (r : f1 ==> f2)
(x : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
       a)
(y : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
       b)
(z : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
       c) (ff1 : x -->[ f1] y) (ff2 : x -->[ f2] y)
(gg : y -->[ g] z),
ff1 ==>[ r] ff2 → ff1 ;; gg ==>[ r ▹ g] ff2 ;; gg
 
CD₁, CD₂, CD₃: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F, G₁: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₂, CD₃ ⟧
τ: F ==> G₁
I₁: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
  CD₁
I₂: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
  CD₂
I₃: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
  CD₃
IF₁: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
IF₂: I₁ -->[ G₁] I₂
IG: I₂ -->[ G₂] I₃
Iτ: IF₁ ==>[ τ] IF₂
IF₁ ;; IG ==>[ τ ▹ G₂] IF₂ ;; IG

    exact (post_whisker_twosided_disp_nat_trans_hor_id IG Iτ).
Qed.

CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat

I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂

  apply isaprop_double_nat_trans_hor_id.

CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧

I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂

CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
τ: FI ==>[ id₂ F] GI
GI ==>[ (id2_invertible_2cell F) ^-1] FI
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
τ: FI ==>[ id₂ F] GI
τ •• ?pr1 =
transportb (λ α : F ==> F, FI ==>[ α] FI)
  (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell F)) (disp_id2 FI)
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
τ: FI ==>[ id₂ F] GI
(λ _ : τ •• ?pr1 =
       transportb (λ α : F ==> F, FI ==>[ α] FI)
         (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell F))
         (disp_id2 FI),
 ?pr1 •• τ =
 transportb (λ α : F ==> F, GI ==>[ α] GI)
   (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell F)) (disp_id2 GI))
  ?pr10

  
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
τ: FI ==>[ id₂ F] GI
GI ==>[ (id2_invertible_2cell F) ^-1] FI
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
τ: FI ==>[ id₂ F] GI
x: pr1 CD₁
functor_double_id_cell GI x ;;2 id_two_disp
                                  (pr2 F x x
                                     (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                             FI x)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
τ: FI ==>[ id₂ F] GI
x: pr1 CD₁
p:= τ x: functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 id_two_disp
                                  (pr2 F x x
                                     (double_id I₁
                                        x)) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                             GI x)
functor_double_id_cell GI x ;;2 id_two_disp
                                  (pr2 F x x
                                     (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                             FI x)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
τ: FI ==>[ id₂ F] GI
x: pr1 CD₁
p:= τ x: functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 id_two_disp
                                  (pr2 F x x
                                     (double_id I₁
                                        x)) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                             GI x)
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                             FI x)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
τ: FI ==>[ id₂ F] GI
x: pr1 CD₁
p: trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                             GI x)
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                             FI x)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
τ: FI ==>[ id₂ F] GI
x: pr1 CD₁
p: trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                             GI x)
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x =
trb₂ (id_two_disp (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                                 FI x)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
τ: FI ==>[ id₂ F] GI
x: pr1 CD₁
p: trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ (id_two_disp (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                                 GI
                                                 x)
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x =
trb₂ (id_two_disp (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                                 FI x)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
τ: FI ==>[ id₂ F] GI
x: pr1 CD₁
p: trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ (id_two_disp (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                                 GI
                                                 x)
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x =
trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
τ: FI ==>[ id₂ F] GI
x: pr1 CD₁
p: trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x)
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x =
trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
τ: FI ==>[ id₂ F] GI
x: pr1 CD₁
p: trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x)
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x =
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
τ: FI ==>[ id₂ F] GI
x: pr1 CD₁
p: trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x =
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x

    refine (_ @ !p @ _) ; use transportf_disp_mor2_eq ; apply idpath.
  
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
τ: FI ==>[ id₂ F] GI
τ
•• ((λ x : pr1 CD₁,
     (let p := τ x in
      internal_paths_rew_r
        (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
         id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
         ][ id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)] pr2 F x x
                                             (double_id
                                                I₁ x))
        (functor_double_id_cell GI x ;;2 id_two_disp
                                           (pr2 F x x
                                              (double_id
                                                 I₁ x)))
        (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x)
        (λ t : double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
               id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
               ][ id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)] pr2 F
                                                 x x
                                                 (double_id
                                                 I₁ x),
         t =
         trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 
               functor_double_id_cell FI x))
        (let p0 :=
           internal_paths_rew
             (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
              id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
              ][ id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)] pr2 F
                                                 x x
                                                 (double_id
                                                 I₁ x))
             (functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 id_two_disp
                                                (pr2 F
                                                 x x
                                                 (double_id
                                                 I₁ x)))
             (λ t : double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
                    id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                    ][ id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)] 
                    pr2 F x x (double_id I₁ x),
              t =
              trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 
                    functor_double_id_cell GI x)) p
             (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x)
             (id_two_disp_right
                (functor_double_id_cell FI x)) in
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
            ][ id₁ (pr1 F x)] double_id I₂ (pr1 F x))
           (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)))
           (id_two_disp (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x)))
           (λ t : double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
                  id₁ (pr1 F x)
                  ][ id₁ (pr1 F x)] double_id I₂
                                      (pr1 F x),
            trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x =
            trb₂ (t ;;2 functor_double_id_cell FI x))
           (let p1 :=
              internal_paths_rew
                (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
                 id₁ (pr1 F x)
                 ][ id₁ (pr1 F x)] double_id I₂
                                     (pr1 F x))
                (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)))
                (λ t : double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
                       id₁ (pr1 F x)
                       ][ id₁ (pr1 F x)] double_id I₂
                                           (pr1 F x),
                 trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
                 trb₂ (t ;;2 functor_double_id_cell GI
                               x)) p0
                (id_two_disp (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x)))
                (double_id_mor_id I₂ (pr1 F x)) in
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
               id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
               ][ id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)] pr2 F
                                                 x x
                                                 (double_id
                                                 I₁ x))
              (id_two_disp (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 
               functor_double_id_cell FI x)
              (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x)
              (λ t : double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
                     id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                     ][ id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)] 
                     pr2 F x x (double_id I₁ x),
               trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x =
               trb₂ t)
              (let p2 :=
                 internal_paths_rew
                   (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
                    id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                    ][ id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)] 
                    pr2 F x x (double_id I₁ x))
                   (id_two_disp
                      (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 
                    functor_double_id_cell GI x)
                   (λ t : double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
                          id₁ (...) · id₁ (...)
                          ][ id₁ (...) · id₁ (...)] 
                          pr2 F x x (double_id I₁ x),
                    trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
                    trb₂ t) p1
                   (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x)
                   (id_two_disp_left
                      (functor_double_id_cell GI x))
                 in
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
                  id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                  ][ id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)] 
                  pr2 F x x (double_id I₁ x))
                 (trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI
                               x))
                 (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x)
                 (λ t : double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
                        id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                        ][ id₁ (pr1 F x)
                           · id₁ (pr1 F x)] pr2 F x x
                                              (double_id
                                                 I₁ x),
                  trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x = t)
                 (let p3 :=
                    internal_paths_rew
                      (double_id I₂ (...) -->[
                       id₁ ... · id₁ ...
                       ][ id₁ ... · id₁ ...] pr2 F x x
                                               (...))
                      (trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell
                                    GI x))
                      (λ t : ... -->[ ... ][ ...] ...,
                       trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI
                              x = t) p2
                      (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI
                              x)
                      (transport_b_b_disp_mor2
                         (id_left ...) (... @ ! ...)
                         (id_left ...) (... @ ! ...)
                         (functor_double_id_cell GI x))
                    in
                  transportf_disp_mor2_eq
                    (idpath
                       (functor_double_id_cell GI x)) @
                  ! p3 @
                  transportf_disp_mor2_eq
                    (idpath (...)))
                 (transport_b_b_disp_mor2
                    (id_left (id₁ (pr1 F x)))
                    (id_left (id₁ (...)) @
                     ! id_right (id₁ (...)))
                    (id_left (id₁ (pr1 F x)))
                    (id_left (id₁ (...)) @
                     ! id_right (id₁ (...)))
                    (functor_double_id_cell FI x)))
              (id_two_disp_left
                 (functor_double_id_cell FI x)))
           (double_id_mor_id I₂ (pr1 F x)))
        (id_two_disp_right
           (functor_double_id_cell GI x)))
     :
     functor_double_id_cell GI x ;;2 pr2
                                       (id2_invertible_2cell
                                          F) ^-1 x x
                                       (double_id I₁ x) =
     trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂
             (pr1 (id2_invertible_2cell F) ^-1 x) ;;2 
           functor_double_id_cell FI x))
    :
    GI ==>[ (id2_invertible_2cell F) ^-1] FI) =
transportb (λ α : F ==> F, FI ==>[ α] FI)
  (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell F)) (disp_id2 FI)
 apply isaprop_double_nat_trans_hor_id.

               (double_id_mor_id I₂ (pr1 F x)))

        (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell F))
        (disp_id2 FI)))

F, G: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell F G
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
GI: I₁ -->[ G] I₂
ττ: FI ==>[ τ] GI
is_disp_invertible_2cell τ ττ


CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F, G: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell F G
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
GI: I₁ -->[ G] I₂
ττ: FI ==>[ τ] GI
is_disp_invertible_2cell τ ττ

  
∏ (CD₁ CD₂ : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(F G : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧)
(τ : invertible_2cell F G)
(I₁ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁)
(I₂ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂)
(FI : I₁ -->[ F] I₂) (GI : I₁ -->[ G] I₂)
(ττ : FI ==>[ τ] GI), is_disp_invertible_2cell τ ττ

  
is_univalent_2_1 bicat_twosided_disp_cat
∏ (a b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧),
(λ (a0 b0 : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
 (f0 g : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧)
 (α : invertible_2cell f0 g),
 ∏ (I₁ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id a0)
 (I₂ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id b0)
 (FI : I₁ -->[ f0] I₂) (GI : I₁ -->[ g] I₂)
 (ττ : FI ==>[ α] GI), is_disp_invertible_2cell α ττ)
  a b f f (id2_invertible_2cell f)

  
is_univalent_2_1 bicat_twosided_disp_cat
 apply is_univalent_2_1_bicat_twosided_disp_cat.
  
∏ (a b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧),
(λ (a0 b0 : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
 (f0 g : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧)
 (α : invertible_2cell f0 g),
 ∏ (I₁ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id a0)
 (I₂ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id b0)
 (FI : I₁ -->[ f0] I₂) (GI : I₁ -->[ g] I₂)
 (ττ : FI ==>[ α] GI), is_disp_invertible_2cell α ττ)
  a b f f (id2_invertible_2cell f)
 
∏
(a
 b : ∑ x : univalent_category,
     univalent_twosided_disp_cat x x)
(f : ∑ f : pr1 a ⟶ pr1 b,
     twosided_disp_functor f f (pr2 a) (pr2 b))
(I₁ : hor_id (pr12 a)) (I₂ : hor_id (pr12 b))
(FI GI : double_functor_hor_id (pr2 f) I₁ I₂)
(ττ : double_nat_trans_hor_id
        ((λ (x y : pr1 a) (xy : pr2 a x y),
          id_two_disp (pr2 f x y xy)),,
         id_twosided_disp_nat_trans_laws (pr2 f)) FI
        GI),
is_disp_invertible_2cell (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f)
  ττ

    
a, b: ∑ x : univalent_category,
univalent_twosided_disp_cat x x
f: ∑ f : pr1 a ⟶ pr1 b,
twosided_disp_functor f f (pr2 a) (pr2 b)
I₁: hor_id (pr12 a)
I₂: hor_id (pr12 b)
FI, GI: double_functor_hor_id (pr2 f) I₁ I₂
ττ: double_nat_trans_hor_id
  ((λ (x y : pr1 a) (xy : pr2 a x y),
    id_two_disp (pr2 f x y xy)),,
   id_twosided_disp_nat_trans_laws (pr2 f)) FI GI
is_disp_invertible_2cell (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f)
  ττ

    apply is_disp_invertible_2cell_hor_id_over_id.
Qed.

Section HorIdDispInv2cell.
  Context {CD₁ CD₂ : bicat_twosided_disp_cat}
          {F : CD₁ --> CD₂}
          {I₁ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁}
          {I₂ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂}
          (FI GI : I₁ -->[ F] I₂).

I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂

≃ disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FI GI

p: pr1 FI ~ pr1 GI
(λ x : FI ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell F] GI,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) x)
  ?pr1

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧

I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂

CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: pr1 FI ~ pr1 GI
x: pr1 CD₁
functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 id_two_disp
                                  (pr2 F x x
                                     (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                             GI x)

        
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: pr1 FI ~ pr1 GI
x: pr1 CD₁
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                             GI x)

        
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: pr1 FI ~ pr1 GI
x: pr1 CD₁
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ (id_two_disp (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                                 GI x)

        
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: pr1 FI ~ pr1 GI
x: pr1 CD₁
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x)

        
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: pr1 FI ~ pr1 GI
x: pr1 CD₁
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x

        
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: pr1 FI ~ pr1 GI
x: pr1 CD₁
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x = ?b
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: pr1 FI ~ pr1 GI
x: pr1 CD₁
?b = trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x

        
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: pr1 FI ~ pr1 GI
x: pr1 CD₁
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x = ?b

          
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: pr1 FI ~ pr1 GI
x: pr1 CD₁
functor_double_id_cell FI x = ?t2

          exact (p x).
        
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: pr1 FI ~ pr1 GI
x: pr1 CD₁
trb₂ pr1 GI x = trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x

        
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: pr1 FI ~ pr1 GI
x: pr1 CD₁
pr1 GI x = functor_double_id_cell GI x

        apply idpath.
      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: pr1 FI ~ pr1 GI
(λ x : FI ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell F] GI,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) x)
  ((λ x : pr1 CD₁,
    internal_paths_rew_r
      (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
       id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
       ][ id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)] pr2 F x x
                                           (double_id
                                              I₁ x))
      (functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 id_two_disp
                                         (pr2 F x x
                                            (double_id
                                               I₁ x)))
      (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x)
      (λ t : double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
             id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
             ][ id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)] pr2 F x
                                                 x
                                                 (double_id
                                                 I₁ x),
       t =
       trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 
             functor_double_id_cell GI x))
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
          ][ id₁ (pr1 F x)] double_id I₂ (pr1 F x))
         (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)))
         (id_two_disp (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x)))
         (λ t : double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
                id₁ (pr1 F x)
                ][ id₁ (pr1 F x)] double_id I₂
                                    (pr1 F x),
          trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
          trb₂ (t ;;2 functor_double_id_cell GI x))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
             id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
             ][ id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)] pr2 F x
                                                 x
                                                 (double_id
                                                 I₁ x))
            (id_two_disp (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 
             functor_double_id_cell GI x)
            (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x)
            (λ t : double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
                   id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                   ][ id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)] 
                   pr2 F x x (double_id I₁ x),
             trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x = trb₂ t)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
                id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                ][ id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)] 
                pr2 F x x (double_id I₁ x))
               (trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x))
               (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x)
               (λ t : double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[
                      id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                      ][ id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)] 
                      pr2 F x x (double_id I₁ x),
                trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x = t)
               (maponpaths
                  (transportb_disp_mor2
                     (id_right (id₁ (pr1 F x)))
                     (id_right (id₁ (pr1 F x)))) (p x) @
                transportf_disp_mor2_eq
                  (idpath
                     (functor_double_id_cell GI x)))
               (transport_b_b_disp_mor2
                  (id_left (id₁ (pr1 F x)))
                  (id_left (id₁ (pr1 F x)) @
                   ! id_right (id₁ (pr1 F x)))
                  (id_left (id₁ (pr1 F x)))
                  (id_left (id₁ (pr1 F x)) @
                   ! id_right (id₁ (pr1 F x)))
                  (functor_double_id_cell GI x)))
            (id_two_disp_left
               (functor_double_id_cell GI x)))
         (double_id_mor_id I₂ (pr1 F x)))
      (id_two_disp_right (functor_double_id_cell FI x))
    :
    functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 pr2
                                      (id2_invertible_2cell
                                         F) x x
                                      (double_id I₁ x) =
    trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂
            (pr1 (id2_invertible_2cell F) x) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                                 GI x))
   :
   FI ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell F] GI)
 apply is_disp_invertible_2cell_hor_id.
    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FI GI
→ pr1 FI ~ pr1 GI
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FI
  GI
x: pr1 CD₁
pr1 FI x = pr1 GI x

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FI
  GI
x: pr1 CD₁
q:= pr1 p x: functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 pr2
                                  (id2_invertible_2cell
                                     F) x x
                                  (double_id I₁ x) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂
        (pr1 (id2_invertible_2cell F) x) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                               GI
                                               x)
pr1 FI x = pr1 GI x

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FI
  GI
x: pr1 CD₁
q:= pr1 p x: functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 id_two_disp
                                  (pr2 F x x
                                     (double_id I₁
                                        x)) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                             GI x)
pr1 FI x = pr1 GI x

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FI
  GI
x: pr1 CD₁
q: trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (id₁ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                             GI x)
pr1 FI x = pr1 GI x

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FI
  GI
x: pr1 CD₁
q: trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ (id_two_disp (double_id I₂ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                                 GI
                                                 x)
pr1 FI x = pr1 GI x

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FI
  GI
x: pr1 CD₁
q: trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x)
pr1 FI x = pr1 GI x

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FI
  GI
x: pr1 CD₁
q: trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x
pr1 FI x = pr1 GI x

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FI
  GI
x: pr1 CD₁
q: trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x
trf₂ (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x) = pr1 FI x

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FI
  GI
x: pr1 CD₁
q: trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x
trf₂ (trf₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x) = pr1 FI x

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FI
  GI
x: pr1 CD₁
q: trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell GI x
trf₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x = pr1 FI x

      apply transportf_disp_mor2_idpath.
    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
isaprop (pr1 FI ~ pr1 GI)
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
t: pr1 CD₁
isofhlevel 1 ((λ t : pr1 CD₁, pr1 FI t = pr1 GI t) t)

      apply isaset_disp_mor.
    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
isaprop
  (disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FI
     GI)
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F))
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
∏ x y : FI ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell F] GI,
is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) x
→ is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) y
  → x = y

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F))
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
x: FI ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell F] GI
isaprop
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) x)

        apply isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell.
      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
∏ x y : FI ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell F] GI,
is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) x
→ is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) y
  → x = y
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
x, y: FI ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell F] GI
X: is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F)
  x
X0: is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F)
  y
x = y

        apply isaprop_double_nat_trans_hor_id.
  Qed.
End HorIdDispInv2cell.


disp_univalent_2_1 disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id


disp_univalent_2_1 disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id

  
fiberwise_local_univalent
  disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id

  
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
isweq
  (disp_idtoiso_2_1
     disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id (idpath F) FI
     GI)

  
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧,
   I₁ -->[ z] I₂) (idpath F) FI = GI
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F))
    FI GI
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
?w ~
disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
  (idpath F) FI GI

  
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧,
   I₁ -->[ z] I₂) (idpath F) FI = GI
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F))
    FI GI
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
isaprop (double_functor_hor_id_laws (pr1 GI))

    apply isaprop_double_functor_hor_id_laws.
  
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
(disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id_weq_inv2cell FI
   GI
 ∘ weqtoforallpaths
     (λ x : pr1 CD₁,
      double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
      ][ id₁ (pr1 F x)] pr2 F x x (double_id I₁ x))
     (pr1 FI) (pr1 GI)
 ∘ path_sigma_hprop double_functor_hor_id_laws FI GI
     (isaprop_double_functor_hor_id_laws (pr1 GI)))%weq ~
disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
  (idpath F) FI GI
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧,
   I₁ -->[ z] I₂) (idpath F) FI = GI
(disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id_weq_inv2cell FI
   GI
 ∘ weqtoforallpaths
     (λ x : pr1 CD₁,
      double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
      ][ id₁ (pr1 F x)] pr2 F x x (double_id I₁ x))
     (pr1 FI) (pr1 GI)
 ∘ path_sigma_hprop double_functor_hor_id_laws FI GI
     (isaprop_double_functor_hor_id_laws (pr1 GI)))%weq
  p =
disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
  (idpath F) FI GI p

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧,
   I₁ -->[ z] I₂) (idpath F) FI = GI
isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell
     (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)))
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧,
   I₁ -->[ z] I₂) (idpath F) FI = GI
pr1
  ((disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id_weq_inv2cell
      FI GI
    ∘ weqtoforallpaths
        (λ x : pr1 CD₁,
         double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
         ][ id₁ (pr1 F x)] pr2 F x x (double_id I₁ x))
        (pr1 FI) (pr1 GI)
    ∘ path_sigma_hprop double_functor_hor_id_laws FI
        GI
        (isaprop_double_functor_hor_id_laws (pr1 GI)))%weq
     p) =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_1
     disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id (idpath F) FI
     GI p)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧,
   I₁ -->[ z] I₂) (idpath F) FI = GI
isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell
     (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)))

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧,
   I₁ -->[ z] I₂) (idpath F) FI = GI
x: FI ==>[ idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)] GI
isaprop
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell
     (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)) x)

      apply isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell.
    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
FI, GI: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
p: transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧,
   I₁ -->[ z] I₂) (idpath F) FI = GI
pr1
  ((disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id_weq_inv2cell
      FI GI
    ∘ weqtoforallpaths
        (λ x : pr1 CD₁,
         double_id I₂ (pr1 F x) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
         ][ id₁ (pr1 F x)] pr2 F x x (double_id I₁ x))
        (pr1 FI) (pr1 GI)
    ∘ path_sigma_hprop double_functor_hor_id_laws FI
        GI
        (isaprop_double_functor_hor_id_laws (pr1 GI)))%weq
     p) =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_1
     disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id (idpath F) FI
     GI p)

    apply isaprop_double_nat_trans_hor_id.
Qed.

Section AdjEquivHorId.
  Context {CD : bicat_twosided_disp_cat}
          (FF GG : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD)
          (τ : FF -->[ identity CD ] GG)
          (Hτ : ∏ (x : pr11 CD),
                is_iso_twosided_disp
                  (identity_is_z_iso _)
                  (identity_is_z_iso _)
                  (pr1 τ x)).

  Definition to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv_data
    : double_functor_hor_id_data (twosided_disp_functor_identity _) GG FF
    := λ x, pr1 (Hτ x).

  Arguments to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv_data /.

  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x)) (pr1 τ x)
double_functor_hor_id_laws
  to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv_data

  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x)) (pr1 τ x)
double_functor_hor_id_laws
  to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv_data

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x)) (pr1 τ x)
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
double_id_mor FF f ;;2 pr1 (Hτ y) =
trb₂ (pr1 (Hτ x) ;;2 double_id_mor GG f)

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x)) (pr1 τ x)
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 τ x y f: double_id_mor GG f ;;2 pr1 τ y =
trb₂ (pr1 τ x ;;2 double_id_mor FF f)
double_id_mor FF f ;;2 pr1 (Hτ y) =
trb₂ (pr1 (Hτ x) ;;2 double_id_mor GG f)

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x)) (pr1 τ x)
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 τ x y f: double_id_mor GG f ;;2 pr1 τ y =
trb₂ (pr1 τ x ;;2 double_id_mor FF f)
trb₂ (pr1 (Hτ x) ;;2 double_id_mor GG f) =
double_id_mor FF f ;;2 pr1 (Hτ y)

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x)) (pr1 τ x)
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 τ x y f: double_id_mor GG f ;;2 pr1 τ y =
trb₂ (pr1 τ x ;;2 double_id_mor FF f)
trb₂ (pr1 (Hτ x) ;;2 double_id_mor GG f) = ?b
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x)) (pr1 τ x)
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 τ x y f: double_id_mor GG f ;;2 pr1 τ y =
trb₂ (pr1 τ x ;;2 double_id_mor FF f)
?b = double_id_mor FF f ;;2 pr1 (Hτ y)

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x)) (pr1 τ x)
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 τ x y f: double_id_mor GG f ;;2 pr1 τ y =
trb₂ (pr1 τ x ;;2 double_id_mor FF f)
trb₂ (pr1 (Hτ x) ;;2 double_id_mor GG f) = ?b

      
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x)) (pr1 τ x)
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 τ x y f: double_id_mor GG f ;;2 pr1 τ y =
trb₂ (pr1 τ x ;;2 double_id_mor FF f)
pr1 (Hτ x) ;;2 double_id_mor GG f = ?t2

      apply id_two_disp_right_alt.
    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x)) (pr1 τ x)
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 τ x y f: double_id_mor GG f ;;2 pr1 τ y =
trb₂ (pr1 τ x ;;2 double_id_mor FF f)
trb₂ (trf₂ (pr1 (Hτ x) ;;2 double_id_mor GG f ;;2 
            id_two_disp (double_id GG y))) =
double_id_mor FF f ;;2 pr1 (Hτ y)

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x)) (pr1 τ x)
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 τ x y f: double_id_mor GG f ;;2 pr1 τ y =
trb₂ (pr1 τ x ;;2 double_id_mor FF f)
trf₂ (trf₂ (pr1 (Hτ x) ;;2 double_id_mor GG f ;;2 
            id_two_disp (double_id GG y))) =
double_id_mor FF f ;;2 pr1 (Hτ y)

FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x)) (pr1 τ x)
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 τ x y f: double_id_mor GG f ;;2 pr1 τ y =
trb₂ (pr1 τ x ;;2 double_id_mor FF f)
pr1 (Hτ x) ;;2 pr1 τ x = ?y'

      apply Hτ.

               (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv,,
                to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_unit,,
                to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_counit)
             ▹▹ τ))
        •• disp_rassociator τ
             (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity
                   CD)
                (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv,,
                 to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_unit,,
                 to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_counit))
             τ)
       •• (τ
           ◃◃ disp_left_adjoint_counit
                (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity
                   CD)
                (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv,,
                 to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_unit,,
                 to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_counit)))
      •• disp_runitor τ)
     (transportb
        (λ x : internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity
                 CD ==>
               internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity
                 CD, τ ==>[ x] τ)
        (internal_triangle1
           (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD))
        (disp_id2 τ)))
 apply isaprop_double_nat_trans_hor_id.
    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x)) (pr1 τ x)
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD))
  (disp_left_adjoint_unit
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD)
     (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv,,
      to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_unit,,
      to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_counit))
 apply is_disp_invertible_2cell_hor_id.
    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x)) (pr1 τ x)
(λ _ : is_disp_invertible_2cell
         (left_equivalence_unit_iso
            (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD))
         (disp_left_adjoint_unit
            (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD)
            (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv,,
             to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_unit,,
             to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_counit)),
 is_disp_invertible_2cell
   (left_equivalence_counit_iso
      (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD))
   (disp_left_adjoint_counit
      (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD)
      (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv,,
       to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_unit,,
       to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_counit)))
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell_hor_id
     (disp_left_adjoint_unit
        (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD)
        (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv,,
         to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_unit,,
         to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_counit)))
 apply is_disp_invertible_2cell_hor_id.
  Qed.
End AdjEquivHorId.

iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
  (double_id (pr1 FF) x)
Hτ: double_functor_hor_id_laws
  (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 (τ x))
disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG

(λ ff : FF -->[

 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) ff)
  ((λ x : pr1 CD, τ x),, Hτ)
 
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
  (double_id (pr1 FF) x)

  (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 (τ x))
∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (pr1 ((λ x0 : pr1 CD, τ x0),, Hτ) x)

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
  (double_id (pr1 FF) x)
Hτ: double_functor_hor_id_laws
  (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 (τ x))
x: pr11 CD
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (pr1 ((λ x : pr1 CD, τ x),, Hτ) x)

    exact (pr2 (τ x)).
Defined.


CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: adjoint_equivalence CD₁ CD₂
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
τ: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD₁,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 F x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 τ x)
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence F τ


CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: adjoint_equivalence CD₁ CD₂
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
τ: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD₁,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 F x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 τ x)
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence F τ

  
∏ (CD₁ CD₂ : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(F : adjoint_equivalence CD₁ CD₂)
(I₁ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁)
(I₂ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂)
(τ : I₁ -->[ F] I₂),
(∏ x : pr11 CD₁,
 is_iso_twosided_disp (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 F x))
   (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 τ x))
→ disp_left_adjoint_equivalence F τ

  
is_univalent_2_0 bicat_twosided_disp_cat
∏ a : bicat_twosided_disp_cat,
(λ (a0 b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
 (f : adjoint_equivalence a0 b),
 ∏ (I₁ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id a0)
 (I₂ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id b)
 (τ : I₁ -->[ f] I₂),
 (∏ x : pr11 a0,
  is_iso_twosided_disp (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 f x))
    (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 f x)) (pr1 τ x))
 → disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f τ) a a
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)

  
is_univalent_2_0 bicat_twosided_disp_cat
 exact is_univalent_2_0_bicat_twosided_disp_cat.
  
∏ a : bicat_twosided_disp_cat,
(λ (a0 b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
 (f : adjoint_equivalence a0 b),
 ∏ (I₁ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id a0)
 (I₂ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id b)
 (τ : I₁ -->[ f] I₂),
 (∏ x : pr11 a0,
  is_iso_twosided_disp (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 f x))
    (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 f x)) (pr1 τ x))
 → disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f τ) a a
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)
 
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
I₁, I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: I₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD] I₂
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso
     (pr1
        (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD)
        x))
  (identity_is_z_iso
     (pr1
        (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD)
        x)) (pr1 τ x)
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) τ

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
I₁, I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: I₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD] I₂
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso
     (pr1
        (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD)
        x))
  (identity_is_z_iso
     (pr1
        (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD)
        x)) (pr1 τ x)
∏ x : pr11 CD,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x)) (pr1 τ x)

    exact Hτ.
Qed.


CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
HF: left_adjoint_equivalence F
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
τ: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD₁,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 F x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 τ x)
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence HF τ


CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
HF: left_adjoint_equivalence F
I₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₁
I₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD₂
τ: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
Hτ: ∏ x : pr11 CD₁,
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 F x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 τ x)
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence HF τ

  exact (disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_help (F ,, HF) τ Hτ).
Qed.

Section FromAdjEquivHorId.
  Context {CD : bicat_twosided_disp_cat}
          {FF GG : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD}
          (τ : disp_adjoint_equivalence (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG).

  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
x: pr11 CD
is_iso_twosided_disp (identity_is_z_iso x)
  (identity_is_z_iso x) ((pr11 τ) x)

  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
x: pr11 CD
is_iso_twosided_disp (identity_is_z_iso x)
  (identity_is_z_iso x) ((pr11 τ) x)

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
x: pr11 CD
pr2 (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) x x
  (double_id FF x) -->[
inv_from_z_iso (id₁ x,, identity_is_z_iso x)
][ inv_from_z_iso (id₁ x,, identity_is_z_iso x)] double_id
                                                 GG
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity
                                                 CD) x)
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
x: pr11 CD
(λ gf : pr2 (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD)
          x x (double_id FF x) -->[
        inv_from_z_iso (id₁ x,, identity_is_z_iso x)
        ][ inv_from_z_iso
             (id₁ x,, identity_is_z_iso x)] double_id
                                              GG
                                              (pr1
                                                 (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity
                                                 CD) x),
 (pr11 τ) x ;;2 gf =
 trb₂ id_two_disp
        (double_id GG
           (pr1
              (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity
                 CD) x))
 × gf ;;2 (pr11 τ) x =
   trb₂ id_two_disp
          (pr2
             (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD)
             x x (double_id FF x))) ?pr1

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
x: pr11 CD
pr2 (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) x x
  (double_id FF x) -->[
inv_from_z_iso (id₁ x,, identity_is_z_iso x)
][ inv_from_z_iso (id₁ x,, identity_is_z_iso x)] double_id
                                                 GG
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity
                                                 CD) x)
 exact (pr1 (pr112 τ) x).
    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
x: pr11 CD
(λ gf : pr2 (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD)
          x x (double_id FF x) -->[
        inv_from_z_iso (id₁ x,, identity_is_z_iso x)
        ][ inv_from_z_iso
             (id₁ x,, identity_is_z_iso x)] double_id
                                              GG
                                              (pr1
                                                 (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity
                                                 CD) x),
 (pr11 τ) x ;;2 gf =
 trb₂ id_two_disp
        (double_id GG
           (pr1
              (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity
                 CD) x))
 × gf ;;2 (pr11 τ) x =
   trb₂ id_two_disp
          (pr2
             (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD)
             x x (double_id FF x)))
  ((pr111 (pr2 τ)) x)
 
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
x: pr11 CD
(pr11 τ) x ;;2 (pr111 (pr2 τ)) x =
trb₂ id_two_disp
       (double_id GG
          (pr1
             (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD)
             x))
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
x: pr11 CD
(pr111 (pr2 τ)) x ;;2 (pr11 τ) x =
trb₂ id_two_disp
       (pr2 (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD)
          x x (double_id FF x))

      
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
x: pr11 CD
(pr11 τ) x ;;2 (pr111 (pr2 τ)) x =
trb₂ id_two_disp
       (double_id GG
          (pr1
             (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD)
             x))
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           pose (p := pr2 (pr212 τ) x) ;
           cbn in p ;
           rewrite id_two_disp_right in p ;
           rewrite double_id_mor_id in p ;
           rewrite id_two_disp_left in p ;
           unfold transportb_disp_mor2 in p ;
           rewrite !transport_f_f_disp_mor2 in p ;
           refine (!(transportbf_disp_mor2 _ _ _) @ maponpaths _ p @ _) ;
           unfold transportb_disp_mor2 ;
           rewrite transport_f_f_disp_mor2 ;
           use transportf_disp_mor2_eq ;
           apply idpath).
      
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
x: pr11 CD
(pr111 (pr2 τ)) x ;;2 (pr11 τ) x =
trb₂ id_two_disp
       (pr2 (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD)
          x x (double_id FF x))
 abstract
          (pose (p := pr1 (pr212 τ) x) ;
           cbn in p ;
           rewrite id_two_disp_left in p ;
           rewrite double_id_mor_id in p ;
           rewrite id_two_disp_left in p ;
           unfold transportb_disp_mor2 in p ;
           rewrite !transport_f_f_disp_mor2 in p ;
           refine (!(transportbf_disp_mor2 _ _ _) @ maponpaths _ (!p) @ _) ;
           unfold transportb_disp_mor2 ;
           rewrite transport_f_f_disp_mor2 ;
           use transportf_disp_mor2_eq ;
           apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
double_functor_hor_id_laws (λ x : pr1 CD, (pr11 τ) x)

  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
double_functor_hor_id_laws (λ x : pr1 CD, (pr11 τ) x)

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
double_id_mor GG (# (functor_identity (pr1 CD)) f) ;;2 
(pr11 τ) y =
trb₂ ((pr11 τ) x ;;2 (#2 (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                            (pr12 CD)))
                       (double_id_mor FF f))

    exact (pr21 τ x y f).
  Qed.
End FromAdjEquivHorId.


CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
∑
F : ∏ x : pr11 CD,
    iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
      (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
      (double_id (pr1 FF) x),
double_functor_hor_id_laws (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 (F x))


CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
∑
F : ∏ x : pr11 CD,
    iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
      (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
      (double_id (pr1 FF) x),
double_functor_hor_id_laws (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 (F x))

  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
∏ x : pr11 CD,
iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
  (double_id (pr1 FF) x)
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
(λ F : ∏ x : pr11 CD,
       iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
         (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
         (double_id (pr1 FF) x),
 double_functor_hor_id_laws (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 (F x)))
  ?pr1

τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
∏ x : pr11 CD,
iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
  (double_id (pr1 FF) x)

τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
