iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
  (double_id (pr1 FF) x)

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
x: pr11 CD
double_id (pr1 GG) x -->[ identity_z_iso x
][ identity_z_iso x] double_id (pr1 FF) x
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
x: pr11 CD
(λ fg : double_id (pr1 GG) x -->[ identity_z_iso x
        ][ identity_z_iso x] double_id (pr1 FF) x,
 is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
   (pr2 (identity_z_iso x)) fg) ?pr1

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
x: pr11 CD
double_id (pr1 GG) x -->[ identity_z_iso x
][ identity_z_iso x] double_id (pr1 FF) x
 exact (pr11 τ x).
    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
x: pr11 CD
(λ fg : double_id (pr1 GG) x -->[ identity_z_iso x
        ][ identity_z_iso x] double_id (pr1 FF) x,
 is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
   (pr2 (identity_z_iso x)) fg) ((pr11 τ) x)
 exact (weq_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv_iso τ x).
  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
τ: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
(λ F : ∏ x : pr11 CD,
       iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
         (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
         (double_id (pr1 FF) x),
 double_functor_hor_id_laws (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 (F x)))
  (λ x : pr11 CD,
   (pr11 τ) x,,
   weq_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv_iso τ x)
 exact (weq_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv_laws τ).
Defined.


CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
(∑
 F : ∏ x : pr11 CD,
     iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
       (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
       (double_id (pr1 FF) x),
 double_functor_hor_id_laws (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 (F x)))
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG


CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
(∑
 F : ∏ x : pr11 CD,
     iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
       (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
       (double_id (pr1 FF) x),
 double_functor_hor_id_laws (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 (F x)))
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG

  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
(∑
 F : ∏ x : pr11 CD,
     iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
       (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
       (double_id (pr1 FF) x),
 double_functor_hor_id_laws (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 (F x)))
→ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
→ ∑
  F : ∏ x : pr11 CD,
      iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
        (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
        (double_id (pr1 FF) x),
  double_functor_hor_id_laws (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 (F x))
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
∏
x : ∑
    F : ∏ x : pr11 CD,
        iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
          (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
          (double_id (pr1 FF) x),
    double_functor_hor_id_laws
      (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 (F x)), ?g (?f x) = x
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
∏
y : disp_adjoint_equivalence
      (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG,
?f (?g y) = y

  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
(∑
 F : ∏ x : pr11 CD,
     iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
       (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
       (double_id (pr1 FF) x),
 double_functor_hor_id_laws (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 (F x)))
→ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
 
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
F: ∑
F : ∏ x : pr11 CD,
    iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
      (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
      (double_id (pr1 FF) x),
double_functor_hor_id_laws
  (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 (F x))
disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG

    exact (weq_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_map (pr1 F) (pr2 F)).
  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG
→ ∑
  F : ∏ x : pr11 CD,
      iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
        (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
        (double_id (pr1 FF) x),
  double_functor_hor_id_laws (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 (F x))
 exact weq_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv.
  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
∏
x : ∑
    F : ∏ x : pr11 CD,
        iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
          (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
          (double_id (pr1 FF) x),
    double_functor_hor_id_laws
      (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 (F x)),
weq_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv
  ((λ F : ∑
          F : ∏ x0 : pr11 CD,
              iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x0)
                (identity_z_iso x0)
                (double_id (pr1 GG) x0)
                (double_id (pr1 FF) x0),
          double_functor_hor_id_laws
            (λ x0 : pr1 CD, pr1 (F x0)),
    weq_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_map (pr1 F) (pr2 F))
     x) = x
 abstract
      (intro τ ;
       use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_double_functor_hor_id_laws | ] ;
       use funextsec ; intro ;
       use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_iso_twosided_disp | ] ;
       cbn ;
       apply idpath).
  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
∏
y : disp_adjoint_equivalence
      (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity CD) FF GG,
(λ F : ∑
       F : ∏ x : pr11 CD,
           iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
             (identity_z_iso x) (double_id (pr1 GG) x)
             (double_id (pr1 FF) x),
       double_functor_hor_id_laws
         (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 (F x)),
 weq_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_map (pr1 F) (pr2 F))
  (weq_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv y) = y
 abstract
      (intro τ ;
       use subtypePath ;
       [ intro ;
         apply isaprop_disp_left_adjoint_equivalence ;
         [ apply is_univalent_2_1_bicat_twosided_disp_cat
         | apply disp_univalent_2_1_disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id ]
       | ] ;
       use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_double_functor_hor_id_laws | ] ;
       use funextsec ; intro ;
       cbn ;
       apply idpath).
Defined.


disp_univalent_2_0 disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id


disp_univalent_2_0 disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id

  
fiberwise_univalent_2_0
  disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id

  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
isweq
  (disp_idtoiso_2_0
     disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id (idpath CD)
     FF GG)

  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat,
   disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id z) (idpath CD)
  FF = GG
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 CD CD (idpath CD)) FF GG
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
?w ~
disp_idtoiso_2_0 disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
  (idpath CD) FF GG

  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat,
   disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id z) (idpath CD)
  FF = GG
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 CD CD (idpath CD)) FF GG
 
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
∏
x : pr11 FF =
    (λ x : pr1 CD,
     transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
       (idpath x)
       (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
          (idpath x) ((pr11 GG) x))),
transportf
  (λ x0 : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
   ∏ (x1 y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x1, y ⟧),
   x0 x1 -->[ f ][ f] x0 y) x (pr21 FF) = pr21 GG
≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
    (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
     pr1
       ((weqonsecfibers
           (λ x1 : pr1 CD,
            (pr11 FF) x1 =
            transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x1)
              (idpath x1)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x1 z)
                 (idpath x1) ((pr11 GG) x1)))
           (λ x1 : pr1 CD,
            iso_twosided_disp (idtoiso (idpath x1))
              (idtoiso (idpath x1)) ((pr11 GG) x1)
              ((pr11 FF) x1))
           (λ x1 : pr1 CD,
            make_weq
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x1)
                 (idpath x1))
              ((pr22 CD) x1 x1 x1 x1 (idpath x1)
                 (idpath x1) ((pr11 GG) x1)
                 ((pr11 FF) x1))
            ∘ weqpathsinv0 ((pr11 FF) x1)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x1)
                   (idpath x1)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x1 z)
                      (idpath x1) ((pr11 GG) x1))))
         ∘ weqtoforallpaths
             (λ x1 : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x1 x1)
             (pr11 FF)
             (λ x1 : pr1 CD,
              transportf
                (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x1)
                (idpath x1)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x1 z)
                   (idpath x1) ((pr11 GG) x1))))%weq x
          x0))

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
H: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)
GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
∏
x : pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H) =
    (λ x : pr1 CD,
     transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
       (idpath x)
       (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
          (idpath x) ((pr11 GG) x))),
transportf
  (λ x0 : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
   ∏ (x1 y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x1, y ⟧),
   x0 x1 -->[ f ][ f] x0 y) x (pr21 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) =
pr21 GG
≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
    (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
     pr1
       ((weqonsecfibers
           (λ x1 : pr1 CD,
            (pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x1 =
            transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x1)
              (idpath x1)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x1 z)
                 (idpath x1) ((pr11 GG) x1)))
           (λ x1 : pr1 CD,
            iso_twosided_disp (idtoiso (idpath x1))
              (idtoiso (idpath x1)) ((pr11 GG) x1)
              ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x1))
           (λ x1 : pr1 CD,
            make_weq
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x1)
                 (idpath x1))
              ((pr22 CD) x1 x1 x1 x1 (idpath x1)
                 (idpath x1) ((pr11 GG) x1)
                 ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x1))
            ∘ weqpathsinv0
                ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x1)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x1)
                   (idpath x1)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x1 z)
                      (idpath x1) ((pr11 GG) x1))))
         ∘ weqtoforallpaths
             (λ x1 : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x1 x1)
             (pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H))
             (λ x1 : pr1 CD,
              transportf
                (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x1)
                (idpath x1)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x1 z)
                   (idpath x1) ((pr11 GG) x1))))%weq x
          x0))

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
H: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)
GG₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
GG₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), GG₁ x -->[ f ][ f] GG₁ y
K: hor_id_laws (GG₁,, GG₂)
∏
x : pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H) =
    (λ x : pr1 CD,
     transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
       (idpath x)
       (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
          (idpath x) ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x))),
transportf
  (λ x0 : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
   ∏ (x1 y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x1, y ⟧),
   x0 x1 -->[ f ][ f] x0 y) x (pr21 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) =
pr21 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)
≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
    (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
     pr1
       ((weqonsecfibers
           (λ x1 : pr1 CD,
            (pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x1 =
            transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x1)
              (idpath x1)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x1 z)
                 (idpath x1)
                 ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x1)))
           (λ x1 : pr1 CD,
            iso_twosided_disp (idtoiso (idpath x1))
              (idtoiso (idpath x1))
              ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x1)
              ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x1))
           (λ x1 : pr1 CD,
            make_weq
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x1)
                 (idpath x1))
              ((pr22 CD) x1 x1 x1 x1 (idpath x1)
                 (idpath x1)
                 ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x1)
                 ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x1))
            ∘ weqpathsinv0
                ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x1)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x1)
                   (idpath x1)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x1 z)
                      (idpath x1)
                      ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x1))))
         ∘ weqtoforallpaths
             (λ x1 : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x1 x1)
             (pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H))
             (λ x1 : pr1 CD,
              transportf
                (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x1)
                (idpath x1)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x1 z)
                   (idpath x1)
                   ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x1))))%weq
          x x0))

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
H: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)
GG₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
GG₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), GG₁ x -->[ f ][ f] GG₁ y
K: hor_id_laws (GG₁,, GG₂)
p: pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H) =
(λ x : pr1 CD,
 transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
   (idpath x)
   (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
      (idpath x) ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x)))
transportf
  (λ x : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
   ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
   x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p (pr21 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) =
pr21 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)
≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
    (λ x : pr1 CD,
     pr1
       ((weqonsecfibers
           (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
            (pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0 =
            transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x0)
              (idpath x0)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 z)
                 (idpath x0)
                 ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0)))
           (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
            iso_twosided_disp (idtoiso (idpath x0))
              (idtoiso (idpath x0))
              ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0)
              ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0))
           (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
            make_weq
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x0)
                 (idpath x0))
              ((pr22 CD) x0 x0 x0 x0 (idpath x0)
                 (idpath x0)
                 ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0)
                 ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0))
            ∘ weqpathsinv0
                ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x0)
                   (idpath x0)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 z)
                      (idpath x0)
                      ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0))))
         ∘ weqtoforallpaths
             (λ x0 : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 x0)
             (pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H))
             (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
              transportf
                (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x0)
                (idpath x0)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 z)
                   (idpath x0)
                   ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0))))%weq
          p x))

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
H: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)
GG₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
GG₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), GG₁ x -->[ f ][ f] GG₁ y
K: hor_id_laws (GG₁,, GG₂)
p: pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H) =
(λ x : pr1 CD,
 transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
   (idpath x)
   (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
      (idpath x) ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x)))
q:= p : FF₁ = GG₁: FF₁ = GG₁
transportf
  (λ x : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
   ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
   x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p (pr21 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) =
pr21 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)
≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
    (λ x : pr1 CD,
     pr1
       ((weqonsecfibers
           (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
            (pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0 =
            transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x0)
              (idpath x0)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 z)
                 (idpath x0)
                 ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0)))
           (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
            iso_twosided_disp (idtoiso (idpath x0))
              (idtoiso (idpath x0))
              ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0)
              ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0))
           (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
            make_weq
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x0)
                 (idpath x0))
              ((pr22 CD) x0 x0 x0 x0 (idpath x0)
                 (idpath x0)
                 ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0)
                 ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0))
            ∘ weqpathsinv0
                ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x0)
                   (idpath x0)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 z)
                      (idpath x0)
                      ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0))))
         ∘ weqtoforallpaths
             (λ x0 : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 x0)
             (pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H))
             (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
              transportf
                (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x0)
                (idpath x0)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 z)
                   (idpath x0)
                   ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0))))%weq
          p x))

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
H: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)
GG₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
GG₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), GG₁ x -->[ f ][ f] GG₁ y
K: hor_id_laws (GG₁,, GG₂)
p: pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H) =
(λ x : pr1 CD,
 transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
   (idpath x)
   (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
      (idpath x) ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x)))
q:= p : FF₁ = GG₁: FF₁ = GG₁
X: p = q
transportf
  (λ x : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
   ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
   x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p (pr21 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) =
pr21 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)
≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
    (λ x : pr1 CD,
     pr1
       ((weqonsecfibers
           (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
            (pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0 =
            transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x0)
              (idpath x0)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 z)
                 (idpath x0)
                 ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0)))
           (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
            iso_twosided_disp (idtoiso (idpath x0))
              (idtoiso (idpath x0))
              ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0)
              ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0))
           (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
            make_weq
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x0)
                 (idpath x0))
              ((pr22 CD) x0 x0 x0 x0 (idpath x0)
                 (idpath x0)
                 ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0)
                 ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0))
            ∘ weqpathsinv0
                ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x0)
                   (idpath x0)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 z)
                      (idpath x0)
                      ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0))))
         ∘ weqtoforallpaths
             (λ x0 : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 x0)
             (pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H))
             (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
              transportf
                (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x0)
                (idpath x0)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 z)
                   (idpath x0)
                   ((pr11 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0))))%weq
          p x))

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
H: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)
GG₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
K: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, GG₂)

 transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
   (idpath x)
   (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
      (idpath x) ((pr11 ((FF₁,, GG₂),, K)) x)))
X: p = idpath FF₁
transportf
  (λ x : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
   ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
   x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p (pr21 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) =
pr21 ((FF₁,, GG₂),, K)
≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
    (λ x : pr1 CD,
     pr1
       ((weqonsecfibers
           (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
            (pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0 =
            transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x0)
              (idpath x0)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 z)
                 (idpath x0)
                 ((pr11 ((FF₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0)))
           (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
            iso_twosided_disp (idtoiso (idpath x0))
              (idtoiso (idpath x0))
              ((pr11 ((FF₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0)
              ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0))
           (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
            make_weq
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x0)
                 (idpath x0))
              ((pr22 CD) x0 x0 x0 x0 (idpath x0)
                 (idpath x0)
                 ((pr11 ((FF₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0)
                 ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0))
            ∘ weqpathsinv0
                ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x0)
                   (idpath x0)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 z)
                      (idpath x0)
                      ((pr11 ((FF₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0))))
         ∘ weqtoforallpaths
             (λ x0 : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 x0)
             (pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H))
             (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
              transportf
                (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x0)
                (idpath x0)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 z)
                   (idpath x0)
                   ((pr11 ((FF₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0))))%weq
          p x))

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
H: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)
GG₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
K: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, GG₂)
transportf
  (λ x : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
   ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
   x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) (idpath FF₁)
  (pr21 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) = pr21 ((FF₁,, GG₂),, K)
≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
    (λ x : pr1 CD,
     pr1
       ((weqonsecfibers
           (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
            (pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0 =
            transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x0)
              (idpath x0)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 z)
                 (idpath x0)
                 ((pr11 ((FF₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0)))
           (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
            iso_twosided_disp (idtoiso (idpath x0))
              (idtoiso (idpath x0))
              ((pr11 ((FF₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0)
              ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0))
           (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
            make_weq
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x0)
                 (idpath x0))
              ((pr22 CD) x0 x0 x0 x0 (idpath x0)
                 (idpath x0)
                 ((pr11 ((FF₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0)
                 ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0))
            ∘ weqpathsinv0
                ((pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H)) x0)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x0)
                   (idpath x0)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 z)
                      (idpath x0)
                      ((pr11 ((FF₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0))))
         ∘ weqtoforallpaths
             (λ x0 : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 x0)
             (pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H))
             (λ x0 : pr1 CD,
              transportf
                (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x0)
                (idpath x0)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x0 z)
                   (idpath x0)
                   ((pr11 ((FF₁,, GG₂),, K)) x0))))%weq
          (idpath FF₁) x))

FF₂ = GG₂
≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
    (λ x : pr1 CD, id_two_disp (FF₁ x))

CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y

q: FF₂ = GG₂
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
double_id_mor ((FF₁,, GG₂),, K)
  (# (functor_identity (pr1 CD)) f) ;;2 id_two_disp
                                          (FF₁ y) =
trb₂ (id_two_disp (FF₁ x) ;;2 (#2 (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                     (pr12 CD)))
                                (double_id_mor
                                   ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H) f))

CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
H: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)
GG₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
K: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, GG₂)
q: double_functor_hor_id_laws
  (λ x : pr1 CD, id_two_disp (FF₁ x))
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= q x y f: double_id_mor ((FF₁,, GG₂),, K)
  (# (functor_identity (pr1 CD)) f) ;;2 (λ x : pr1
                                                 CD,
                                         id_two_disp
                                           (FF₁ x))
                                          y =
trb₂ ((λ x : pr1 CD, id_two_disp (FF₁ x)) x ;;2 (#2 
                                                 (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                                 (pr12 CD)))
                                                 (double_id_mor
                                                 ((FF₁,,
                                                 FF₂),,
                                                 H)
                                                 f))
FF₂ x y f = GG₂ x y f

      
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
H: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)
GG₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
K: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, GG₂)
q: double_functor_hor_id_laws
  (λ x : pr1 CD, id_two_disp (FF₁ x))
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= q x y f: GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp (FF₁ y) =
trb₂ (id_two_disp (FF₁ x) ;;2 FF₂ x y f)
FF₂ x y f = GG₂ x y f

      
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
H: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)
GG₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
K: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, GG₂)
q: double_functor_hor_id_laws
  (λ x : pr1 CD, id_two_disp (FF₁ x))
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp (FF₁ y) =
trb₂ (trb₂ FF₂ x y f)
FF₂ x y f = GG₂ x y f

      
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
H: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)
GG₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
K: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, GG₂)
q: double_functor_hor_id_laws
  (λ x : pr1 CD, id_two_disp (FF₁ x))
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: trb₂ GG₂ x y f = trb₂ (trb₂ FF₂ x y f)
FF₂ x y f = GG₂ x y f

      
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
H: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)
GG₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
K: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, GG₂)
q: double_functor_hor_id_laws
  (λ x : pr1 CD, id_two_disp (FF₁ x))
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: trb₂ GG₂ x y f = trb₂ FF₂ x y f
FF₂ x y f = GG₂ x y f

      
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
H: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)
GG₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
K: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, GG₂)
q: double_functor_hor_id_laws
  (λ x : pr1 CD, id_two_disp (FF₁ x))
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: trb₂ GG₂ x y f = trb₂ FF₂ x y f
trf₂ (trb₂ GG₂ x y f) = GG₂ x y f

      
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y

GG₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y

  (λ x : pr1 CD, id_two_disp (FF₁ x))
