f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: trb₂ GG₂ x y f = trb₂ FF₂ x y f
trf₂ (trf₂ GG₂ x y f) = GG₂ x y f

      
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
H: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)
GG₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
K: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, GG₂)
q: double_functor_hor_id_laws
  (λ x : pr1 CD, id_two_disp (FF₁ x))
x, y: pr1 CD
f: pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: trb₂ GG₂ x y f = trb₂ FF₂ x y f
trf₂ GG₂ x y f = GG₂ x y f

      apply transportf_disp_mor2_idpath.
    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
H: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)
GG₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
K: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, GG₂)
isaprop (FF₂ = GG₂)
 
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
H: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)
GG₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
K: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, GG₂)
t, t0: pr1 CD
t1: pr1 CD ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
isaset
  ((λ t1 : pr1 CD ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
    FF₁ t -->[ t1 ][ t1] FF₁ t0) t1)

      apply isaset_disp_mor.
    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF₁: ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x
FF₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
H: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)
GG₂: ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧), FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y
K: hor_id_laws (FF₁,, GG₂)
isaprop
  (double_functor_hor_id_laws
     (λ x : pr1 CD, id_two_disp (FF₁ x)))
 apply isaprop_double_functor_hor_id_laws.
  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
(weq_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id FF GG
 ∘ weqtotal2
     (weqonsecfibers
        (λ x : pr1 CD,
         (pr11 FF) x =
         transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
           (idpath x)
           (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
              (idpath x) ((pr11 GG) x)))
        (λ x : pr1 CD,
         iso_twosided_disp (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (idtoiso (idpath x)) ((pr11 GG) x)
           ((pr11 FF) x))
        (λ x : pr1 CD,
         make_weq
           (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x)
              (idpath x))
           ((pr22 CD) x x x x (idpath x) (idpath x)
              ((pr11 GG) x) ((pr11 FF) x))
         ∘ weqpathsinv0 ((pr11 FF) x)
             (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                (idpath x)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                   (idpath x) ((pr11 GG) x))))
      ∘ weqtoforallpaths (λ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
          (pr11 FF)
          (λ x : pr1 CD,
           transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
             (idpath x)
             (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                (idpath x) ((pr11 GG) x))))
     ((λ pr1 : hor_id_data (pr12 CD),
       (λ (FF₁ : ∏ x : Preamble.pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
        (FF₂ : ∏ (x y : Preamble.pr1 CD)
               (f : Preamble.pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
               FF₁ x -->[ f ][ f] FF₁ y)
        (H : hor_id_laws (FF₁,, FF₂)),
        (λ pr2 : hor_id_data (pr12 CD),
         (λ (GG₁ : ∏ x : Preamble.pr1 CD,
                   (pr12 CD) x x)
          (GG₂ : ∏ (x y : Preamble.pr1 CD)
                 (f : Preamble.pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                 GG₁ x -->[ f ][ f] GG₁ y)
          (K : hor_id_laws (GG₁,, GG₂))
          (p : pr11 ((FF₁,, FF₂),, H) =
               (λ x : Preamble.pr1 CD,
                transportf (λ z : ..., ... z x)
                  (idpath x)
                  (transportf (...) (...) (...)))),
          let q := p : FF₁ = GG₁ in
          let X := idpath q in
          paths_rect
            (∏ x : Preamble.pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x) FF₁
            (λ (GG₁0 : ∏ x : ..., ... x x)
             (q0 : FF₁ = GG₁0),
             ∏ (GG₂0 : ∏ ... ..., ...)
             (K0 : hor_id_laws ...)
             (p0 : pr11 ... = ...),
             p0 = q0 → ... ≃ ...)
            (λ (GG₂0 : ∏ (x y : ...) (f : ...),
                       ... -->[ f ][ f] ...)
             (K0 : hor_id_laws (...))
             (p0 : pr11 (...) = (...))
             (X0 : p0 = idpath FF₁),
             internal_paths_rew_r (pr11 ... = ...) p0
               (idpath FF₁) (λ ..., ...) (... : ...)
               X0) GG₁ q GG₂ K p X) (Preamble.pr1 pr2)
           (Preamble.pr2 pr2)) (Preamble.pr1 GG)
          (pr2 GG)) (Preamble.pr1 pr1) (pr2 pr1))
        (pr1 FF) (pr2 FF))
 ∘ total2_paths_equiv
     (λ Im : ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x,
      ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      Im x -->[ f ][ f] Im y) (pr1 FF) (pr1 GG)
 ∘ path_sigma_hprop hor_id_laws FF GG
     (isaprop_hor_id_laws (pr1 GG)))%weq ~
disp_idtoiso_2_0 disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
  (idpath CD) FF GG
 
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
p: transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat,
   disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id z)
  (idpath CD) FF = GG
(weq_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id FF GG
 ∘ weqtotal2
     (weqonsecfibers
        (λ x : pr1 CD,
         (pr11 FF) x =
         transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
           (idpath x)
           (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
              (idpath x) ((pr11 GG) x)))
        (λ x : pr1 CD,
         iso_twosided_disp (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (idtoiso (idpath x)) ((pr11 GG) x)
           ((pr11 FF) x))
        (λ x : pr1 CD,
         make_weq
           (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x)
              (idpath x))
           ((pr22 CD) x x x x (idpath x) (idpath x)
              ((pr11 GG) x) ((pr11 FF) x))
         ∘ weqpathsinv0 ((pr11 FF) x)
             (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                (idpath x)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                   (idpath x) ((pr11 GG) x))))
      ∘ weqtoforallpaths (λ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
          (pr11 FF)
          (λ x : pr1 CD,
           transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
             (idpath x)
             (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                (idpath x) ((pr11 GG) x))))
     (λ p : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
            (λ x : pr1 CD,
             transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
               (idpath x)
               (transportf
                  (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                  (idpath x)
                  ((pr11 ((pr11 GG,, pr21 GG),, pr2 GG))
                     x))),
      let q := p in
      let X := idpath q in
      paths_rect (∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
        (pr11 FF)
        (λ (GG₁ : ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
         (q0 : pr11 FF = GG₁),
         ∏
         (GG₂ : ∏ (x y : pr1 CD)
                (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                GG₁ x -->[ f ][ f] GG₁ y)
         (K : hor_id_laws (GG₁,, GG₂))
         (p0 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
               (λ x : pr1 CD,
                transportf
                  (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                  (idpath x)
                  (transportf
                     (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                     (idpath x) ((pr11 (...,, K)) x)))),
         p0 = q0
         → transportf
             (λ x : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
              ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD)
              (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
              x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p0
             (pr21 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF)) =
           pr21 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)
           ≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
               (λ x : pr1 CD,
                pr1
                  ((weqonsecfibers (...) (...) (...)
                    ∘ weqtoforallpaths (...)
                        (pr11 ...) (...)) p0 x)))
        (λ (GG₂ : ∏ (x y : pr1 CD)
                  (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                  (pr11 FF) x -->[ f ][ f] (pr11 FF) y)
         (K : hor_id_laws (pr11 FF,, GG₂))
         (p0 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
               (λ x : pr1 CD,
                transportf
                  (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                  (idpath x)
                  (transportf
                     (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                     (idpath x) ((pr11 ((...),, K)) x))))
         (X0 : p0 = idpath (pr11 FF)),
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
            (λ x : pr1 CD,
             transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
               (idpath x)
               (transportf
                  (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                  (idpath x) ((pr11 (...,, K)) x))))
           p0 (idpath (pr11 FF))
           (λ p1 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
                   (λ x : pr1 CD,
                    transportf
                      (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                      (idpath x)
                      (transportf (λ z : ..., ... x z)
                         (idpath x) ((pr11 ...) x))),
            transportf
              (λ x : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
               ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD)
               (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
               x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p1
              (pr21 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF)) =
            pr21 ((pr11 FF,, GG₂),, K)
            ≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
                (λ x : pr1 CD,
                 pr1
                   ((weqonsecfibers ... ... ...
                     ∘ weqtoforallpaths ... ... ...)
                      p1 x)))
           (weqimplimpl
              (λ (q0 : pr21 FF = GG₂) (x y : pr1 CD)
               (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (∏ (x0 y0 : pr1 CD)
                  (f0 : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
                  (pr11 FF) x0 -->[ f0
                  ][ f0] (pr11 FF) y0) (pr21 FF) GG₂
                 (λ FF₂ : ∏ (x0 y0 : pr1 CD)
                          (f0 : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
                          (pr11 FF) x0 -->[ f0
                          ][ f0] (pr11 FF) y0,
                  GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp
                                  ((pr11 FF) y) =
                  trb₂ (id_two_disp (... x) ;;2 FF₂ x
                                                 y f))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    ((pr11 FF) x -->[ id₁ x · f
                     ][ id₁ x · f] (pr11 FF) y)
                    (id_two_disp ((pr11 FF) x) ;;2 
                     GG₂ x y f) (trb₂ GG₂ x y f)
                    (λ t : ... x -->[ ... · f
                           ][ ... · f] ... y,
                     GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp (...) =
                     trb₂ t)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (... x -->[ f · ...
                        ][ f · ...] ... y)
                       (GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp
                                        (...))
                       (trb₂ GG₂ x y f)
                       (λ t : ..., t = trb₂ ...)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                          (trb₂ ...) (trb₂ ...) (...)
                          (...) (...))
                       (id_two_disp_right (...)))
                    (id_two_disp_left (GG₂ x y f))) q0)
              (λ q0 : double_functor_hor_id_laws
                        (λ x : pr1 CD,
                         id_two_disp ((pr11 FF) x)),
               funextsec
                 (λ t : pr1 CD,
                  ∏ (y : pr1 CD)
                  (f : pr1 CD ⟦ t, y ⟧),
                  (pr11 FF) t -->[ f ][ f] (pr11 FF) y)
                 (pr21 FF) GG₂
                 (λ x : pr1 CD,
                  funextsec
                    (λ t : pr1 CD,
                     ∏ f : ..., ... -->[ f ][ f] ...)
                    ((pr21 FF) x) (GG₂ x)
                    (λ y : pr1 CD,
                     funextsec (...) (...) (...) (...))))
              (impred_isaset
                 (λ t : pr1 CD,
                  ∏ (y : pr1 CD)
                  (f : pr1 CD ⟦ t, y ⟧),
                  (pr11 FF) t -->[ f ][ f] (pr11 FF) y)
                 (λ t : pr1 CD,
                  impred_isaset
                    (λ t0 : pr1 CD,
                     ∏ f : ... ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                     ... t -->[ f ][ f] ... t0)
                    (λ t0 : pr1 CD,
                     impred_isaset (λ ..., ...)
                       (λ ..., ...))) (pr21 FF) GG₂)
              (isaprop_double_functor_hor_id_laws
                 (λ x : pr1 CD,
                  id_two_disp ((pr11 FF) x)))) X0)
        (pr11 GG) q (pr21 GG) (pr2 GG) p X)
 ∘ total2_paths_equiv
     (λ Im : ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x,
      ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      Im x -->[ f ][ f] Im y) (pr1 FF) (pr1 GG)
 ∘ path_sigma_hprop hor_id_laws FF GG
     (isaprop_hor_id_laws (pr1 GG)))%weq p =
disp_idtoiso_2_0 disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
  (idpath CD) FF GG p

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
p: FF = GG
(weq_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id FF GG
 ∘ weqtotal2
     (weqonsecfibers
        (λ x : pr1 CD,
         (pr11 FF) x =
         transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
           (idpath x)
           (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
              (idpath x) ((pr11 GG) x)))
        (λ x : pr1 CD,
         iso_twosided_disp (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (idtoiso (idpath x)) ((pr11 GG) x)
           ((pr11 FF) x))
        (λ x : pr1 CD,
         make_weq
           (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x)
              (idpath x))
           ((pr22 CD) x x x x (idpath x) (idpath x)
              ((pr11 GG) x) ((pr11 FF) x))
         ∘ weqpathsinv0 ((pr11 FF) x)
             (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                (idpath x)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                   (idpath x) ((pr11 GG) x))))
      ∘ weqtoforallpaths (λ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
          (pr11 FF)
          (λ x : pr1 CD,
           transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
             (idpath x)
             (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                (idpath x) ((pr11 GG) x))))
     (λ p : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
            (λ x : pr1 CD,
             transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
               (idpath x)
               (transportf
                  (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                  (idpath x)
                  ((pr11 ((pr11 GG,, pr21 GG),, pr2 GG))
                     x))),
      let q := p in
      let X := idpath q in
      paths_rect (∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
        (pr11 FF)
        (λ (GG₁ : ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
         (q0 : pr11 FF = GG₁),
         ∏
         (GG₂ : ∏ (x y : pr1 CD)
                (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                GG₁ x -->[ f ][ f] GG₁ y)
         (K : hor_id_laws (GG₁,, GG₂))
         (p0 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
               (λ x : pr1 CD,
                transportf
                  (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                  (idpath x)
                  (transportf
                     (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                     (idpath x) ((pr11 (...,, K)) x)))),
         p0 = q0
         → transportf
             (λ x : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
              ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD)
              (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
              x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p0
             (pr21 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF)) =
           pr21 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)
           ≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
               (λ x : pr1 CD,
                pr1
                  ((weqonsecfibers (...) (...) (...)
                    ∘ weqtoforallpaths (...)
                        (pr11 ...) (...)) p0 x)))
        (λ (GG₂ : ∏ (x y : pr1 CD)
                  (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                  (pr11 FF) x -->[ f ][ f] (pr11 FF) y)
         (K : hor_id_laws (pr11 FF,, GG₂))
         (p0 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
               (λ x : pr1 CD,
                transportf
                  (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                  (idpath x)
                  (transportf
                     (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                     (idpath x) ((pr11 ((...),, K)) x))))
         (X0 : p0 = idpath (pr11 FF)),
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
            (λ x : pr1 CD,
             transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
               (idpath x)
               (transportf
                  (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                  (idpath x) ((pr11 (...,, K)) x))))
           p0 (idpath (pr11 FF))
           (λ p1 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
                   (λ x : pr1 CD,
                    transportf
                      (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                      (idpath x)
                      (transportf (λ z : ..., ... x z)
                         (idpath x) ((pr11 ...) x))),
            transportf
              (λ x : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
               ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD)
               (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
               x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p1
              (pr21 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF)) =
            pr21 ((pr11 FF,, GG₂),, K)
            ≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
                (λ x : pr1 CD,
                 pr1
                   ((weqonsecfibers ... ... ...
                     ∘ weqtoforallpaths ... ... ...)
                      p1 x)))
           (weqimplimpl
              (λ (q0 : pr21 FF = GG₂) (x y : pr1 CD)
               (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (∏ (x0 y0 : pr1 CD)
                  (f0 : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
                  (pr11 FF) x0 -->[ f0
                  ][ f0] (pr11 FF) y0) (pr21 FF) GG₂
                 (λ FF₂ : ∏ (x0 y0 : pr1 CD)
                          (f0 : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
                          (pr11 FF) x0 -->[ f0
                          ][ f0] (pr11 FF) y0,
                  GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp
                                  ((pr11 FF) y) =
                  trb₂ (id_two_disp (... x) ;;2 FF₂ x
                                                 y f))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    ((pr11 FF) x -->[ id₁ x · f
                     ][ id₁ x · f] (pr11 FF) y)
                    (id_two_disp ((pr11 FF) x) ;;2 
                     GG₂ x y f) (trb₂ GG₂ x y f)
                    (λ t : ... x -->[ ... · f
                           ][ ... · f] ... y,
                     GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp (...) =
                     trb₂ t)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (... x -->[ f · ...
                        ][ f · ...] ... y)
                       (GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp
                                        (...))
                       (trb₂ GG₂ x y f)
                       (λ t : ..., t = trb₂ ...)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                          (trb₂ ...) (trb₂ ...) (...)
                          (...) (...))
                       (id_two_disp_right (...)))
                    (id_two_disp_left (GG₂ x y f))) q0)
              (λ q0 : double_functor_hor_id_laws
                        (λ x : pr1 CD,
                         id_two_disp ((pr11 FF) x)),
               funextsec
                 (λ t : pr1 CD,
                  ∏ (y : pr1 CD)
                  (f : pr1 CD ⟦ t, y ⟧),
                  (pr11 FF) t -->[ f ][ f] (pr11 FF) y)
                 (pr21 FF) GG₂
                 (λ x : pr1 CD,
                  funextsec
                    (λ t : pr1 CD,
                     ∏ f : ..., ... -->[ f ][ f] ...)
                    ((pr21 FF) x) (GG₂ x)
                    (λ y : pr1 CD,
                     funextsec (...) (...) (...) (...))))
              (impred_isaset
                 (λ t : pr1 CD,
                  ∏ (y : pr1 CD)
                  (f : pr1 CD ⟦ t, y ⟧),
                  (pr11 FF) t -->[ f ][ f] (pr11 FF) y)
                 (λ t : pr1 CD,
                  impred_isaset
                    (λ t0 : pr1 CD,
                     ∏ f : ... ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                     ... t -->[ f ][ f] ... t0)
                    (λ t0 : pr1 CD,
                     impred_isaset (λ ..., ...)
                       (λ ..., ...))) (pr21 FF) GG₂)
              (isaprop_double_functor_hor_id_laws
                 (λ x : pr1 CD,
                  id_two_disp ((pr11 FF) x)))) X0)
        (pr11 GG) q (pr21 GG) (pr2 GG) p X)
 ∘ total2_paths_equiv
     (λ Im : ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x,
      ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      Im x -->[ f ][ f] Im y) (pr1 FF) (pr1 GG)
 ∘ path_sigma_hprop hor_id_laws FF GG
     (isaprop_hor_id_laws (pr1 GG)))%weq p =
disp_idtoiso_2_0 disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
  (idpath CD) FF GG p

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
(weq_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id FF FF
 ∘ weqtotal2
     (weqonsecfibers
        (λ x : pr1 CD,
         (pr11 FF) x =
         transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
           (idpath x)
           (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
              (idpath x) ((pr11 FF) x)))
        (λ x : pr1 CD,
         iso_twosided_disp (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (idtoiso (idpath x)) ((pr11 FF) x)
           ((pr11 FF) x))
        (λ x : pr1 CD,
         make_weq
           (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x)
              (idpath x))
           ((pr22 CD) x x x x (idpath x) (idpath x)
              ((pr11 FF) x) ((pr11 FF) x))
         ∘ weqpathsinv0 ((pr11 FF) x)
             (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                (idpath x)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                   (idpath x) ((pr11 FF) x))))
      ∘ weqtoforallpaths (λ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
          (pr11 FF)
          (λ x : pr1 CD,
           transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
             (idpath x)
             (transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                (idpath x) ((pr11 FF) x))))
     (λ p : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
            (λ x : pr1 CD,
             transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
               (idpath x)
               (transportf
                  (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                  (idpath x)
                  ((pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF))
                     x))),
      let q := p in
      let X := idpath q in
      paths_rect (∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
        (pr11 FF)
        (λ (GG₁ : ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
         (q0 : pr11 FF = GG₁),
         ∏
         (GG₂ : ∏ (x y : pr1 CD)
                (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                GG₁ x -->[ f ][ f] GG₁ y)
         (K : hor_id_laws (GG₁,, GG₂))
         (p0 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
               (λ x : pr1 CD,
                transportf
                  (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                  (idpath x)
                  (transportf
                     (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                     (idpath x) ((pr11 (...,, K)) x)))),
         p0 = q0
         → transportf
             (λ x : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
              ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD)
              (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
              x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p0
             (pr21 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF)) =
           pr21 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)
           ≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
               (λ x : pr1 CD,
                pr1
                  ((weqonsecfibers (...) (...) (...)
                    ∘ weqtoforallpaths (...)
                        (pr11 ...) (...)) p0 x)))
        (λ (GG₂ : ∏ (x y : pr1 CD)
                  (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                  (pr11 FF) x -->[ f ][ f] (pr11 FF) y)
         (K : hor_id_laws (pr11 FF,, GG₂))
         (p0 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
               (λ x : pr1 CD,
                transportf
                  (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                  (idpath x)
                  (transportf
                     (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                     (idpath x) ((pr11 ((...),, K)) x))))
         (X0 : p0 = idpath (pr11 FF)),
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
            (λ x : pr1 CD,
             transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
               (idpath x)
               (transportf
                  (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                  (idpath x) ((pr11 (...,, K)) x))))
           p0 (idpath (pr11 FF))
           (λ p1 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
                   (λ x : pr1 CD,
                    transportf
                      (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                      (idpath x)
                      (transportf (λ z : ..., ... x z)
                         (idpath x) ((pr11 ...) x))),
            transportf
              (λ x : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
               ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD)
               (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
               x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p1
              (pr21 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF)) =
            pr21 ((pr11 FF,, GG₂),, K)
            ≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
                (λ x : pr1 CD,
                 pr1
                   ((weqonsecfibers ... ... ...
                     ∘ weqtoforallpaths ... ... ...)
                      p1 x)))
           (weqimplimpl
              (λ (q0 : pr21 FF = GG₂) (x y : pr1 CD)
               (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (∏ (x0 y0 : pr1 CD)
                  (f0 : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
                  (pr11 FF) x0 -->[ f0
                  ][ f0] (pr11 FF) y0) (pr21 FF) GG₂
                 (λ FF₂ : ∏ (x0 y0 : pr1 CD)
                          (f0 : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
                          (pr11 FF) x0 -->[ f0
                          ][ f0] (pr11 FF) y0,
                  GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp
                                  ((pr11 FF) y) =
                  trb₂ (id_two_disp (... x) ;;2 FF₂ x
                                                 y f))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    ((pr11 FF) x -->[ id₁ x · f
                     ][ id₁ x · f] (pr11 FF) y)
                    (id_two_disp ((pr11 FF) x) ;;2 
                     GG₂ x y f) (trb₂ GG₂ x y f)
                    (λ t : ... x -->[ ... · f
                           ][ ... · f] ... y,
                     GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp (...) =
                     trb₂ t)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (... x -->[ f · ...
                        ][ f · ...] ... y)
                       (GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp
                                        (...))
                       (trb₂ GG₂ x y f)
                       (λ t : ..., t = trb₂ ...)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                          (trb₂ ...) (trb₂ ...) (...)
                          (...) (...))
                       (id_two_disp_right (...)))
                    (id_two_disp_left (GG₂ x y f))) q0)
              (λ q0 : double_functor_hor_id_laws
                        (λ x : pr1 CD,
                         id_two_disp ((pr11 FF) x)),
               funextsec
                 (λ t : pr1 CD,
                  ∏ (y : pr1 CD)
                  (f : pr1 CD ⟦ t, y ⟧),
                  (pr11 FF) t -->[ f ][ f] (pr11 FF) y)
                 (pr21 FF) GG₂
                 (λ x : pr1 CD,
                  funextsec
                    (λ t : pr1 CD,
                     ∏ f : ..., ... -->[ f ][ f] ...)
                    ((pr21 FF) x) (GG₂ x)
                    (λ y : pr1 CD,
                     funextsec (...) (...) (...) (...))))
              (impred_isaset
                 (λ t : pr1 CD,
                  ∏ (y : pr1 CD)
                  (f : pr1 CD ⟦ t, y ⟧),
                  (pr11 FF) t -->[ f ][ f] (pr11 FF) y)
                 (λ t : pr1 CD,
                  impred_isaset
                    (λ t0 : pr1 CD,
                     ∏ f : ... ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
                     ... t -->[ f ][ f] ... t0)
                    (λ t0 : pr1 CD,
                     impred_isaset (λ ..., ...)
                       (λ ..., ...))) (pr21 FF) GG₂)
              (isaprop_double_functor_hor_id_laws
                 (λ x : pr1 CD,
                  id_two_disp ((pr11 FF) x)))) X0)
        (pr11 FF) q (pr21 FF) (pr2 FF) p X)
 ∘ total2_paths_equiv
     (λ Im : ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x,
      ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      Im x -->[ f ][ f] Im y) (pr1 FF) (pr1 FF)
 ∘ path_sigma_hprop hor_id_laws FF FF
     (isaprop_hor_id_laws (pr1 FF)))%weq (idpath FF) =
disp_idtoiso_2_0 disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
  (idpath CD) FF FF (idpath FF)

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
isPredicate
  (disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
     (idtoiso_2_0 CD CD (idpath CD)))
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
pr1
  ((weq_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id FF FF
    ∘ weqtotal2
        (weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : pr1 CD,
            (pr11 FF) x =
            transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
              (idpath x)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                 (idpath x) ((pr11 FF) x)))
           (λ x : pr1 CD,
            iso_twosided_disp (idtoiso (idpath x))
              (idtoiso (idpath x)) ((pr11 FF) x)
              ((pr11 FF) x))
           (λ x : pr1 CD,
            make_weq
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x)
                 (idpath x))
              ((pr22 CD) x x x x (idpath x) (idpath x)
                 ((pr11 FF) x) ((pr11 FF) x))
            ∘ weqpathsinv0 ((pr11 FF) x)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                   (idpath x)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                      (idpath x) ((pr11 FF) x))))
         ∘ weqtoforallpaths
             (λ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x) (pr11 FF)
             (λ x : pr1 CD,
              transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                (idpath x)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                   (idpath x) ((pr11 FF) x))))
        (λ p : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
               (λ x : pr1 CD,
                transportf
                  (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                  (idpath x)
                  (transportf
                     (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                     (idpath x)
                     ((pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),,
                             pr2 FF)) x))),
         let q := p in
         let X := idpath q in
         paths_rect (∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
           (pr11 FF)
           (λ (GG₁ : ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
            (q0 : pr11 FF = GG₁),
            ∏
            (GG₂ : ∏ (x y : pr1 CD)
                   (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                   GG₁ x -->[ f ][ f] GG₁ y)
            (K : hor_id_laws (GG₁,, GG₂))
            (p0 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
                  (λ x : pr1 CD,
                   transportf
                     (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                     (idpath x)
                     (transportf (λ z : ..., ... x z)
                        (idpath x) ((pr11 ...) x)))),
            p0 = q0
            → transportf
                (λ x : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
                 ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD)
                 (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
                 x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p0
                (pr21 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF)) =
              pr21 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)
              ≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
                  (λ x : pr1 CD,
                   pr1 ((... ∘ ...) p0 x)))
           (λ (GG₂ : ∏ (x y : pr1 CD)
                     (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                     (pr11 FF) x -->[ f
                     ][ f] (pr11 FF) y)
            (K : hor_id_laws (pr11 FF,, GG₂))
            (p0 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
                  (λ x : pr1 CD,
                   transportf
                     (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                     (idpath x)
                     (transportf
                        (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                        (idpath x) ((pr11 (...)) x))))
            (X0 : p0 = idpath (pr11 FF)),
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
               (λ x : pr1 CD,
                transportf
                  (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                  (idpath x)
                  (transportf (λ z : ..., ... x z)
                     (idpath x) ((pr11 ...) x)))) p0
              (idpath (pr11 FF))
              (λ p1 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),,
                            pr2 FF) =
                      (λ x : pr1 CD,
                       transportf (λ z : ..., ... z x)
                         (idpath x)
                         (transportf (...) (...) (...))),
               transportf
                 (λ x : ∏ t : ..., ... t t,
                  ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD)
                  (f : ... ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
                  x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p1
                 (pr21 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF)) =
               pr21 ((pr11 FF,, GG₂),, K)
               ≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
                   (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 ((...) p1 x)))
              (weqimplimpl
                 (λ (q0 : pr21 FF = GG₂)
                  (x y : pr1 CD)
                  (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                  internal_paths_rew_r
                    (∏ (x0 y0 : pr1 CD)
                     (f0 : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
                     (pr11 FF) x0 -->[ f0
                     ][ f0] (pr11 FF) y0) (pr21 FF)
                    GG₂
                    (λ FF₂ : ∏ (x0 y0 : ...)
                             (f0 : ...),
                             ... -->[ f0 ][ f0] ...,
                     GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp (...) =
                     trb₂ (id_two_disp ... ;;2 FF₂ x y
                                                 f))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (... x -->[ ... · f
                        ][ ... · f] ... y)
                       (id_two_disp (...) ;;2 GG₂ x y
                                                f)
                       (trb₂ GG₂ x y f)
                       (λ t : ...,
                        ... ;;2 ... = trb₂ t)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                          (... ;;2 ...) (trb₂ ...)
                          (...) (...) (...))
                       (id_two_disp_left (...))) q0)
                 (λ q0 : double_functor_hor_id_laws
                           (λ x : pr1 CD,
                            id_two_disp (...)),
                  funextsec
                    (λ t : pr1 CD,
                     ∏ (y : pr1 CD)
                     (f : ... ⟦ t, y ⟧),
                     ... t -->[ f ][ f] ... y)
                    (pr21 FF) GG₂
                    (λ x : pr1 CD,
                     funextsec (λ ..., ...) (... x)
                       (GG₂ x) (λ ..., ...)))
                 (impred_isaset
                    (λ t : pr1 CD,
                     ∏ (y : pr1 CD)
                     (f : pr1 CD ⟦ t, y ⟧),
                     (pr11 FF) t -->[ f
                     ][ f] (pr11 FF) y)
                    (λ t : pr1 CD,
                     impred_isaset
                       (λ t0 : ..., ∏ ..., ...)
                       (λ t0 : ...,
                        impred_isaset ... ...))
                    (pr21 FF) GG₂)
                 (isaprop_double_functor_hor_id_laws
                    (λ x : pr1 CD,
                     id_two_disp ((pr11 FF) x)))) X0)
           (pr11 FF) q (pr21 FF) (pr2 FF) p X)
    ∘ total2_paths_equiv
        (λ Im : ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x,
         ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
         Im x -->[ f ][ f] Im y) (pr1 FF) (pr1 FF)
    ∘ path_sigma_hprop hor_id_laws FF FF
        (isaprop_hor_id_laws (pr1 FF)))%weq
     (idpath FF)) =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_0
     disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id (idpath CD)
     FF FF (idpath FF))

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
isPredicate
  (disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
     (idtoiso_2_0 CD CD (idpath CD)))

      
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
x: FF -->[ idtoiso_2_0 CD CD (idpath CD)] FF
isaprop
  (disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
     (idtoiso_2_0 CD CD (idpath CD)) x)

      
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
x: FF -->[ idtoiso_2_0 CD CD (idpath CD)] FF
is_univalent_2_1 bicat_twosided_disp_cat
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
x: FF -->[ idtoiso_2_0 CD CD (idpath CD)] FF
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id

      
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
x: FF -->[ idtoiso_2_0 CD CD (idpath CD)] FF
is_univalent_2_1 bicat_twosided_disp_cat
 apply is_univalent_2_1_bicat_twosided_disp_cat.
      
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
x: FF -->[ idtoiso_2_0 CD CD (idpath CD)] FF
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
 apply disp_univalent_2_1_disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id.
    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
pr1
  ((weq_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id FF FF
    ∘ weqtotal2
        (weqonsecfibers
           (λ x : pr1 CD,
            (pr11 FF) x =
            transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
              (idpath x)
              (transportf
                 (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                 (idpath x) ((pr11 FF) x)))
           (λ x : pr1 CD,
            iso_twosided_disp (idtoiso (idpath x))
              (idtoiso (idpath x)) ((pr11 FF) x)
              ((pr11 FF) x))
           (λ x : pr1 CD,
            make_weq
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x)
                 (idpath x))
              ((pr22 CD) x x x x (idpath x) (idpath x)
                 ((pr11 FF) x) ((pr11 FF) x))
            ∘ weqpathsinv0 ((pr11 FF) x)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                   (idpath x)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                      (idpath x) ((pr11 FF) x))))
         ∘ weqtoforallpaths
             (λ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x) (pr11 FF)
             (λ x : pr1 CD,
              transportf (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                (idpath x)
                (transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                   (idpath x) ((pr11 FF) x))))
        (λ p : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
               (λ x : pr1 CD,
                transportf
                  (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                  (idpath x)
                  (transportf
                     (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                     (idpath x)
                     ((pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),,
                             pr2 FF)) x))),
         let q := p in
         let X := idpath q in
         paths_rect (∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
           (pr11 FF)
           (λ (GG₁ : ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
            (q0 : pr11 FF = GG₁),
            ∏
            (GG₂ : ∏ (x y : pr1 CD)
                   (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                   GG₁ x -->[ f ][ f] GG₁ y)
            (K : hor_id_laws (GG₁,, GG₂))
            (p0 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
                  (λ x : pr1 CD,
                   transportf
                     (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                     (idpath x)
                     (transportf (λ z : ..., ... x z)
                        (idpath x) ((pr11 ...) x)))),
            p0 = q0
            → transportf
                (λ x : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
                 ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD)
                 (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
                 x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p0
                (pr21 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF)) =
              pr21 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)
              ≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
                  (λ x : pr1 CD,
                   pr1 ((... ∘ ...) p0 x)))
           (λ (GG₂ : ∏ (x y : pr1 CD)
                     (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                     (pr11 FF) x -->[ f
                     ][ f] (pr11 FF) y)
            (K : hor_id_laws (pr11 FF,, GG₂))
            (p0 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
                  (λ x : pr1 CD,
                   transportf
                     (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                     (idpath x)
                     (transportf
                        (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                        (idpath x) ((pr11 (...)) x))))
            (X0 : p0 = idpath (pr11 FF)),
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
               (λ x : pr1 CD,
                transportf
                  (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                  (idpath x)
                  (transportf (λ z : ..., ... x z)
                     (idpath x) ((pr11 ...) x)))) p0
              (idpath (pr11 FF))
              (λ p1 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),,
                            pr2 FF) =
                      (λ x : pr1 CD,
                       transportf (λ z : ..., ... z x)
                         (idpath x)
                         (transportf (...) (...) (...))),
               transportf
                 (λ x : ∏ t : ..., ... t t,
                  ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD)
                  (f : ... ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
                  x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p1
                 (pr21 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF)) =
               pr21 ((pr11 FF,, GG₂),, K)
               ≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
                   (λ x : pr1 CD, pr1 ((...) p1 x)))
              (weqimplimpl
                 (λ (q0 : pr21 FF = GG₂)
                  (x y : pr1 CD)
                  (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                  internal_paths_rew_r
                    (∏ (x0 y0 : pr1 CD)
                     (f0 : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
                     (pr11 FF) x0 -->[ f0
                     ][ f0] (pr11 FF) y0) (pr21 FF)
                    GG₂
                    (λ FF₂ : ∏ (x0 y0 : ...)
                             (f0 : ...),
                             ... -->[ f0 ][ f0] ...,
                     GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp (...) =
                     trb₂ (id_two_disp ... ;;2 FF₂ x y
                                                 f))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (... x -->[ ... · f
                        ][ ... · f] ... y)
                       (id_two_disp (...) ;;2 GG₂ x y
                                                f)
                       (trb₂ GG₂ x y f)
                       (λ t : ...,
                        ... ;;2 ... = trb₂ t)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                          (... ;;2 ...) (trb₂ ...)
                          (...) (...) (...))
                       (id_two_disp_left (...))) q0)
                 (λ q0 : double_functor_hor_id_laws
                           (λ x : pr1 CD,
                            id_two_disp (...)),
                  funextsec
                    (λ t : pr1 CD,
                     ∏ (y : pr1 CD)
                     (f : ... ⟦ t, y ⟧),
                     ... t -->[ f ][ f] ... y)
                    (pr21 FF) GG₂
                    (λ x : pr1 CD,
                     funextsec (λ ..., ...) (... x)
                       (GG₂ x) (λ ..., ...)))
                 (impred_isaset
                    (λ t : pr1 CD,
                     ∏ (y : pr1 CD)
                     (f : pr1 CD ⟦ t, y ⟧),
                     (pr11 FF) t -->[ f
                     ][ f] (pr11 FF) y)
                    (λ t : pr1 CD,
                     impred_isaset
                       (λ t0 : ..., ∏ ..., ...)
                       (λ t0 : ...,
                        impred_isaset ... ...))
                    (pr21 FF) GG₂)
                 (isaprop_double_functor_hor_id_laws
                    (λ x : pr1 CD,
                     id_two_disp ((pr11 FF) x)))) X0)
           (pr11 FF) q (pr21 FF) (pr2 FF) p X)
    ∘ total2_paths_equiv
        (λ Im : ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x,
         ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
         Im x -->[ f ][ f] Im y) (pr1 FF) (pr1 FF)
    ∘ path_sigma_hprop hor_id_laws FF FF
        (isaprop_hor_id_laws (pr1 FF)))%weq
     (idpath FF)) =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_0
     disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id (idpath CD)
     FF FF (idpath FF))

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
isPredicate double_functor_hor_id_laws
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
pr11 ((weq_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id FF FF
       ∘ weqtotal2
           (weqonsecfibers
              (λ x : pr1 CD,
               (pr11 FF) x =
               transportf
                 (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                 (idpath x)
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                    (idpath x) ((pr11 FF) x)))
              (λ x : pr1 CD,
               iso_twosided_disp (idtoiso (idpath x))
                 (idtoiso (idpath x)) ((pr11 FF) x)
                 ((pr11 FF) x))
              (λ x : pr1 CD,
               make_weq
                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x)
                    (idpath x))
                 ((pr22 CD) x x x x (idpath x)
                    (idpath x) ((pr11 FF) x)
                    ((pr11 FF) x))
               ∘ weqpathsinv0 ((pr11 FF) x)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                      (idpath x)
                      (transportf
                         (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                         (idpath x) ((pr11 FF) x))))
            ∘ weqtoforallpaths
                (λ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
                (pr11 FF)
                (λ x : pr1 CD,
                 transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                   (idpath x)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                      (idpath x) ((pr11 FF) x))))
           (λ p : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
                  (λ x : pr1 CD,
                   transportf
                     (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                     (idpath x)
                     (transportf
                        (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                        (idpath x)
                        ((pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),,
                                pr2 FF)) x))),
            let q := p in
            let X := idpath q in
            paths_rect (∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
              (pr11 FF)
              (λ (GG₁ : ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
               (q0 : pr11 FF = GG₁),
               ∏
               (GG₂ : ∏ (x y : pr1 CD)
                      (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                      GG₁ x -->[ f ][ f] GG₁ y)
               (K : hor_id_laws (GG₁,, GG₂))
               (p0 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),,
                           pr2 FF) =
                     (λ x : pr1 CD,
                      transportf
                        (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                        (idpath x)
                        (transportf
                           (λ z : pr1 CD,
                            (pr12 CD) x z) (idpath x)
                           ((pr11 (...)) x)))),
               p0 = q0
               → transportf
                   (λ x : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
                    ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD)
                    (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
                    x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p0
                   (pr21 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF)) =
                 pr21 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)
                 ≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
                     (λ x : pr1 CD,
                      pr1
                        ((weqonsecfibers ... ... ...
                          ∘ weqtoforallpaths ... ...
                              ...) p0 x)))
              (λ (GG₂ : ∏ (x y : pr1 CD)
                        (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                        (pr11 FF) x -->[ f
                        ][ f] (pr11 FF) y)
               (K : hor_id_laws (pr11 FF,, GG₂))
               (p0 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),,
                           pr2 FF) =
                     (λ x : pr1 CD,
                      transportf
                        (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                        (idpath x)
                        (transportf
                           (λ z : pr1 CD,
                            (pr12 CD) x z) (idpath x)
                           ((pr11 (...,, K)) x))))
               (X0 : p0 = idpath (pr11 FF)),
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
                  (λ x : pr1 CD,
                   transportf
                     (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                     (idpath x)
                     (transportf
                        (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                        (idpath x) ((pr11 (...)) x))))
                 p0 (idpath (pr11 FF))
                 (λ p1 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),,
                               pr2 FF) =
                         (λ x : pr1 CD,
                          transportf
                            (λ z : pr1 CD,
                             (pr12 CD) z x) (idpath x)
                            (transportf (λ ..., ...)
                               (idpath x) (... x))),
                  transportf
                    (λ x : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
                     ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD)
                     (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
                     x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p1
                    (pr21 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),,
                           pr2 FF)) =
                  pr21 ((pr11 FF,, GG₂),, K)
                  ≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
                      (λ x : pr1 CD,
                       pr1 ((... ∘ ...) p1 x)))
                 (weqimplimpl
                    (λ (q0 : pr21 FF = GG₂)
                     (x y : pr1 CD)
                     (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                     internal_paths_rew_r
                       (∏ (x0 y0 : pr1 CD)
                        (f0 : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
                        (pr11 FF) x0 -->[ f0
                        ][ f0] (pr11 FF) y0) (pr21 FF)
                       GG₂
                       (λ FF₂ : ∏ (x0 y0 : pr1 CD)
                                (f0 : ... ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
                                ... x0 -->[ f0
                                ][ f0] ... y0,
                        GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp
                                        (... y) =
                        trb₂ (id_two_disp (...) ;;2 
                              FF₂ x y f))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          ((pr11 FF) x -->[ id₁ x · f
                           ][ id₁ x · f] (pr11 FF) y)
                          (id_two_disp (... x) ;;2 
                           GG₂ x y f) (trb₂ GG₂ x y f)
                          (λ t : ... -->[ ...
                                 ][ ...] ...,
                           GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp
                                           ... =
                           trb₂ t)
                          (internal_paths_rew_r
                             (... -->[ ... ][ ...] ...)
                             (GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp
                                              ...)
                             (trb₂ GG₂ x y f)
                             (λ ..., ...)
                             (internal_paths_rew_r ...
                                ... ... ... ... ...)
                             (id_two_disp_right ...))
                          (id_two_disp_left
                             (GG₂ x y f))) q0)
                    (λ q0 : double_functor_hor_id_laws
                              (λ x : pr1 CD,
                               id_two_disp (... x)),
                     funextsec
                       (λ t : pr1 CD,
                        ∏ (y : pr1 CD)
                        (f : pr1 CD ⟦ t, y ⟧),
                        (pr11 FF) t -->[ f
                        ][ f] (pr11 FF) y) (pr21 FF)
                       GG₂
                       (λ x : pr1 CD,
                        funextsec
                          (λ t : ..., ∏ ..., ...)
                          ((pr21 FF) x) (GG₂ x)
                          (λ y : ...,
                           funextsec ... ... ... ...)))
                    (impred_isaset
                       (λ t : pr1 CD,
                        ∏ (y : pr1 CD)
                        (f : pr1 CD ⟦ t, y ⟧),
                        (pr11 FF) t -->[ f
                        ][ f] (pr11 FF) y)
                       (λ t : pr1 CD,
                        impred_isaset
                          (λ t0 : pr1 CD,
                           ∏ f : ...,
                           ... -->[ f ][ f] ...)
                          (λ t0 : pr1 CD,
                           impred_isaset (...) (...)))
                       (pr21 FF) GG₂)
                    (isaprop_double_functor_hor_id_laws
                       (λ x : pr1 CD,
                        id_two_disp ((pr11 FF) x))))
                 X0) (pr11 FF) q (pr21 FF) (pr2 FF) p
              X)
       ∘ total2_paths_equiv
           (λ Im : ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x,
            ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
            Im x -->[ f ][ f] Im y) (pr1 FF) (pr1 FF)
       ∘ path_sigma_hprop hor_id_laws FF FF
           (isaprop_hor_id_laws (pr1 FF)))%weq
        (idpath FF)) =
pr11 (disp_idtoiso_2_0
        disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
        (idpath CD) FF FF (idpath FF))

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
isPredicate double_functor_hor_id_laws

      
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
x: double_functor_hor_id_data
  (pr2 (idtoiso_2_0 CD CD (idpath CD))) FF FF
isaprop (double_functor_hor_id_laws x)

      apply isaprop_double_functor_hor_id_laws.
    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
pr11 ((weq_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id FF FF
       ∘ weqtotal2
           (weqonsecfibers
              (λ x : pr1 CD,
               (pr11 FF) x =
               transportf
                 (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                 (idpath x)
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                    (idpath x) ((pr11 FF) x)))
              (λ x : pr1 CD,
               iso_twosided_disp (idtoiso (idpath x))
                 (idtoiso (idpath x)) ((pr11 FF) x)
                 ((pr11 FF) x))
              (λ x : pr1 CD,
               make_weq
                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x)
                    (idpath x))
                 ((pr22 CD) x x x x (idpath x)
                    (idpath x) ((pr11 FF) x)
                    ((pr11 FF) x))
               ∘ weqpathsinv0 ((pr11 FF) x)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                      (idpath x)
                      (transportf
                         (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                         (idpath x) ((pr11 FF) x))))
            ∘ weqtoforallpaths
                (λ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
                (pr11 FF)
                (λ x : pr1 CD,
                 transportf
                   (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                   (idpath x)
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                      (idpath x) ((pr11 FF) x))))
           (λ p : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
                  (λ x : pr1 CD,
                   transportf
                     (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                     (idpath x)
                     (transportf
                        (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                        (idpath x)
                        ((pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),,
                                pr2 FF)) x))),
            let q := p in
            let X := idpath q in
            paths_rect (∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
              (pr11 FF)
              (λ (GG₁ : ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x)
               (q0 : pr11 FF = GG₁),
               ∏
               (GG₂ : ∏ (x y : pr1 CD)
                      (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                      GG₁ x -->[ f ][ f] GG₁ y)
               (K : hor_id_laws (GG₁,, GG₂))
               (p0 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),,
                           pr2 FF) =
                     (λ x : pr1 CD,
                      transportf
                        (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                        (idpath x)
                        (transportf
                           (λ z : pr1 CD,
                            (pr12 CD) x z) (idpath x)
                           ((pr11 (...)) x)))),
               p0 = q0
               → transportf
                   (λ x : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
                    ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD)
                    (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
                    x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p0
                   (pr21 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF)) =
                 pr21 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)
                 ≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
                     (λ x : pr1 CD,
                      pr1
                        ((weqonsecfibers ... ... ...
                          ∘ weqtoforallpaths ... ...
                              ...) p0 x)))
              (λ (GG₂ : ∏ (x y : pr1 CD)
                        (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                        (pr11 FF) x -->[ f
                        ][ f] (pr11 FF) y)
               (K : hor_id_laws (pr11 FF,, GG₂))
               (p0 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),,
                           pr2 FF) =
                     (λ x : pr1 CD,
                      transportf
                        (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                        (idpath x)
                        (transportf
                           (λ z : pr1 CD,
                            (pr12 CD) x z) (idpath x)
                           ((pr11 (...,, K)) x))))
               (X0 : p0 = idpath (pr11 FF)),
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF) =
                  (λ x : pr1 CD,
                   transportf
                     (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) z x)
                     (idpath x)
                     (transportf
                        (λ z : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x z)
                        (idpath x) ((pr11 (...)) x))))
                 p0 (idpath (pr11 FF))
                 (λ p1 : pr11 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),,
                               pr2 FF) =
                         (λ x : pr1 CD,
                          transportf
                            (λ z : pr1 CD,
                             (pr12 CD) z x) (idpath x)
                            (transportf (λ ..., ...)
                               (idpath x) (... x))),
                  transportf
                    (λ x : ∏ t : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) t t,
                     ∏ (x0 y : pr1 CD)
                     (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
                     x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) p1
                    (pr21 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),,
                           pr2 FF)) =
                  pr21 ((pr11 FF,, GG₂),, K)
                  ≃ double_functor_hor_id_laws
                      (λ x : pr1 CD,
                       pr1 ((... ∘ ...) p1 x)))
                 (weqimplimpl
                    (λ (q0 : pr21 FF = GG₂)
                     (x y : pr1 CD)
                     (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
                     internal_paths_rew_r
                       (∏ (x0 y0 : pr1 CD)
                        (f0 : pr1 CD ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
                        (pr11 FF) x0 -->[ f0
                        ][ f0] (pr11 FF) y0) (pr21 FF)
                       GG₂
                       (λ FF₂ : ∏ (x0 y0 : pr1 CD)
                                (f0 : ... ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
                                ... x0 -->[ f0
                                ][ f0] ... y0,
                        GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp
                                        (... y) =
                        trb₂ (id_two_disp (...) ;;2 
                              FF₂ x y f))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          ((pr11 FF) x -->[ id₁ x · f
                           ][ id₁ x · f] (pr11 FF) y)
                          (id_two_disp (... x) ;;2 
                           GG₂ x y f) (trb₂ GG₂ x y f)
                          (λ t : ... -->[ ...
                                 ][ ...] ...,
                           GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp
                                           ... =
                           trb₂ t)
                          (internal_paths_rew_r
                             (... -->[ ... ][ ...] ...)
                             (GG₂ x y f ;;2 id_two_disp
                                              ...)
                             (trb₂ GG₂ x y f)
                             (λ ..., ...)
                             (internal_paths_rew_r ...
                                ... ... ... ... ...)
                             (id_two_disp_right ...))
                          (id_two_disp_left
                             (GG₂ x y f))) q0)
                    (λ q0 : double_functor_hor_id_laws
                              (λ x : pr1 CD,
                               id_two_disp (... x)),
                     funextsec
                       (λ t : pr1 CD,
                        ∏ (y : pr1 CD)
                        (f : pr1 CD ⟦ t, y ⟧),
                        (pr11 FF) t -->[ f
                        ][ f] (pr11 FF) y) (pr21 FF)
                       GG₂
                       (λ x : pr1 CD,
                        funextsec
                          (λ t : ..., ∏ ..., ...)
                          ((pr21 FF) x) (GG₂ x)
                          (λ y : ...,
                           funextsec ... ... ... ...)))
                    (impred_isaset
                       (λ t : pr1 CD,
                        ∏ (y : pr1 CD)
                        (f : pr1 CD ⟦ t, y ⟧),
                        (pr11 FF) t -->[ f
                        ][ f] (pr11 FF) y)
                       (λ t : pr1 CD,
                        impred_isaset
                          (λ t0 : pr1 CD,
                           ∏ f : ...,
                           ... -->[ f ][ f] ...)
                          (λ t0 : pr1 CD,
                           impred_isaset (...) (...)))
                       (pr21 FF) GG₂)
                    (isaprop_double_functor_hor_id_laws
                       (λ x : pr1 CD,
                        id_two_disp ((pr11 FF) x))))
                 X0) (pr11 FF) q (pr21 FF) (pr2 FF) p
              X)
       ∘ total2_paths_equiv
           (λ Im : ∏ x : pr1 CD, (pr12 CD) x x,
            ∏ (x y : pr1 CD) (f : pr1 CD ⟦ x, y ⟧),
            Im x -->[ f ][ f] Im y) (pr1 FF) (pr1 FF)
       ∘ path_sigma_hprop hor_id_laws FF FF
           (isaprop_hor_id_laws (pr1 FF)))%weq
        (idpath FF)) =
pr11 (disp_idtoiso_2_0
        disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id
        (idpath CD) FF FF (idpath FF))

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_id CD
(λ x : pr1 CD, id_two_disp ((pr11 FF) x)) =
(λ x : pr1 CD, id_two_disp (double_id FF x))

    apply idpath.
Qed.

Qed.

(** * 2. Two-sided displayed categories with horizontal composition *)

disp_cat_ob_mor bicat_twosided_disp_cat

bicat_twosided_disp_cat → UU
(λ obd : bicat_twosided_disp_cat → UU,
 ∏ x y : bicat_twosided_disp_cat,
 obd x → obd y → bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  ?pr1

  
bicat_twosided_disp_cat → UU
 exact (λ CD, hor_comp (pr12 CD)).
  
(λ obd : bicat_twosided_disp_cat → UU,
 ∏ x y : bicat_twosided_disp_cat,
 obd x → obd y → bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  (λ CD : bicat_twosided_disp_cat, hor_comp (pr12 CD))
 exact (λ CD₁ CD₂ Cm₁ Cm₂ FFF, double_functor_hor_comp (pr2 FFF) Cm₁ Cm₂).
Defined.

(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp x),
xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
∏ (x y z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp x)
(yy : disp_cat_ob_mor_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp y)
(zz : disp_cat_ob_mor_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz

  
∏ (x : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp x),
xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
 exact (λ C Cm, identity_hor_comp Cm).
  
∏ (x y z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp x)
(yy : disp_cat_ob_mor_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp y)
(zz : disp_cat_ob_mor_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz
 exact (λ C₁ C₂ C₃ FFF GGG Cm₁ Cm₂ Cm₃ FC GC, comp_hor_comp FC GC).
Defined.

       a)

       b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
id_disp x ;; f' ==>[ lunitor f] f'
∏ (a b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       a)
(y : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ;; id_disp y ==>[ runitor f] f'

(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       a)
(y : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ linvunitor f] id_disp x ;; f'
∏ (a b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       a)
(y : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),

(g : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(w : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       a)
(x : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       b)
(y : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       c)
(z : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       d) (ff : w -->[ f] x) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : y -->[ h] z),
(ff ;; gg)%mor_disp ;; hh ==>[
rassociator f g h] ff ;; (gg ;; hh)%mor_disp
∏ (a b c d : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(w : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       a)
(x : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       b)

       c)
(z : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       d) (ff : w -->[ f] x) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : y -->[ h] z),
ff ;; (gg ;; hh)%mor_disp ==>[
lassociator f g h] (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp ;; hh
∏ (a b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f g h : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(r : f ==> g) (s : g ==> h)
(x : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       a)
(y : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       b) (ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : x -->[ h] y),
ff ==>[ r] gg → gg ==>[ s] hh → ff ==>[ r • s] hh

(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g1 g2 : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : g1 ==> g2)
(x : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       a)
(y : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       b)
(z : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       c) (ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg1 : y -->[ g1] z)
(gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
gg1 ==>[ r] gg2 → ff ;; gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] ff ;; gg2
∏ (a b c : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f1 f2 : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧)

       a)

       b)

       c) (ff1 : x -->[ f1] y) (ff2 : x -->[ f2] y)
(gg : y -->[ g] z),
ff1 ==>[ r] ff2 → ff1 ;; gg ==>[ r ▹ g] ff2 ;; gg

  
∏ (a b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧)

I₂: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
  CD₂
IF: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
IF ==>[ id₂ F] IF

    exact (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans_hor_comp IF).
  
∏ (a b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧)

       a)

IG: I₂ -->[ G] I₃
IH: I₃ -->[ H] I₄
(IF ;; IG)%mor_disp ;; IH ==>[
rassociator F G H] IF ;; (IG ;; IH)%mor_disp

    exact (rassociator_twosided_disp_nat_trans_hor_comp IF IG IH).

       d) (ff : w -->[ f] x) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : y -->[ h] z),
ff ;; (gg ;; hh)%mor_disp ==>[

    exact (lassociator_twosided_disp_nat_trans_hor_comp IF IG IH).
  
∏ (a b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f g h : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(r : f ==> g) (s : g ==> h)
(x : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       a)

(hh : x -->[ h] y),
ff ==>[ r] gg → gg ==>[ s] hh → ff ==>[ r • s] hh
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F, G, H: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
τ: F ==> G
θ: G ==> H
I₁: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
  CD₁
I₂: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
  CD₂
IF: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
IG: I₁ -->[ G] I₂
IH: I₁ -->[ H] I₂
Iτ: IF ==>[ τ] IG
Iθ: IG ==>[ θ] IH
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  ((λ (x y : pr1 CD₁) (xy : pr2 CD₁ x y),
    pr2 τ x y xy ;;2 pr2 θ x y xy),,
   comp_twosided_disp_nat_trans_laws (pr2 τ) (pr2 θ))
  IF IH

    exact (comp_twosided_disp_nat_trans_hor_comp Iτ Iθ).
  
∏ (a b c : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g1 g2 : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : g1 ==> g2)
(x : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       a)
(y : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       b)
(z : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       c) (ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg1 : y -->[ g1] z)
(gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
gg1 ==>[ r] gg2 → ff ;; gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] ff ;; gg2
 
CD₁, CD₂, CD₃: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
G₁, G₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₂, CD₃ ⟧
θ: G₁ ==> G₂
I₁: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
  CD₁
I₂: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
  CD₂
I₃: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
  CD₃
IF: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
IG₁: I₂ -->[ G₁] I₃
IG₂: I₂ -->[ G₂] I₃
Iθ: IG₁ ==>[ θ] IG₂
IF ;; IG₁ ==>[ F ◃ θ] IF ;; IG₂

    exact (pre_whisker_twosided_disp_nat_trans_hor_comp IF Iθ).
  
∏ (a b c : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f1 f2 : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ b, c ⟧) (r : f1 ==> f2)
(x : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       a)
(y : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       b)
(z : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
       c) (ff1 : x -->[ f1] y) (ff2 : x -->[ f2] y)
(gg : y -->[ g] z),
ff1 ==>[ r] ff2 → ff1 ;; gg ==>[ r ▹ g] ff2 ;; gg
 
CD₁, CD₂, CD₃: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F, G₁: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
G₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₂, CD₃ ⟧
τ: F ==> G₁
I₁: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
  CD₁
I₂: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
  CD₂
I₃: disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
  CD₃
IF₁: I₁ -->[ F] I₂
IF₂: I₁ -->[ G₁] I₂
IG: I₂ -->[ G₂] I₃
Iτ: IF₁ ==>[ τ] IF₂
IF₁ ;; IG ==>[ τ ▹ G₂] IF₂ ;; IG

    exact (post_whisker_twosided_disp_nat_trans_hor_comp IG Iτ).
Qed.

x: f ==> g
aa: disp_prebicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp a

a, b: bicat_twosided_disp_cat

bb: disp_prebicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp b

gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isaprop (ff ==>[ x] gg)

    apply isaprop_double_nat_trans_hor_comp.

CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat

Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂

CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
τ: FC ==>[ id₂ F] GC
GC ==>[ (id2_invertible_2cell F) ^-1] FC
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
τ: FC ==>[ id₂ F] GC
τ •• ?pr1 =
transportb (λ α : F ==> F, FC ==>[ α] FC)
  (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell F)) (disp_id2 FC)
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
τ: FC ==>[ id₂ F] GC
(λ _ : τ •• ?pr1 =
       transportb (λ α : F ==> F, FC ==>[ α] FC)
         (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell F))
         (disp_id2 FC),
 ?pr1 •• τ =
 transportb (λ α : F ==> F, GC ==>[ α] GC)
   (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell F)) (disp_id2 GC))
  ?pr10

  
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧

Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
