GC ==>[ (id2_invertible_2cell F) ^-1] FC
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
τ: FC ==>[ id₂ F] GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
functor_double_comp_cell GC h k ;;2 id_two_disp
                                      (pr2 F x z
                                         (double_hor_comp
                                            Cm₁ h k)) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                          FC h k)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
τ: FC ==>[ id₂ F] GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
p:= τ x y z h k: functor_double_comp_cell FC h k ;;2 id_two_disp
                                      (pr2 F x z
                                         (double_hor_comp
                                            Cm₁ h
                                            k)) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                          GC h k)
functor_double_comp_cell GC h k ;;2 id_two_disp
                                      (pr2 F x z
                                         (double_hor_comp
                                            Cm₁ h k)) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                          FC h k)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
τ: FC ==>[ id₂ F] GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
p:= τ x y z h k: functor_double_comp_cell FC h k ;;2 id_two_disp
                                      (pr2 F x z
                                         (double_hor_comp
                                            Cm₁ h
                                            k)) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                          GC h k)
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                          FC h k)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
τ: FC ==>[ id₂ F] GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
p: trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                          GC h k)
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                          FC h k)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
τ: FC ==>[ id₂ F] GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
p: trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                          GC h k)
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k =
trb₂ (id_two_disp
        (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
           (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                FC h k)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
τ: FC ==>[ id₂ F] GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
p: trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ (id_two_disp
        (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
           (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                GC h k)
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k =
trb₂ (id_two_disp
        (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
           (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                FC h k)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
τ: FC ==>[ id₂ F] GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
p: trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ (id_two_disp
        (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
           (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                GC h k)
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k =
trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
τ: FC ==>[ id₂ F] GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
p: trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k)
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k =
trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
τ: FC ==>[ id₂ F] GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
p: trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k)
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k =
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
τ: FC ==>[ id₂ F] GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
p: trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k =
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k

    refine (_ @ !p @ _) ; use transportf_disp_mor2_eq ; apply idpath.
  
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
τ: FC ==>[ id₂ F] GC
τ
•• ((λ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
     (k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
     (let p := τ x y z h k in
      internal_paths_rew_r
        (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
           (pr2 F y z k) -->[
         id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
         ][ id₁ (pr1 F z) · id₁ (pr1 F z)] pr2 F x z
                                             (double_hor_comp
                                                Cm₁ h
                                                k))
        (functor_double_comp_cell GC h k ;;2 id_two_disp
                                               (pr2 F
                                                 x z
                                                 (double_hor_comp
                                                 Cm₁ h
                                                 k)))
        (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k)
        (λ t : double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                 (pr2 F y z k) -->[
               id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
               ][ id₁ (pr1 F z) · id₁ (pr1 F z)] pr2 F
                                                 x z
                                                 (double_hor_comp
                                                 Cm₁ h
                                                 k),
         t =
         trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
                 (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
                 (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k))
        (let p0 :=
           internal_paths_rew
             (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                (pr2 F y z k) -->[
              id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
              ][ id₁ (pr1 F z) · id₁ (pr1 F z)] pr2 F
                                                 x z
                                                 (double_hor_comp
                                                 Cm₁ h
                                                 k))
             (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k ;;2 
              id_two_disp
                (pr2 F x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k)))
             (λ t : double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                      (pr2 F y z k) -->[
                    id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                    ][ id₁ (pr1 F z) · id₁ (pr1 F z)] 
                    pr2 F x z
                      (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k),
              t =
              trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
                      (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
                      (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 
                    functor_double_comp_cell GC h k))
             p (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)
             (id_two_disp_right
                (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)) in
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
              (pr2 F y z k) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
            ][ id₁ (pr1 F z)] double_hor_comp Cm₂
                                (pr2 F x y h)
                                (pr2 F y z k))
           (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
              (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
              (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)))
           (id_two_disp
              (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                 (pr2 F y z k)))
           (λ t : double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                    (pr2 F y z k) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
                  ][ id₁ (pr1 F z)] double_hor_comp
                                      Cm₂
                                      (pr2 F x y h)
                                      (pr2 F y z k),
            trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k =
            trb₂ (t ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell FC h
                          k))
           (let p1 :=
              internal_paths_rew
                (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                   (pr2 F y z k) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
                 ][ id₁ (pr1 F z)] double_hor_comp Cm₂
                                     (pr2 F x y h)
                                     (pr2 F y z k))
                (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
                   (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
                   (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)))
                (λ t : double_hor_comp Cm₂
                         (pr2 F x y h) (pr2 F y z k) -->[
                       id₁ (pr1 F x)
                       ][ id₁ (pr1 F z)] double_hor_comp
                                           Cm₂
                                           (pr2 F x y
                                              h)
                                           (pr2 F y z
                                              k),
                 trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
                 trb₂ (t ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                               GC h k)) p0
                (id_two_disp
                   (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                      (pr2 F y z k)))
                (double_hor_comp_mor_id Cm₂
                   (pr2 F x y h) (pr2 F y z k)) in
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                 (pr2 F y z k) -->[
               id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
               ][ id₁ (pr1 F z) · id₁ (pr1 F z)] pr2 F
                                                 x z
                                                 (double_hor_comp
                                                 Cm₁ h
                                                 k))
              (id_two_disp
                 (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                    (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                         FC h k)
              (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)
              (λ t : double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                       (pr2 F y z k) -->[
                     id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                     ][ id₁ (pr1 F z) · id₁ (pr1 F z)] 
                     pr2 F x z
                       (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k),
               trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k =
               trb₂ t)
              (let p2 :=
                 internal_paths_rew
                   (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                      (pr2 F y z k) -->[
                    id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                    ][ id₁ (pr1 F z) · id₁ (pr1 F z)] 
                    pr2 F x z
                      (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k))
                   (id_two_disp

                         (pr2 F x y h) (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 
                    functor_double_comp_cell GC h k)
                   (λ t : double_hor_comp Cm₂
                            (pr2 F x y h)
                            (pr2 F y z k) -->[

                          ][ id₁ (...) · id₁ (...)] 
                          pr2 F x z
                            (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k),
                    trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h
                           k = trb₂ t) p1

                 in

                    (pr2 F y z k) -->[

                  ][ id₁ (pr1 F z) · id₁ (pr1 F z)]

                 (trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell
                               FC h k))

                        ][ id₁ (pr1 F z)

                                                 Cm₁ h

                                    GC h k))

                       trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell
                              FC h k = t) p2
                      (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell
                              GC h k)
                      (transport_b_b_disp_mor2

                         (id_left ...) (... @ ! ...)
                         (functor_double_comp_cell GC
                            h k)) in

                       (functor_double_comp_cell GC h
                          k)) @

                    (id_left (id₁ (...)) @

                    (id_left (id₁ (pr1 F z)))
                    (id_left (id₁ (...)) @

                    (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)))

           (double_hor_comp_mor_id Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)

     functor_double_comp_cell GC h k ;;2 pr2
                                           (id2_invertible_2cell
                                              F) ^-1 x
                                           z
                                           (double_hor_comp
                                              Cm₁ h k) =
     trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
             (pr2 (id2_invertible_2cell F) ^-1 x y h)
             (pr2 (id2_invertible_2cell F) ^-1 y z k) ;;2 
           functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))

    GC ==>[ (id2_invertible_2cell F) ^-1] FC) =
transportb (λ α : F ==> F, FC ==>[ α] FC)
  (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell F)) (disp_id2 FC)
 apply isaprop_double_nat_trans_hor_comp.

               in
             internal_paths_rew_r
               (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                  (pr2 F y z k) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
                ][ id₁ (pr1 F z)] double_hor_comp Cm₂
                                    (pr2 F x y h)
                                    (pr2 F y z k))
               (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
                  (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
                  (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)))
               (id_two_disp
                  (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                     (pr2 F y z k)))
               (λ t : double_hor_comp Cm₂
                        (pr2 F x y h) (pr2 F y z k) -->[
                      id₁ (pr1 F x)
                      ][ id₁ (pr1 F z)] double_hor_comp
                                          Cm₂
                                          (pr2 F x y h)
                                          (pr2 F y z k),
                trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k =
                trb₂ (t ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                              FC h k))
               (let p1 :=
                  internal_paths_rew
                    (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                       (pr2 F y z k) -->[
                     id₁ (pr1 F x)
                     ][ id₁ (pr1 F z)] double_hor_comp
                                         Cm₂
                                         (pr2 F x y h)
                                         (pr2 F y z k))
                    (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
                       (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
                       (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)))
                    (λ t : double_hor_comp Cm₂
                             (pr2 F x y h)
                             (pr2 F y z k) -->[
                           id₁ (pr1 F x)
                           ][ id₁ (pr1 F z)] double_hor_comp
                                               Cm₂
                                               (pr2 F
                                                 x y h)
                                               (pr2 F
                                                 y z k),
                     trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC
                            h k =
                     trb₂ (t ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                   GC h k)) p0
                    (id_two_disp
                       (double_hor_comp Cm₂
                          (pr2 F x y h) (pr2 F y z k)))
                    (double_hor_comp_mor_id Cm₂
                       (pr2 F x y h) (pr2 F y z k)) in
                internal_paths_rew_r
                  (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                     (pr2 F y z k) -->[
                   id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                   ][ id₁ (pr1 F z) · id₁ (pr1 F z)] 
                   pr2 F x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k))
                  (id_two_disp
                     (double_hor_comp Cm₂
                        (pr2 F x y h) (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 
                   functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)
                  (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h
                          k)
                  (λ t : double_hor_comp Cm₂
                           (pr2 F x y h) (pr2 F y z k) -->[
                         id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                         ][ id₁ (pr1 F z)
                            · id₁ (pr1 F z)] pr2 F x z
                                               (double_hor_comp
                                                 Cm₁ h
                                                 k),
                   trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h
                          k = trb₂ t)
                  (let p2 :=
                     internal_paths_rew
                       (double_hor_comp Cm₂
                          (pr2 F x y h) (pr2 F y z k) -->[
                        id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                        ][ id₁ (pr1 F z)
                           · id₁ (pr1 F z)] pr2 F x z
                                              (double_hor_comp
                                                 Cm₁ h
                                                 k))
                       (id_two_disp
                          (double_hor_comp Cm₂
                             (pr2 F x y h)
                             (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC h
                                                 k)
                       (λ t : double_hor_comp Cm₂
                                (pr2 F x y h)
                                (pr2 F y z k) -->[
                              id₁ (...) · id₁ (...)
                              ][ id₁ (...) · id₁ (...)] 
                              pr2 F x z
                                (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h
                                   k),
                        trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell
                               FC h k = trb₂ t) p1
                       (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell
                               GC h k)
                       (id_two_disp_left
                          (functor_double_comp_cell GC
                             h k)) in
                   internal_paths_rew_r
                     (double_hor_comp Cm₂
                        (pr2 F x y h) (pr2 F y z k) -->[
                      id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                      ][ id₁ (pr1 F z) · id₁ (pr1 F z)] 
                      pr2 F x z
                        (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k))
                     (trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell
                                   FC h k))
                     (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC
                             h k)
                     (λ t : double_hor_comp Cm₂
                              (pr2 F x y h)
                              (pr2 F y z k) -->[
                            id₁ (pr1 F x)
                            · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                            ][ id₁ (pr1 F z)
                               · id₁ (pr1 F z)] pr2 F
                                                 x z
                                                 (double_hor_comp
                                                 Cm₁ h
                                                 k),
                      trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC
                             h k = t)
                     (let p3 :=
                        internal_paths_rew
                          (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (...)
                             (...) -->[
                           id₁ ... · id₁ ...
                           ][ id₁ ... · id₁ ...] pr2 F
                                                 x z
                                                 (...))
                          (trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell
                                        GC h k))
                          (λ t : ... -->[ ...
                                 ][ ...] ...,
                           trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell
                                  FC h k = t) p2
                          (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell
                                  GC h k)
                          (transport_b_b_disp_mor2
                             (id_left ...)
                             (... @ ! ...)
                             (id_left ...)
                             (... @ ! ...)
                             (functor_double_comp_cell
                                GC h k)) in
                      transportf_disp_mor2_eq
                        (idpath
                           (functor_double_comp_cell
                              GC h k)) @
                      ! p3 @
                      transportf_disp_mor2_eq
                        (idpath (...)))
                     (transport_b_b_disp_mor2
                        (id_left (id₁ (pr1 F x)))
                        (id_left (id₁ (...)) @
                         ! id_right (id₁ (...)))
                        (id_left (id₁ (pr1 F z)))
                        (id_left (id₁ (...)) @
                         ! id_right (id₁ (...)))
                        (functor_double_comp_cell FC h
                           k)))
                  (id_two_disp_left
                     (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)))
               (double_hor_comp_mor_id Cm₂
                  (pr2 F x y h) (pr2 F y z k)))
            (id_two_disp_right
               (functor_double_comp_cell GC h k))))
     (transportb (λ α : F ==> F, FC ==>[ α] FC)
        (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell F))
        (disp_id2 FC)))
 apply isaprop_double_nat_trans_hor_comp.
Qed.


CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F, G: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell F G
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
GC: Cm₁ -->[ G] Cm₂
ττ: FC ==>[ τ] GC
is_disp_invertible_2cell τ ττ


CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F, G: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell F G
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
GC: Cm₁ -->[ G] Cm₂
ττ: FC ==>[ τ] GC
is_disp_invertible_2cell τ ττ

  
∏ (CD₁ CD₂ : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(F G : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧)
(τ : invertible_2cell F G)
(Cm₁ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁)
(Cm₂ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂)
(FC : Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂) (GC : Cm₁ -->[ G] Cm₂)
(ττ : FC ==>[ τ] GC), is_disp_invertible_2cell τ ττ

  
is_univalent_2_1 bicat_twosided_disp_cat
∏ (a b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧),
(λ (a0 b0 : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
 (f0 g : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧)
 (α : invertible_2cell f0 g),
 ∏ (Cm₁ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp a0)
 (Cm₂ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp b0)
 (FC : Cm₁ -->[ f0] Cm₂) (GC : Cm₁ -->[ g] Cm₂)
 (ττ : FC ==>[ α] GC), is_disp_invertible_2cell α ττ)
  a b f f (id2_invertible_2cell f)

  
is_univalent_2_1 bicat_twosided_disp_cat
 apply is_univalent_2_1_bicat_twosided_disp_cat.
  
∏ (a b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a, b ⟧),
(λ (a0 b0 : bicat_twosided_disp_cat)
 (f0 g : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧)
 (α : invertible_2cell f0 g),
 ∏ (Cm₁ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp a0)
 (Cm₂ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp b0)
 (FC : Cm₁ -->[ f0] Cm₂) (GC : Cm₁ -->[ g] Cm₂)
 (ττ : FC ==>[ α] GC), is_disp_invertible_2cell α ττ)
  a b f f (id2_invertible_2cell f)
 
∏
(a
 b : ∑ x : univalent_category,
     univalent_twosided_disp_cat x x)
(f : ∑ f : pr1 a ⟶ pr1 b,
     twosided_disp_functor f f (pr2 a) (pr2 b))
(Cm₁ : hor_comp (pr12 a)) (Cm₂ : hor_comp (pr12 b))
(FC GC : double_functor_hor_comp (pr2 f) Cm₁ Cm₂)
(ττ : double_nat_trans_hor_comp
        ((λ (x y : pr1 a) (xy : pr2 a x y),
          id_two_disp (pr2 f x y xy)),,
         id_twosided_disp_nat_trans_laws (pr2 f)) FC
        GC),
is_disp_invertible_2cell (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f)
  ττ

    
a, b: ∑ x : univalent_category,
univalent_twosided_disp_cat x x
f: ∑ f : pr1 a ⟶ pr1 b,
twosided_disp_functor f f (pr2 a) (pr2 b)
Cm₁: hor_comp (pr12 a)
Cm₂: hor_comp (pr12 b)
FC, GC: double_functor_hor_comp (pr2 f) Cm₁ Cm₂
ττ: double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  ((λ (x y : pr1 a) (xy : pr2 a x y),
    id_two_disp (pr2 f x y xy)),,
   id_twosided_disp_nat_trans_laws (pr2 f)) FC GC
is_disp_invertible_2cell (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f)
  ττ

    apply is_disp_invertible_2cell_hor_comp_over_id.
Qed.

Section HorCompDispInv2cell.
  Context {CD₁ CD₂ : bicat_twosided_disp_cat}
          {F : CD₁ --> CD₂}
          {Cm₁ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁}
          {Cm₂ : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂}
          (FC GC : Cm₁ -->[ F ] Cm₂).

  
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
(∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
 (k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
 pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k)
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC GC

  
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
(∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
 (k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
 pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k)
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC GC

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
(∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
 (k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
 pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k)
→ disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC GC
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC GC
→ ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
  (k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
  pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
isaprop
  (∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
   (k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
   pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k)
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
isaprop
  (disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC
     GC)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
(∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
 (k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
 pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k)
→ disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC GC
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
(k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC GC

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
(k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
FC ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell F] GC
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
(k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
(λ x : FC ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell F] GC,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) x)
  ?pr1

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
(k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
FC ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell F] GC
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
(k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
functor_double_comp_cell FC h k ;;2 id_two_disp
                                      (pr2 F x z
                                         (double_hor_comp
                                            Cm₁ h k)) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                          GC h k)

        
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
(k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                          GC h k)

        
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
(k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ (id_two_disp
        (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
           (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                GC h k)

        
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
(k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k)

        
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
(k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k

        
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
(k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k = ?b
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
(k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
?b = trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k

        
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
(k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k = ?b

          
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
(k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
functor_double_comp_cell FC h k = ?t2

          exact (p x y z h k).
        
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
(k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
trb₂ pr1 GC x y z h k =
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k

        
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
(k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
pr1 GC x y z h k = functor_double_comp_cell GC h k

        apply idpath.
      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
(k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
(λ x : FC ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell F] GC,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) x)
  ((λ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
    (k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
    internal_paths_rew_r
      (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h) (pr2 F y z k) -->[
       id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
       ][ id₁ (pr1 F z) · id₁ (pr1 F z)] pr2 F x z
                                           (double_hor_comp
                                              Cm₁ h k))
      (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k ;;2 id_two_disp
                                             (pr2 F x
                                                z
                                                (double_hor_comp
                                                 Cm₁ h
                                                 k)))
      (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)
      (λ t : double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
               (pr2 F y z k) -->[
             id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
             ][ id₁ (pr1 F z) · id₁ (pr1 F z)] pr2 F x
                                                 z
                                                 (double_hor_comp
                                                 Cm₁ h
                                                 k),
       t =
       trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
               (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
               (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC h
                                                 k))
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
            (pr2 F y z k) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
          ][ id₁ (pr1 F z)] double_hor_comp Cm₂
                              (pr2 F x y h)
                              (pr2 F y z k))
         (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
            (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
            (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)))
         (id_two_disp
            (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
               (pr2 F y z k)))
         (λ t : double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                  (pr2 F y z k) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
                ][ id₁ (pr1 F z)] double_hor_comp Cm₂
                                    (pr2 F x y h)
                                    (pr2 F y z k),
          trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
          trb₂ (t ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell GC h k))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
               (pr2 F y z k) -->[
             id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
             ][ id₁ (pr1 F z) · id₁ (pr1 F z)] pr2 F x
                                                 z
                                                 (double_hor_comp
                                                 Cm₁ h
                                                 k))
            (id_two_disp
               (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                  (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                       GC h k)
            (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k)
            (λ t : double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                     (pr2 F y z k) -->[
                   id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                   ][ id₁ (pr1 F z) · id₁ (pr1 F z)] 
                   pr2 F x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k),
             trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
             trb₂ t)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                  (pr2 F y z k) -->[
                id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                ][ id₁ (pr1 F z) · id₁ (pr1 F z)] 
                pr2 F x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k))
               (trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC
                             h k))
               (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k)
               (λ t : double_hor_comp Cm₂
                        (pr2 F x y h) (pr2 F y z k) -->[
                      id₁ (pr1 F x) · id₁ (pr1 F x)
                      ][ id₁ (pr1 F z) · id₁ (pr1 F z)] 
                      pr2 F x z
                        (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k),
                trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
                t)
               (maponpaths
                  (transportb_disp_mor2
                     (id_right (id₁ (pr1 F x)))
                     (id_right (id₁ (pr1 F z))))
                  (p x y z h k) @
                transportf_disp_mor2_eq
                  (idpath
                     (functor_double_comp_cell GC h k)))
               (transport_b_b_disp_mor2
                  (id_left (id₁ (pr1 F x)))
                  (id_left (id₁ (pr1 F x)) @
                   ! id_right (id₁ (pr1 F x)))
                  (id_left (id₁ (pr1 F z)))
                  (id_left (id₁ (pr1 F z)) @
                   ! id_right (id₁ (pr1 F z)))
                  (functor_double_comp_cell GC h k)))
            (id_two_disp_left
               (functor_double_comp_cell GC h k)))
         (double_hor_comp_mor_id Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
            (pr2 F y z k)))
      (id_two_disp_right
         (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))
    :
    functor_double_comp_cell FC h k ;;2 pr2
                                          (id2_invertible_2cell
                                             F) x z
                                          (double_hor_comp
                                             Cm₁ h k) =
    trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
            (pr2 (id2_invertible_2cell F) x y h)
            (pr2 (id2_invertible_2cell F) y z k) ;;2 
          functor_double_comp_cell GC h k))
   :
   FC ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell F] GC)
 apply is_disp_invertible_2cell_hor_comp.
    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC GC
→ ∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
  (k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
  pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC
  GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC
  GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
q:= pr1 p x y z h k: functor_double_comp_cell FC h k ;;2 pr2
                                      (id2_invertible_2cell
                                         F) x z
                                      (double_hor_comp
                                         Cm₁ h k) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
        (pr2 (id2_invertible_2cell F) x y h)
        (pr2 (id2_invertible_2cell F) y z k) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 h
                                                 k)
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC
  GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
q:= pr1 p x y z h k: functor_double_comp_cell FC h k ;;2 id_two_disp
                                      (pr2 F x z
                                         (double_hor_comp
                                            Cm₁ h
                                            k)) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                          GC h k)
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC
  GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
q: trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F x y h))
        (id_two_disp (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                          GC h k)
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC
  GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
q: trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ (id_two_disp
        (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
           (pr2 F y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                GC h k)
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧

Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂

p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC
  GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
q: trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k)
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧

Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂

p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC
  GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
q: trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k
pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧

Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC
  GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
q: trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k
trf₂ (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k) =
pr1 FC x y z h k

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧

Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂

p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC
  GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
q: trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k
trf₂ (trf₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k) =
pr1 FC x y z h k

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧

Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂

p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC
  GC
x, y, z: pr1 CD₁
h: pr2 CD₁ x y
k: pr2 CD₁ y z
q: trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell GC h k
trf₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
pr1 FC x y z h k

      apply transportf_disp_mor2_idpath.
    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
isaprop
  (∏ (x y z : pr1 CD₁) (h : pr2 CD₁ x y)
   (k : pr2 CD₁ y z),
   pr1 FC x y z h k = pr1 GC x y z h k)
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
t, t0, t1: pr1 CD₁
t2: pr2 CD₁ t t0
t3: pr2 CD₁ t0 t1
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t3 : pr2 CD₁ t0 t1,
    pr1 FC t t0 t1 t2 t3 = pr1 GC t t0 t1 t2 t3) t3)

      apply isaset_disp_mor.
    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
isaprop
  (disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) FC
     GC)
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F))
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
∏ x y : FC ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell F] GC,
is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) x
→ is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) y
  → x = y

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F))
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
x: FC ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell F] GC
isaprop
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) x)

        apply isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell.
      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
∏ x y : FC ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell F] GC,
is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) x
→ is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F) y
  → x = y
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
x, y: FC ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell F] GC
X: is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F)
  x
X0: is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell F)
  y
x = y

        apply isaprop_double_nat_trans_hor_comp.
  Qed.
End HorCompDispInv2cell.


disp_univalent_2_1
  disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp


disp_univalent_2_1
  disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp

  
fiberwise_local_univalent
  disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp

  
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
isweq
  (disp_idtoiso_2_1
     disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp (idpath F)
     FC GC)

  
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧,
   Cm₁ -->[ z] Cm₂) (idpath F) FC = GC
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F))
    FC GC
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
?w ~
disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
  (idpath F) FC GC

  
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧,
   Cm₁ -->[ z] Cm₂) (idpath F) FC = GC
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F))
    FC GC
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
isaprop (double_functor_hor_comp_laws (pr1 GC))

    apply isaprop_double_functor_hor_comp_laws.
  
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
(disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp_weq_inv2cell FC
   GC
 ∘ weqonsecfibers (λ x : pr1 CD₁, pr1 FC x = pr1 GC x)
     (λ x : pr1 CD₁,
      ∏ x0 : pr1 CD₁,
      (λ y : pr1 CD₁,
       ∏ x1 : pr1 CD₁,
       (λ z : pr1 CD₁,
        ∏ x2 : pr2 CD₁ x y,
        (λ h : pr2 CD₁ x y,
         pr1 FC x y z h ~ pr1 GC x y z h) x2) x1) x0)
     (λ x : pr1 CD₁,
      weqonsecfibers
        (λ y : pr1 CD₁, pr1 FC x y = pr1 GC x y)
        (λ y : pr1 CD₁,
         ∏ x0 : pr1 CD₁,
         (λ z : pr1 CD₁,
          ∏ x1 : pr2 CD₁ x y,
          (λ h : pr2 CD₁ x y,
           pr1 FC x y z h ~ pr1 GC x y z h) x1) x0)
        (λ y : pr1 CD₁,
         weqonsecfibers
           (λ z : pr1 CD₁, pr1 FC x y z = pr1 GC x y z)
           (λ z : pr1 CD₁,
            ∏ x0 : pr2 CD₁ x y,
            (λ h : pr2 CD₁ x y,
             pr1 FC x y z h ~ pr1 GC x y z h) x0)
           (λ z : pr1 CD₁,
            weqonsecfibers
              (λ h : pr2 CD₁ x y,
               pr1 FC x y z h = pr1 GC x y z h)
              (λ h : pr2 CD₁ x y,
               pr1 FC x y z h ~ pr1 GC x y z h)
              (λ h : pr2 CD₁ x y,
               weqtoforallpaths
                 (λ k : pr2 CD₁ y z,
                  double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y h)
                    (pr2 F y z k) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
                  ][ id₁ (pr1 F z)] pr2 F x z
                                      (double_hor_comp
                                         Cm₁ h k))
                 (pr1 FC x y z h) (pr1 GC x y z h))
            ∘ weqtoforallpaths
                (λ x0 : pr2 CD₁ x y,
                 ∏ t : pr2 CD₁ y z,
                 (λ k : pr2 CD₁ y z,
                  double_hor_comp Cm₂ (...) (...) -->[
                  id₁ (...)
                  ][ id₁ (...)] pr2 F x z (...)) t)
                (pr1 FC x y z) (pr1 GC x y z))
         ∘ weqtoforallpaths
             (λ x0 : pr1 CD₁,
              ∏ t : pr2 CD₁ x y,
              (λ x1 : pr2 CD₁ x y,
               ∏ t0 : pr2 CD₁ y x0,
               (λ k : pr2 CD₁ y x0,
                double_hor_comp Cm₂ (...) (...) -->[
                id₁ (...)
                ][ id₁ (...)] pr2 F x x0 (...)) t0) t)
             (pr1 FC x y) (pr1 GC x y))
      ∘ weqtoforallpaths
          (λ x0 : pr1 CD₁,
           ∏ t : pr1 CD₁,
           (λ x1 : pr1 CD₁,
            ∏ t0 : pr2 CD₁ x x0,
            (λ x2 : pr2 CD₁ x x0,
             ∏ t1 : pr2 CD₁ x0 x1,
             (λ k : pr2 CD₁ x0 x1,
              double_hor_comp Cm₂ (...) (...) -->[
              id₁ (...) ][ id₁ (...)] pr2 F x x1 (...))
               t1) t0) t) (pr1 FC x) (pr1 GC x))
 ∘ weqtoforallpaths
     (λ x : pr1 CD₁,
      ∏ t : pr1 CD₁,
      (λ x0 : pr1 CD₁,
       ∏ t0 : pr1 CD₁,
       (λ x1 : pr1 CD₁,
        ∏ t1 : pr2 CD₁ x x0,
        (λ x2 : pr2 CD₁ x x0,
         ∏ t2 : pr2 CD₁ x0 x1,
         (λ k : pr2 CD₁ x0 x1,
          double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x x0 x2)
            (pr2 F x0 x1 k) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
          ][ id₁ (pr1 F x1)] pr2 F x x1
                               (double_hor_comp Cm₁ x2
                                  k)) t2) t1) t0) t)
     (pr1 FC) (pr1 GC)
 ∘ path_sigma_hprop double_functor_hor_comp_laws FC GC
     (isaprop_double_functor_hor_comp_laws (pr1 GC)))%weq ~
disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
  (idpath F) FC GC
 
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧,
   Cm₁ -->[ z] Cm₂) (idpath F) FC = GC
(disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp_weq_inv2cell FC
   GC
 ∘ weqonsecfibers (λ x : pr1 CD₁, pr1 FC x = pr1 GC x)
     (λ x : pr1 CD₁,
      ∏ (x0 x1 : pr1 CD₁) (x2 : pr2 CD₁ x x0),
      pr1 FC x x0 x1 x2 ~ pr1 GC x x0 x1 x2)
     (λ x : pr1 CD₁,
      weqonsecfibers
        (λ y : pr1 CD₁, pr1 FC x y = pr1 GC x y)
        (λ y : pr1 CD₁,
         ∏ (x0 : pr1 CD₁) (x1 : pr2 CD₁ x y),
         pr1 FC x y x0 x1 ~ pr1 GC x y x0 x1)
        (λ y : pr1 CD₁,
         weqonsecfibers
           (λ z : pr1 CD₁, pr1 FC x y z = pr1 GC x y z)
           (λ z : pr1 CD₁,
            ∏ x0 : pr2 CD₁ x y,
            pr1 FC x y z x0 ~ pr1 GC x y z x0)
           (λ z : pr1 CD₁,
            weqonsecfibers
              (λ h : pr2 CD₁ x y,
               pr1 FC x y z h = pr1 GC x y z h)
              (λ h : pr2 CD₁ x y,
               pr1 FC x y z h ~ pr1 GC x y z h)
              (λ h : pr2 CD₁ x y,
               weqtoforallpaths
                 (λ k : pr2 CD₁ y z,
                  double_hor_comp Cm₂ (...) (...) -->[
                  id₁ (...)
                  ][ id₁ (...)] pr2 F x z (...))
                 (pr1 FC x y z h) (pr1 GC x y z h))
            ∘ weqtoforallpaths
                (λ x0 : pr2 CD₁ x y,
                 ∏ t : pr2 CD₁ y z,
                 double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y x0)
                   (pr2 F y z t) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
                 ][ id₁ (pr1 F z)] pr2 F x z
                                     (double_hor_comp
                                        Cm₁ x0 t))
                (pr1 FC x y z) (pr1 GC x y z))
         ∘ weqtoforallpaths
             (λ x0 : pr1 CD₁,
              ∏ (t : pr2 CD₁ x y) (t0 : pr2 CD₁ y x0),
              double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y t)
                (pr2 F y x0 t0) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
              ][ id₁ (pr1 F x0)] pr2 F x x0
                                   (double_hor_comp
                                      Cm₁ t t0))
             (pr1 FC x y) (pr1 GC x y))
      ∘ weqtoforallpaths
          (λ x0 : pr1 CD₁,
           ∏ (t : pr1 CD₁) (t0 : pr2 CD₁ x x0)
           (t1 : pr2 CD₁ x0 t),
           double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x x0 t0)
             (pr2 F x0 t t1) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
           ][ id₁ (pr1 F t)] pr2 F x t
                               (double_hor_comp Cm₁ t0
                                  t1)) (pr1 FC x)
          (pr1 GC x))
 ∘ weqtoforallpaths
     (λ x : pr1 CD₁,
      ∏ (t t0 : pr1 CD₁) (t1 : pr2 CD₁ x t)
      (t2 : pr2 CD₁ t t0),
      double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x t t1)
        (pr2 F t t0 t2) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
      ][ id₁ (pr1 F t0)] pr2 F x t0
                           (double_hor_comp Cm₁ t1 t2))
     (pr1 FC) (pr1 GC)
 ∘ path_sigma_hprop double_functor_hor_comp_laws FC GC
     (isaprop_double_functor_hor_comp_laws (pr1 GC)))%weq
  p =
disp_idtoiso_2_1 disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
  (idpath F) FC GC p

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧,
   Cm₁ -->[ z] Cm₂) (idpath F) FC = GC
isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell
     (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)))
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧,
   Cm₁ -->[ z] Cm₂) (idpath F) FC = GC
pr1
  ((disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp_weq_inv2cell
      FC GC
    ∘ weqonsecfibers
        (λ x : pr1 CD₁, pr1 FC x = pr1 GC x)
        (λ x : pr1 CD₁,
         ∏ (x0 x1 : pr1 CD₁) (x2 : pr2 CD₁ x x0),
         pr1 FC x x0 x1 x2 ~ pr1 GC x x0 x1 x2)
        (λ x : pr1 CD₁,
         weqonsecfibers
           (λ y : pr1 CD₁, pr1 FC x y = pr1 GC x y)
           (λ y : pr1 CD₁,
            ∏ (x0 : pr1 CD₁) (x1 : pr2 CD₁ x y),
            pr1 FC x y x0 x1 ~ pr1 GC x y x0 x1)
           (λ y : pr1 CD₁,
            weqonsecfibers
              (λ z : pr1 CD₁,
               pr1 FC x y z = pr1 GC x y z)
              (λ z : pr1 CD₁,
               ∏ x0 : pr2 CD₁ x y,
               pr1 FC x y z x0 ~ pr1 GC x y z x0)
              (λ z : pr1 CD₁,
               weqonsecfibers
                 (λ h : pr2 CD₁ x y,
                  pr1 FC x y z h = pr1 GC x y z h)
                 (λ h : pr2 CD₁ x y,
                  pr1 FC x y z h ~ pr1 GC x y z h)
                 (λ h : pr2 CD₁ x y,
                  weqtoforallpaths
                    (λ k : ...,
                     ... -->[ ... ][ ...] ...)
                    (pr1 FC x y z h) (pr1 GC x y z h))
               ∘ weqtoforallpaths
                   (λ x0 : pr2 CD₁ x y,
                    ∏ t : pr2 CD₁ y z,
                    double_hor_comp Cm₂ (...) (...) -->[
                    id₁ (...)
                    ][ id₁ (...)] pr2 F x z (...))
                   (pr1 FC x y z) (pr1 GC x y z))
            ∘ weqtoforallpaths
                (λ x0 : pr1 CD₁,
                 ∏ (t : pr2 CD₁ x y)
                 (t0 : pr2 CD₁ y x0),
                 double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y t)
                   (pr2 F y x0 t0) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
                 ][ id₁ (pr1 F x0)] pr2 F x x0
                                      (double_hor_comp
                                         Cm₁ t t0))
                (pr1 FC x y) (pr1 GC x y))
         ∘ weqtoforallpaths
             (λ x0 : pr1 CD₁,
              ∏ (t : pr1 CD₁) (t0 : pr2 CD₁ x x0)
              (t1 : pr2 CD₁ x0 t),
              double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x x0 t0)
                (pr2 F x0 t t1) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
              ][ id₁ (pr1 F t)] pr2 F x t
                                  (double_hor_comp Cm₁
                                     t0 t1))
             (pr1 FC x) (pr1 GC x))
    ∘ weqtoforallpaths
        (λ x : pr1 CD₁,
         ∏ (t t0 : pr1 CD₁) (t1 : pr2 CD₁ x t)
         (t2 : pr2 CD₁ t t0),
         double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x t t1)
           (pr2 F t t0 t2) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
         ][ id₁ (pr1 F t0)] pr2 F x t0
                              (double_hor_comp Cm₁ t1
                                 t2)) (pr1 FC)
        (pr1 GC)
    ∘ path_sigma_hprop double_functor_hor_comp_laws FC
        GC
        (isaprop_double_functor_hor_comp_laws (pr1 GC)))%weq
     p) =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_1
     disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp (idpath F)
     FC GC p)

    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧,
   Cm₁ -->[ z] Cm₂) (idpath F) FC = GC
isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell
     (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)))

      
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧,
   Cm₁ -->[ z] Cm₂) (idpath F) FC = GC
x: FC ==>[ idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)] GC
isaprop
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell
     (idtoiso_2_1 F F (idpath F)) x)

      apply isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell.
    
CD₁, CD₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
Cm₁: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₁
Cm₂: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD₂
FC, GC: Cm₁ -->[ F] Cm₂
p: transportf
  (λ z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧,
   Cm₁ -->[ z] Cm₂) (idpath F) FC = GC
pr1
  ((disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp_weq_inv2cell
      FC GC
    ∘ weqonsecfibers
        (λ x : pr1 CD₁, pr1 FC x = pr1 GC x)
        (λ x : pr1 CD₁,
         ∏ (x0 x1 : pr1 CD₁) (x2 : pr2 CD₁ x x0),
         pr1 FC x x0 x1 x2 ~ pr1 GC x x0 x1 x2)
        (λ x : pr1 CD₁,
         weqonsecfibers
           (λ y : pr1 CD₁, pr1 FC x y = pr1 GC x y)
           (λ y : pr1 CD₁,
            ∏ (x0 : pr1 CD₁) (x1 : pr2 CD₁ x y),
            pr1 FC x y x0 x1 ~ pr1 GC x y x0 x1)
           (λ y : pr1 CD₁,
            weqonsecfibers
              (λ z : pr1 CD₁,
               pr1 FC x y z = pr1 GC x y z)
              (λ z : pr1 CD₁,
               ∏ x0 : pr2 CD₁ x y,
               pr1 FC x y z x0 ~ pr1 GC x y z x0)
              (λ z : pr1 CD₁,
               weqonsecfibers
                 (λ h : pr2 CD₁ x y,
                  pr1 FC x y z h = pr1 GC x y z h)
                 (λ h : pr2 CD₁ x y,
                  pr1 FC x y z h ~ pr1 GC x y z h)
                 (λ h : pr2 CD₁ x y,
                  weqtoforallpaths
                    (λ k : ...,
                     ... -->[ ... ][ ...] ...)
                    (pr1 FC x y z h) (pr1 GC x y z h))
               ∘ weqtoforallpaths
                   (λ x0 : pr2 CD₁ x y,
                    ∏ t : pr2 CD₁ y z,
                    double_hor_comp Cm₂ (...) (...) -->[
                    id₁ (...)
                    ][ id₁ (...)] pr2 F x z (...))
                   (pr1 FC x y z) (pr1 GC x y z))
            ∘ weqtoforallpaths
                (λ x0 : pr1 CD₁,
                 ∏ (t : pr2 CD₁ x y)
                 (t0 : pr2 CD₁ y x0),
                 double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x y t)
                   (pr2 F y x0 t0) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
                 ][ id₁ (pr1 F x0)] pr2 F x x0
                                      (double_hor_comp
                                         Cm₁ t t0))
                (pr1 FC x y) (pr1 GC x y))
         ∘ weqtoforallpaths
             (λ x0 : pr1 CD₁,
              ∏ (t : pr1 CD₁) (t0 : pr2 CD₁ x x0)
              (t1 : pr2 CD₁ x0 t),
              double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x x0 t0)
                (pr2 F x0 t t1) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
              ][ id₁ (pr1 F t)] pr2 F x t
                                  (double_hor_comp Cm₁
                                     t0 t1))
             (pr1 FC x) (pr1 GC x))
    ∘ weqtoforallpaths
        (λ x : pr1 CD₁,
         ∏ (t t0 : pr1 CD₁) (t1 : pr2 CD₁ x t)
         (t2 : pr2 CD₁ t t0),
         double_hor_comp Cm₂ (pr2 F x t t1)
           (pr2 F t t0 t2) -->[ id₁ (pr1 F x)
         ][ id₁ (pr1 F t0)] pr2 F x t0
                              (double_hor_comp Cm₁ t1
                                 t2)) (pr1 FC)
        (pr1 GC)
    ∘ path_sigma_hprop double_functor_hor_comp_laws FC
        GC
        (isaprop_double_functor_hor_comp_laws (pr1 GC)))%weq
     p) =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_1
     disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp (idpath F)
     FC GC p)

    apply isaprop_double_nat_trans_hor_comp.
Qed.

Section AdjEquivHorComp.
  Context {CD : bicat_twosided_disp_cat}
          (FF GG : disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD)
          (τ : FF -->[ identity CD ] GG)
          (Hτ : ∏ (x y z : pr11 CD)
                  (h : pr12 CD x y)
                  (k : pr12 CD y z),
                is_iso_twosided_disp
                  (identity_is_z_iso _)
                  (identity_is_z_iso _)
                  (pr1 τ x y z h k)).

  Definition to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data
    : double_functor_hor_comp_data (twosided_disp_functor_identity _) GG FF
    := λ x y z h k, pr1 (Hτ x y z h k).

  Arguments to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_id_inv_data /.

  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ (x y z : pr11 CD) (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
(k : (pr12 CD) y z),
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) z))
  (pr1 τ x y z h k)
double_functor_hor_comp_laws
  to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data

  
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ (x y z : pr11 CD) (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
(k : (pr12 CD) y z),
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) z))
  (pr1 τ x y z h k)
double_functor_hor_comp_laws
  to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ (x y z : pr11 CD) (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
(k : (pr12 CD) y z),
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) z))
  (pr1 τ x y z h k)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr1 CD
v₁: pr1 CD ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: pr1 CD ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₃: pr1 CD ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: (pr12 CD) x₁ y₁
h₂: (pr12 CD) x₂ y₂
k₁: (pr12 CD) y₁ z₁
k₂: (pr12 CD) y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
double_hor_comp_mor FF s₁ s₂ ;;2 to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data
                                   x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂ =
trb₂ (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data x₁ y₁ z₁
        h₁ k₁ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor GG s₁ s₂)

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ (x y z : pr11 CD) (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
(k : (pr12 CD) y z),
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) z))
  (pr1 τ x y z h k)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr1 CD
v₁: pr1 CD ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: pr1 CD ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₃: pr1 CD ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: (pr12 CD) x₁ y₁
h₂: (pr12 CD) x₂ y₂
k₁: (pr12 CD) y₁ z₁
k₂: (pr12 CD) y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
p:= pr2 τ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ v₁ v₂ v₃ h₁ h₂ k₁ k₂ s₁ s₂: double_hor_comp_mor GG s₁ s₂ ;;2 pr1 τ x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂
                                   k₂ =
trb₂ (pr1 τ x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                 FF s₁ s₂)
double_hor_comp_mor FF s₁ s₂ ;;2 to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data
                                   x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂ =
trb₂ (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data x₁ y₁ z₁
        h₁ k₁ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor GG s₁ s₂)

x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr1 CD
v₁: pr1 CD ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: pr1 CD ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₃: pr1 CD ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: (pr12 CD) x₁ y₁
h₂: (pr12 CD) x₂ y₂
k₁: (pr12 CD) y₁ z₁
k₂: (pr12 CD) y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
p:= pr2 τ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ v₁ v₂ v₃ h₁ h₂ k₁ k₂ s₁ s₂: double_hor_comp_mor GG s₁ s₂ ;;2 pr1 τ x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂
                                   k₂ =
trb₂ (pr1 τ x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                 FF s₁ s₂)
trf₂ (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data x₁ y₁ z₁
        h₁ k₁ ;;2 (double_hor_comp_mor GG s₁ s₂ ;;2 
                   id_two_disp
                     (double_hor_comp GG h₂ k₂))) = 
?b

FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ (x y z : pr11 CD) (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
(k : (pr12 CD) y z),
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) z))
  (pr1 τ x y z h k)

v₂: pr1 CD ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

h₂: (pr12 CD) x₂ y₂
k₁: (pr12 CD) y₁ z₁
k₂: (pr12 CD) y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
p:= pr2 τ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ v₁ v₂ v₃ h₁ h₂ k₁ k₂ s₁ s₂: double_hor_comp_mor GG s₁ s₂ ;;2 pr1 τ x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂
                                   k₂ =
trb₂ (pr1 τ x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                 FF s₁ s₂)
id_two_disp (double_hor_comp GG h₂ k₂) = ?t2

      exact (inv_after_iso_twosided_disp_alt (Hτ _ _ _ _ _)).

h₂: (pr12 CD) x₂ y₂

v₂: pr1 CD ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₃: pr1 CD ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: (pr12 CD) x₁ y₁
h₂: (pr12 CD) x₂ y₂
k₁: (pr12 CD) y₁ z₁
k₂: (pr12 CD) y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
p:= pr2 τ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ v₁ v₂ v₃ h₁ h₂ k₁ k₂ s₁ s₂: double_hor_comp_mor GG s₁ s₂ ;;2 pr1 τ x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂
                                   k₂ =
trb₂ (pr1 τ x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                 FF s₁ s₂)
trf₂ (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data x₁ y₁ z₁
        h₁ k₁ ;;2 (trf₂ (trf₂ (pr1 τ x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁ ;;2 
                               (#2 (pr2 (id₁ CD)))
                                 (double_hor_comp_mor
                                    FF s₁ s₂)) ;;2 
                         iso_inv_twosided_disp
                           (Hτ x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))) =
double_hor_comp_mor FF s₁ s₂ ;;2 to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data
                                   x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂

  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) z))
  (pr1 τ x y z h k)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr1 CD
v₁: pr1 CD ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: pr1 CD ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₃: pr1 CD ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: (pr12 CD) x₁ y₁
h₂: (pr12 CD) x₂ y₂
k₁: (pr12 CD) y₁ z₁
k₂: (pr12 CD) y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
p:= pr2 τ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ v₁ v₂ v₃ h₁ h₂ k₁ k₂ s₁ s₂: double_hor_comp_mor GG s₁ s₂ ;;2 pr1 τ x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂
                                   k₂ =
trb₂ (pr1 τ x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                 FF s₁ s₂)
to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁ ;;2 
pr1 τ x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁ = ?y'

      apply Hτ.

  (pr1 τ x y z h k)

  (identity_hor_comp FF)

FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ (x y z : pr11 CD) (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
(k : (pr12 CD) y z),

  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) z))
  (pr1 τ x y z h k)
x, y, z: pr1 CD
h: (pr12 CD) x y
k: (pr12 CD) y z
id_two_disp (double_hor_comp FF h k) ;;2 id_two_disp
                                           (double_hor_comp
                                              FF h k) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor FF (id_two_disp h)
        (id_two_disp k) ;;2 (trb₂ (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data
                                     x y z h k ;;2 
                                   functor_double_comp_cell
                                     τ h k)))

  (pr1 τ x y z h k)

h: (pr12 CD) x y
k: (pr12 CD) y z
trb₂ id_two_disp (double_hor_comp FF h k) =

        (id_two_disp k) ;;2 (trb₂ (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data
                                     x y z h k ;;2

CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ (x y z : pr11 CD) (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
(k : (pr12 CD) y z),
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) z))
  (pr1 τ x y z h k)
x, y, z: pr1 CD
h: (pr12 CD) x y
k: (pr12 CD) y z
trf₂ id_two_disp (double_hor_comp FF h k) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor FF (id_two_disp h)
        (id_two_disp k) ;;2 (trf₂ (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data
                                     x y z h k ;;2 
                                   functor_double_comp_cell
                                     τ h k)))

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ (x y z : pr11 CD) (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
(k : (pr12 CD) y z),
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) z))
  (pr1 τ x y z h k)
x, y, z: pr1 CD
h: (pr12 CD) x y
k: (pr12 CD) y z
trf₂ id_two_disp (double_hor_comp FF h k) =
trf₂ (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor FF (id_two_disp h)
              (id_two_disp k) ;;2 (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data
                                     x y z h k ;;2 
                                   functor_double_comp_cell
                                     τ h k)))

(k : (pr12 CD) y z),
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) z))
  (pr1 τ x y z h k)
x, y, z: pr1 CD
h: (pr12 CD) x y
k: (pr12 CD) y z
trf₂ id_two_disp (double_hor_comp FF h k) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor FF (id_two_disp h)
        (id_two_disp k) ;;2 (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data
                               x y z h k ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                               τ h k))

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ (x y z : pr11 CD) (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
(k : (pr12 CD) y z),
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) z))
  (pr1 τ x y z h k)
x, y, z: pr1 CD
h: (pr12 CD) x y
k: (pr12 CD) y z
trf₂ id_two_disp (double_hor_comp FF h k) =
trf₂ (id_two_disp (double_hor_comp FF h k) ;;2 (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data
                                                 x y z
                                                 h k ;;2 
                                                functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 τ h k))

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ (x y z : pr11 CD) (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
(k : (pr12 CD) y z),
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) z))
  (pr1 τ x y z h k)
x, y, z: pr1 CD
h: (pr12 CD) x y
k: (pr12 CD) y z
trf₂ id_two_disp (double_hor_comp FF h k) =
trf₂ (trb₂ (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data x
              y z h k ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell τ h
                            k))

CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ (x y z : pr11 CD) (h : (pr12 CD) x y)

is_iso_twosided_disp

  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) z))
  (pr1 τ x y z h k)
x, y, z: pr1 CD
h: (pr12 CD) x y
k: (pr12 CD) y z
trf₂ (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data x y z h
        k ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell τ h k) =
trf₂ id_two_disp (double_hor_comp FF h k)

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ (x y z : pr11 CD) (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
(k : (pr12 CD) y z),
is_iso_twosided_disp

  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) z))
  (pr1 τ x y z h k)
x, y, z: pr1 CD
h: (pr12 CD) x y
k: (pr12 CD) y z
trf₂ (to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data x y z h
        k ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell τ h k) = ?b
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ (x y z : pr11 CD) (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
(k : (pr12 CD) y z),
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) z))
  (pr1 τ x y z h k)
x, y, z: pr1 CD
h: (pr12 CD) x y
k: (pr12 CD) y z
?b = trf₂ id_two_disp (double_hor_comp FF h k)

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG

CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ (x y z : pr11 CD) (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
(k : (pr12 CD) y z),
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) z))
  (pr1 τ x y z h k)
x, y, z: pr1 CD
h: (pr12 CD) x y
k: (pr12 CD) y z
to_disp_left_adjequiv_hor_comp_inv_data x y z h k ;;2 
functor_double_comp_cell τ h k = ?t2

      apply Hτ.
    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ (x y z : pr11 CD) (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
(k : (pr12 CD) y z),
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 (id₁ CD) z))
  (pr1 τ x y z h k)
x, y, z: pr1 CD
h: (pr12 CD) x y
k: (pr12 CD) y z
trf₂ (trb₂ id_two_disp
             (pr2 (id₁ CD) x z
                (double_hor_comp FF h k))) =
trf₂ id_two_disp (double_hor_comp FF h k)

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF, GG: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
τ: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
Hτ: ∏ (x y z : pr11 CD) (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
