                    (v₂ : pr1 CD ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
                    (v₃ : pr1 CD ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
                    (h₁ : (pr12 CD) x₁ y₁)
                    (h₂ : (pr12 CD) y₁ z₁)
                    (k₁ : (pr12 CD) x₂ y₂)
                    (k₂ : (pr12 CD) y₂ z₂),
                    h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
                    → h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
                      → x x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ h₂ -->[ v₁
                        ][ v₃] x x₂ y₂ z₂ k₁ k₂) p0
                   (pr21 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),, pr2 FF)) =
                 pr21 ((GG₁,, GG₂),, K)
                 ≃ double_functor_hor_comp_laws
                     (λ (x y z : pr1 CD)
                      (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
                      (k : (pr12 CD) y z),
                      pr1
                        (paths_rect ((pr12 CD) x z)
                           (double_hor_comp (...) h k)
                           (λ (xy₂ : ...) (_ : ...),
                            iso_twosided_disp ... ...
                              ... xy₂)
                           (id_iso_twosided_disp (...))
                           (double_hor_comp (...) h k)
                           (! toforallpaths (...)
                                (...) (...) (...) k))))
              (λ (GG₂ : ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : pr1 CD)
                        (v₁ : pr1 CD ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
                        (v₂ : pr1 CD ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
                        (v₃ : pr1 CD ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
                        (h₁ : (pr12 CD) x₁ y₁)
                        (h₂ : (pr12 CD) y₁ z₁)
                        (k₁ : (pr12 CD) x₂ y₂)
                        (k₂ : (pr12 CD) y₂ z₂),

                        → h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂

                            v₁
                            ][ v₃] (pr11 FF) x₂ y₂ z₂
                                     k₁ k₂)
               (K : hor_comp_laws (pr11 FF,, GG₂))
               (p0 : @double_hor_comp (pr1 CD)
                       (pr12 CD)
                       (pr1
                          ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),,
                           pr2 FF)) =

                      (x3 : (pr12 CD) x0 x1),

                   (x3 : (pr12 CD) x0 x1),
                   double_hor_comp
                     (pr1 ((pr11 FF,, GG₂),, K)) x2 x3))
                 p0 (idpath (pr11 FF))
                 (λ p1 : @double_hor_comp (pr1 CD)
                           (pr12 CD)
                           (pr1
                              ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),,
                               pr2 FF)) =
                         (λ (x x0 x1 : pr11 CD)

                    (λ x : ∏ t t0 t1 : pr11 CD,

                     (v₂ : pr1 CD ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
                     (v₃ : pr1 CD ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
                     (h₁ : (pr12 CD) x₁ y₁)

                     (k₂ : (pr12 CD) y₂ z₂),

                     → h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
                       → ... -->[ v₁ ][ v₃] ...) p1
                    (pr21 ((pr11 FF,, pr21 FF),,
                           pr2 FF)) =
                  pr21 ((pr11 FF,, GG₂),, K)
                  ≃ double_functor_hor_comp_laws
                      (λ (x y z : pr1 CD)
                       (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
                       (k : (pr12 CD) y z),
                       pr1
                         (paths_rect (... x z)
                            (double_hor_comp ... h k)
                            (λ ... ..., ...)
                            (id_iso_twosided_disp ...)
                            (double_hor_comp ... h k)
                            (! toforallpaths ... ...
                                 ... ... k))))
                 (weqimplimpl
                    (λ (q0 : pr21 FF = GG₂)
                     (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : pr1 CD)
                     (v₁ : pr1 CD ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
                     (v₂ : pr1 CD ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
                     (v₃ : pr1 CD ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
                     (h₁ : (pr12 CD) x₁ y₁)
                     (h₂ : (pr12 CD) x₂ y₂)
                     (k₁ : (pr12 CD) y₁ z₁)
                     (k₂ : (pr12 CD) y₂ z₂)
                     (s₁ : h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂)
                     (s₂ : k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂),
                     internal_paths_rew_r
                       (∏
                        (x₁0 x₂0 y₁0 y₂0 z₁0
                         z₂0 : pr1 CD)
                        (v₁0 : pr1 CD ⟦ x₁0, x₂0 ⟧)
                        (v₂0 : pr1 CD ⟦ y₁0, y₂0 ⟧)
                        (v₃0 : pr1 CD ⟦ z₁0, z₂0 ⟧)
                        (h₁0 : (pr12 CD) x₁0 y₁0)
                        (h₂0 : (pr12 CD) y₁0 z₁0)
                        (k₁0 : (pr12 CD) x₂0 y₂0)
                        (k₂0 : (pr12 CD) y₂0 z₂0),
                        h₁0 -->[ v₁0 ][ v₂0] k₁0
                        → h₂0 -->[ v₂0 ][ v₃0] k₂0
                          → ... x₁0 y₁0 z₁0 h₁0 h₂0 -->[
                            v₁0
                            ][ v₃0] ... x₂0 y₂0 z₂0
                                      k₁0 k₂0)
                       (pr21 FF) GG₂
                       (λ FF₂ : ∏
                                (x₁0 x₂0 y₁0 y₂0 z₁0
                                 z₂0 : pr1 CD)
                                (v₁0 : ... ⟦ x₁0, x₂0
                                       ⟧)
                                (v₂0 : ... ⟦ y₁0, y₂0
                                       ⟧)
                                (v₃0 : ... ⟦ z₁0, z₂0
                                       ⟧)
                                (h₁0 : ... x₁0 y₁0)
                                (h₂0 : ... y₁0 z₁0)
                                (k₁0 : ... x₂0 y₂0)
                                (k₂0 : ... y₂0 z₂0),
                                h₁0 -->[ v₁0
                                ][ v₂0] k₁0
                                → ... → ...,
                        GG₂ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ v₁ v₂ v₃
                          h₁ k₁ h₂ k₂ s₁ s₂ ;;2 id_two_disp
                                                 (...
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂) =
                        trb₂ (id_two_disp (...) ;;2 
                              FF₂ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ v₁
                                v₂ v₃ h₁ k₁ h₂ k₂ s₁
                                s₂))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          ((pr11 FF) x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁ -->[
                           id₁ x₁ · v₁
                           ][ id₁ z₁ · v₃] (pr11 FF)
                                             x₂ y₂ z₂
                                             h₂ k₂)
                          (id_two_disp
                             (... x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
                           GG₂ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ v₁ v₂
                             v₃ h₁ k₁ h₂ k₂ s₁ s₂)
                          (trb₂ GG₂ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂
                                  v₁ v₂ v₃ h₁ k₁ h₂ k₂
                                  s₁ s₂)
                          (λ t : ... -->[ ...
                                 ][ ...] ...,
                           GG₂ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ v₁ v₂
                             v₃ h₁ k₁ h₂ k₂ s₁ s₂ ;;2 
                           id_two_disp ... = trb₂ t)
                          (internal_paths_rew_r
                             (... -->[ ... ][ ...] ...)
                             (GG₂ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ v₁
                                v₂ v₃ h₁ k₁ h₂ k₂ s₁
                                s₂ ;;2 id_two_disp ...)
                             (trb₂ GG₂ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁
                                     z₂ v₁ v₂ v₃ h₁ k₁
                                     h₂ k₂ s₁ s₂)
                             (λ ..., ...)
                             (internal_paths_rew_r ...
                                ... ... ... ... ...)
                             (id_two_disp_right ...))
                          (id_two_disp_left
                             (GG₂ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ v₁
                                v₂ v₃ h₁ k₁ h₂ k₂ s₁
                                s₂))) q0)
                    (λ q0 : double_functor_hor_comp_laws
                              (λ (x y z : pr1 CD)
                               (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
                               (k : (pr12 CD) y z),
                               id_two_disp
                                 (... x y z h k)),
                     funextsec
                       (λ t : pr1 CD,
                        ∏ (x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : pr1 CD)
                        (v₁ : pr1 CD ⟦ t, x₂ ⟧)
                        (v₂ : pr1 CD ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
                        (v₃ : pr1 CD ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
                        (h₁ : (pr12 CD) t y₁)
                        (h₂ : (pr12 CD) y₁ z₁)
                        (k₁ : (pr12 CD) x₂ y₂)
                        (k₂ : (pr12 CD) y₂ z₂),
                        h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
                        → h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
                          → ... -->[ v₁ ][ v₃] ...)
                       (pr21 FF) GG₂
                       (λ x₁ : pr1 CD,
                        funextsec
                          (λ t : ...,
                           ∏ ... ... ... ... ... ...
                           ... ..., ...)
                          ((pr21 FF) x₁) (GG₂ x₁)
                          (λ x₂ : ...,
                           funextsec ... ... ... ...)))
                    (impred_isaset
                       (λ t : pr1 CD,
                        ∏ (x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : pr1 CD)
                        (v₁ : pr1 CD ⟦ t, x₂ ⟧)
                        (v₂ : pr1 CD ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
                        (v₃ : pr1 CD ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
                        (h₁ : (pr12 CD) t y₁)
                        (h₂ : (pr12 CD) y₁ z₁)
                        (k₁ : (pr12 CD) x₂ y₂)
                        (k₂ : (pr12 CD) y₂ z₂),

                        → h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂

                            ][ v₃] ... x₂ y₂ z₂ k₁ k₂)
                       (λ t : pr1 CD,
                        impred_isaset
                          (λ t0 : pr1 CD,
                           ∏ (y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : ...)
                           (v₁ : ...) (v₂ : ...)
                           (v₃ : ...) (h₁ : ...)
                           (h₂ : ...) (k₁ : ...)
                           (k₂ : ...), ... → ...)
                          (λ t0 : pr1 CD,
                           impred_isaset (...) (...)))
                       (pr21 FF) GG₂)
                    (isaprop_double_functor_hor_comp_laws
                       (λ (x y z : pr1 CD)
                        (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
                        (k : (pr12 CD) y z),
                        id_two_disp
                          ((pr11 FF) x y z h k)))) X0)
              (pr11 FF) q (pr21 FF) (pr2 FF) p X)
       ∘ total2_paths_equiv
           (λ Cm : ∏ x y z : pr1 CD,
                   (pr12 CD) x y
                   → (pr12 CD) y z → (pr12 CD) x z,
            ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : pr1 CD)

            (v₂ : pr1 CD ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)

            → h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂

                ][ v₃] Cm x₂ y₂ z₂ k₁ k₂) (pr1 FF)
           (pr1 FF)
       ∘ path_sigma_hprop hor_comp_laws FF FF
           (isaprop_hor_comp_laws (pr1 FF)))%weq
        (idpath FF)) =
pr11 (disp_idtoiso_2_0
        disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp
        (idpath CD) FF FF (idpath FF))

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat
FF: disp_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_hor_comp CD
(λ (x y z : pr1 CD) (h : pr2 CD x y) (k : pr2 CD y z),
 id_two_disp (double_hor_comp (pr1 FF) h k)) =
(λ (x y z : pr1 CD) (h : (pr12 CD) x y)
 (k : (pr12 CD) y z),
 id_two_disp (double_hor_comp FF h k))

    apply idpath.
Qed.

l₃: disp_cat_ob_mor_lunitor CD₃
FFl: l₁ -->[ FF] l₂
GGl: l₂ -->[ GG] l₃
l₁ -->[ FF · GG] l₃

    exact (comp_functor_lunitor FFl GGl).
Qed.

H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
isPredicate double_lunitor_laws

isaprop (double_lunitor_laws x)

      apply isaprop_double_lunitor_laws.

FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_lunitor CD

H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF

f: (pr121 CD) x y
p:= H₁ x y f: double_lunitor GG ((pr21 (id₁ CD)) x y f) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 CD)
        (functor_double_id_cell (pr12 (id₁ CD)) x)
        (id_two_disp ((pr21 (id₁ CD)) x y f)) ;;2 
      functor_double_comp_cell (pr22 (id₁ CD))
        (double_id (pr12 CD) x) f ;;2 (#2 (pr21 (id₁
                                                 CD)))
                                        (double_lunitor
                                           FF f))
pr1 FF x y f = pr1 GG x y f

disp_univalent_2 disp_bicat_lunitor


disp_univalent_2 disp_bicat_lunitor

  
disp_univalent_2_0 disp_bicat_lunitor
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_bicat_lunitor

  
disp_univalent_2_0 disp_bicat_lunitor
 exact disp_univalent_2_0_disp_bicat_lunitor.
  
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_bicat_lunitor
 exact disp_univalent_2_1_disp_bicat_lunitor.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
F: adjoint_equivalence C₁ C₂
l₁: disp_bicat_lunitor C₁
l₂: disp_bicat_lunitor C₂
Fl: l₁ -->[ F] l₂
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence F Fl


C₁, C₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
F: adjoint_equivalence C₁ C₂
l₁: disp_bicat_lunitor C₁
l₂: disp_bicat_lunitor C₂
Fl: l₁ -->[ F] l₂
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence F Fl

  
∏ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
(F : adjoint_equivalence C₁ C₂)
(l₁ : disp_bicat_lunitor C₁)
(l₂ : disp_bicat_lunitor C₂) (Fl : l₁ -->[ F] l₂),
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence F Fl

  
is_univalent_2_0 bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
∏ a : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp,
(λ (a0 b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
 (f : adjoint_equivalence a0 b),
 ∏ (l₁ : disp_bicat_lunitor a0)
 (l₂ : disp_bicat_lunitor b) (Fl : l₁ -->[ f] l₂),
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f Fl) a a
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)

  
is_univalent_2_0 bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
 exact is_univalent_2_0_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp.
  
∏ a : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp,
(λ (a0 b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
 (f : adjoint_equivalence a0 b),
 ∏ (l₁ : disp_bicat_lunitor a0)
 (l₂ : disp_bicat_lunitor b) (Fl : l₁ -->[ f] l₂),
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f Fl) a a
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)
 
C: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
l₁, l₂: disp_bicat_lunitor C
Fl: l₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C] l₂
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C) Fl

    
C: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
l₁, l₂: disp_bicat_lunitor C
Fl: l₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C] l₂
l₂ -->[
left_adjoint_right_adjoint
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C)] l₁

    
C: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
l₁, l₂: disp_bicat_lunitor C
Fl: l₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C] l₂
x, y: pr11 C
f: (pr121 C) x y
double_lunitor l₁ f =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 C)
        (id_two_disp (double_id (pr12 C) x))
        (id_two_disp f) ;;2 id_two_disp
                              (double_hor_comp
                                 (pr22 C)
                                 (double_id (pr12 C) x)
                                 f) ;;2 double_lunitor
                                          l₂ f)

l₁, l₂: disp_bicat_lunitor C
Fl: l₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C] l₂
x, y: pr11 C
f: (pr121 C) x y
p:= Fl x y f: double_lunitor l₂ f =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 C)
        (id_two_disp (double_id (pr12 C) x))
        (id_two_disp f) ;;2 id_two_disp
                              (double_hor_comp
                                 (pr22 C)
                                 (double_id
                                    (pr12 C) x) f) ;;2 
      double_lunitor l₁ f)
double_lunitor l₁ f =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 C)
        (id_two_disp (double_id (pr12 C) x))
        (id_two_disp f) ;;2 id_two_disp
                              (double_hor_comp
                                 (pr22 C)
                                 (double_id (pr12 C) x)
                                 f) ;;2 double_lunitor
                                          l₂ f)

internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C] l₂
x, y: pr11 C

p:= Fl x y f: double_lunitor l₂ f =

                                 (double_id

p: double_lunitor l₂ f =

                                                 x)
                                              f) ;;2 
      double_lunitor l₁ f)
double_lunitor l₁ f =
trf₂ (id_two_disp
        (double_hor_comp (pr22 C)
           (double_id (pr12 C) x) f) ;;2 id_two_disp
                                           (double_hor_comp
                                              (pr22 C)
                                              (double_id
                                                 (pr12 C)
                                                 x) f) ;;2 
      double_lunitor l₂ f)

Fl: l₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C] l₂
x, y: pr11 C
f: (pr121 C) x y
p: double_lunitor l₂ f =
trf₂ (id_two_disp
        (double_hor_comp (pr22 C)
           (double_id (pr12 C) x) f) ;;2 id_two_disp
                                           (double_hor_comp
                                              (pr22 C)
                                              (double_id
                                                 (pr12 C)
                                                 x)
                                              f) ;;2 
      double_lunitor l₁ f)
double_lunitor l₁ f =
trf₂ (trb₂ id_two_disp
             (double_hor_comp (pr22 C)
                (double_id (pr12 C) x) f) ;;2 double_lunitor
                                                l₂ f)

trf₂ double_lunitor l₁ f = double_lunitor l₁ f

    apply transportf_disp_mor2_idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: left_adjoint_equivalence F
l₁: disp_bicat_lunitor C₁
l₂: disp_bicat_lunitor C₂
Fl: l₁ -->[ F] l₂
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence HF Fl


C₁, C₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: left_adjoint_equivalence F
l₁: disp_bicat_lunitor C₁
l₂: disp_bicat_lunitor C₂
Fl: l₁ -->[ F] l₂
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence HF Fl

  exact (is_disp_left_adjoint_equivalence_disp_bicat_lunitor_help (F ,, HF) Fl).
Qed.

(** * 5. Two-sided displayed categories with right unitors *)

disp_cat_ob_mor bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp


disp_cat_ob_mor bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp

  
bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp → UU
(λ obd : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp → UU,
 ∏ x y : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp,
 obd x
 → obd y
   → bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  ?pr1

  
bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp → UU
 exact (λ CD, double_cat_runitor (pr12 CD) (pr22 CD)).
  
(λ obd : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp → UU,
 ∏ x y : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp,
 obd x
 → obd y
   → bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  (λ CD : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp,
   double_cat_runitor (pr12 CD) (pr22 CD))
 exact (λ CD₁ CD₂ l₁ l₂ FF, double_functor_runitor l₁ l₂ (pr12 FF) (pr22 FF)).
Defined.


disp_cat_id_comp bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
  disp_cat_ob_mor_runitor


disp_cat_id_comp bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
  disp_cat_ob_mor_runitor

  
∏ (x : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_runitor x), xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
∏ (x y z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_runitor x)
(yy : disp_cat_ob_mor_runitor y)
(zz : disp_cat_ob_mor_runitor z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz

  
∏ (x : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_runitor x), xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
 
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
l: disp_cat_ob_mor_runitor CD
l -->[ id₁ CD] l

    exact (identity_functor_runitor l).
  
∏ (x y z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_runitor x)
(yy : disp_cat_ob_mor_runitor y)
(zz : disp_cat_ob_mor_runitor z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz
 
CD₁, CD₂, CD₃: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
GG: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ CD₂, CD₃ ⟧
l₁: disp_cat_ob_mor_runitor CD₁
l₂: disp_cat_ob_mor_runitor CD₂
l₃: disp_cat_ob_mor_runitor CD₃
FFl: l₁ -->[ FF] l₂
GGl: l₂ -->[ GG] l₃
l₁ -->[ FF · GG] l₃

    exact (comp_functor_runitor FFl GGl).
Qed.


disp_cat_data bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp


disp_cat_data bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp

disp_cat_id_comp bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
  ?pr1

  
disp_cat_ob_mor bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
 exact disp_cat_ob_mor_runitor.
  
disp_cat_id_comp bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
  disp_cat_ob_mor_runitor
 exact disp_cat_id_comp_runitor.
Defined.

Definition disp_bicat_runitor
  : disp_bicat bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
  := disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_runitor.


disp_univalent_2_1 disp_bicat_runitor


disp_univalent_2_1 disp_bicat_runitor

  
∏ (a b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(aa : disp_cat_data_runitor a)
(bb : disp_cat_data_runitor b),
isaprop (aa -->[ f] bb)

isaprop (aa -->[ f] bb)

  apply isaprop_double_functor_runitor.
Qed.

isaset (disp_cat_data_runitor a)

∏ (a : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
(aa bb : disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_runitor a),

CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_runitor CD
H: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG × GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
FF = GG

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_runitor CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
FF = GG

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_runitor CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
isPredicate double_runitor_laws
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_runitor CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
pr1 FF = pr1 GG

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_runitor CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
isPredicate double_runitor_laws

      
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_runitor CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
x: double_runitor_data (pr12 CD) (pr22 CD)
isaprop (double_runitor_laws x)

      apply isaprop_double_runitor_laws.
    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_runitor CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
pr1 FF = pr1 GG

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_runitor CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
x: pr11 CD
pr1 FF x = pr1 GG x

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_runitor CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
x, y: pr11 CD
pr1 FF x y = pr1 GG x y

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_runitor CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
x, y: pr11 CD
f: (pr121 CD) x y
pr1 FF x y f = pr1 GG x y f

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_runitor CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
x, y: pr11 CD
f: (pr121 CD) x y
p:= H₁ x y f: double_runitor GG ((pr21 (id₁ CD)) x y f) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 CD)
        (id_two_disp ((pr21 (id₁ CD)) x y f))
        (functor_double_id_cell (pr12 (id₁ CD)) y) ;;2 
      functor_double_comp_cell (pr22 (id₁ CD)) f
        (double_id (pr12 CD) y) ;;2 (#2 (pr21 (id₁
                                                 CD)))
                                      (double_runitor
                                         FF f))
pr1 FF x y f = pr1 GG x y f

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_runitor CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
x, y: pr11 CD
f: (pr121 CD) x y
p:= H₁ x y f: double_runitor GG ((pr21 (id₁ CD)) x y f) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 CD)
        (id_two_disp ((pr21 (id₁ CD)) x y f))
        (functor_double_id_cell (pr12 (id₁ CD)) y) ;;2 
      functor_double_comp_cell (pr22 (id₁ CD)) f
        (double_id (pr12 CD) y) ;;2 (#2 (pr21 (id₁
                                                 CD)))
                                      (double_runitor
                                         FF f))
q:= H₂ x y f: double_runitor FF ((pr21 (id₁ CD)) x y f) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 CD)
        (id_two_disp ((pr21 (id₁ CD)) x y f))
        (functor_double_id_cell (pr12 (id₁ CD)) y) ;;2 
      functor_double_comp_cell (pr22 (id₁ CD)) f
        (double_id (pr12 CD) y) ;;2 (#2 (pr21 (id₁
                                                 CD)))
                                      (double_runitor
                                         GG f))
pr1 FF x y f = pr1 GG x y f

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_runitor CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
x, y: pr11 CD
f: (pr121 CD) x y
p:= H₁ x y f: double_runitor GG f =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 CD)
        (id_two_disp f)
        (id_two_disp (double_id (pr12 CD) y)) ;;2 
      id_two_disp
        (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) f
           (double_id (pr12 CD) y)) ;;2 double_runitor
                                          FF f)
q:= H₂ x y f: double_runitor FF f =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 CD)
        (id_two_disp f)
        (id_two_disp (double_id (pr12 CD) y)) ;;2 
      id_two_disp
        (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) f
           (double_id (pr12 CD) y)) ;;2 double_runitor
                                          GG f)
pr1 FF x y f = pr1 GG x y f

FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_runitor CD

  (double_id (pr12 CD) y) -->[ identity_z_iso x
][ identity_z_iso y] f
isaprop
  (is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
     (pr2 (identity_z_iso y)) x0)

      apply isaprop_is_iso_twosided_disp.

    apply transportf_disp_mor2_idpath.

disp_univalent_2_1 disp_bicat_runitor

Qed.


C₁, C₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
F: adjoint_equivalence C₁ C₂
r₁: disp_bicat_runitor C₁
r₂: disp_bicat_runitor C₂
Fr: r₁ -->[ F] r₂
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence F Fr

F: adjoint_equivalence C₁ C₂
r₁: disp_bicat_runitor C₁
r₂: disp_bicat_runitor C₂

disp_left_adjoint_equivalence F Fr

  
∏ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
(F : adjoint_equivalence C₁ C₂)
(r₁ : disp_bicat_runitor C₁)
(r₂ : disp_bicat_runitor C₂) (Fr : r₁ -->[ F] r₂),
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence F Fr

  
is_univalent_2_0 bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
∏ a : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp,
(λ (a0 b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
 (f : adjoint_equivalence a0 b),
 ∏ (r₁ : disp_bicat_runitor a0)
 (r₂ : disp_bicat_runitor b) (Fr : r₁ -->[ f] r₂),
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f Fr) a a
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)

  
is_univalent_2_0 bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
 exact is_univalent_2_0_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp.
  
∏ a : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp,
(λ (a0 b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
 (f : adjoint_equivalence a0 b),
 ∏ (r₁ : disp_bicat_runitor a0)
 (r₂ : disp_bicat_runitor b) (Fr : r₁ -->[ f] r₂),
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f Fr) a a
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)

Fr: r₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C] r₂

  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C) Fr

r₁, r₂: disp_bicat_runitor C
Fr: r₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C] r₂
r₂ -->[

  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C)] r₁

r₁, r₂: disp_bicat_runitor C
Fr: r₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C] r₂
x, y: pr11 C
f: (pr121 C) x y
double_runitor r₁ f =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 C) (id_two_disp f)
        (id_two_disp (double_id (pr12 C) y)) ;;2 id_two_disp
                                                 (double_hor_comp
                                                 (pr22 C)
                                                 f
                                                 (double_id
                                                 (pr12 C)
                                                 y)) ;;2 
      double_runitor r₂ f)

           (double_id (pr12 C) y)) ;;2 double_runitor
                                         r₂ f)

    
C: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
r₁, r₂: disp_bicat_runitor C
Fr: r₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C] r₂
x, y: pr11 C
f: (pr121 C) x y
p: double_runitor r₂ f =
trf₂ (trf₂ (id_two_disp
              (double_hor_comp (pr22 C) f
                 (double_id (pr12 C) y)) ;;2 double_runitor
                                               r₁
                                               f))

        (double_hor_comp (pr22 C) f
           (double_id (pr12 C) y)) ;;2 double_runitor
                                         r₂ f)

                                         r₂ f)

    apply transportf_disp_mor2_idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: left_adjoint_equivalence F
r₁: disp_bicat_runitor C₁
r₂: disp_bicat_runitor C₂
Fr: r₁ -->[ F] r₂
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence HF Fr


C₁, C₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: left_adjoint_equivalence F
r₁: disp_bicat_runitor C₁
r₂: disp_bicat_runitor C₂
Fr: r₁ -->[ F] r₂
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence HF Fr

  exact (is_disp_left_adjoint_equivalence_disp_bicat_runitor_help (F ,, HF) Fr).
Qed.

(** * 6. Two-sided displayed categories with associators *)

disp_cat_ob_mor bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp


disp_cat_ob_mor bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp

  
bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp → UU
(λ obd : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp → UU,
 ∏ x y : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp,
 obd x
 → obd y
   → bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  ?pr1

  
bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp → UU
 exact (λ CD, double_cat_associator (pr22 CD)).
  
(λ obd : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp → UU,
 ∏ x y : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp,
 obd x
 → obd y
   → bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  (λ CD : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp,
   double_cat_associator (pr22 CD))
 exact (λ CD₁ CD₂ a₁ a₂ FF, double_functor_associator a₁ a₂ (pr22 FF)).
Defined.


disp_cat_id_comp bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
  disp_cat_ob_mor_lassociator


disp_cat_id_comp bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
  disp_cat_ob_mor_lassociator

  
∏ (x : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_lassociator x),
xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
∏ (x y z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_lassociator x)
(yy : disp_cat_ob_mor_lassociator y)
(zz : disp_cat_ob_mor_lassociator z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz

  
∏ (x : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_lassociator x),
xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
 
x: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
xx: disp_cat_ob_mor_lassociator x
xx -->[ id₁ x] xx

    apply identity_functor_associator.
  
∏ (x y z : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
(f : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_lassociator x)
(yy : disp_cat_ob_mor_lassociator y)
(zz : disp_cat_ob_mor_lassociator z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz
 
CD₁, CD₂, CD₃: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ CD₁, CD₂ ⟧
GG: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ CD₂, CD₃ ⟧
a₁: disp_cat_ob_mor_lassociator CD₁
a₂: disp_cat_ob_mor_lassociator CD₂
a₃: disp_cat_ob_mor_lassociator CD₃
FFa: a₁ -->[ FF] a₂
GGa: a₂ -->[ GG] a₃
a₁ -->[ FF · GG] a₃

    exact (comp_functor_associator FFa GGa).
Qed.


disp_cat_data bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp

 exact disp_cat_ob_mor_lassociator.
  
disp_cat_id_comp bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp

 exact disp_cat_id_comp_lassociator.
Defined.

Definition disp_bicat_lassociator
  : disp_bicat bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
  := disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_lassociator.


disp_univalent_2_1 disp_bicat_lassociator


disp_univalent_2_1 disp_bicat_lassociator

(aa : disp_cat_data_lassociator a)
(bb : disp_cat_data_lassociator b),
isaprop (aa -->[ f] bb)

  
a, b: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
f: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: disp_cat_data_lassociator a
bb: disp_cat_data_lassociator b
isaprop (aa -->[ f] bb)

  apply isaprop_double_functor_associator.
Qed.

CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_lassociator CD
H: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG × GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
FF = GG

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_lassociator CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
FF = GG

H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
isPredicate double_associator_laws

FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_lassociator CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
pr1 FF = pr1 GG

FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_lassociator CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
isPredicate double_associator_laws

H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
x: double_associator_data (pr22 CD)
isaprop (double_associator_laws x)

      apply isaprop_double_associator_laws.

H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
w: pr11 CD
pr1 FF w = pr1 GG w

w, x: pr11 CD

H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
w, x, y, z: pr11 CD
f: (pr121 CD) w x
pr1 FF w x y z f = pr1 GG w x y z f

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_lassociator CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
w, x, y, z: pr11 CD
f: (pr121 CD) w x
g: (pr121 CD) x y
pr1 FF w x y z f g = pr1 GG w x y z f g

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_lassociator CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
w, x, y, z: pr11 CD
f: (pr121 CD) w x
g: (pr121 CD) x y
h: (pr121 CD) y z
pr1 FF w x y z f g h = pr1 GG w x y z f g h

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_lassociator CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
w, x, y, z: pr11 CD
f: (pr121 CD) w x
g: (pr121 CD) x y
h: (pr121 CD) y z
p:= H₁ w x y z f g h: double_associator GG ((pr21 (id₁ CD)) w x f)
  ((pr21 (id₁ CD)) x y g) ((pr21 (id₁ CD)) y z h) ;;2 
double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 CD)
  (functor_double_comp_cell (pr22 (id₁ CD)) f g)
  (id_two_disp ((pr21 (id₁ CD)) y z h)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                              (pr22 
                                               (id₁
                                                 CD))
                                              (double_hor_comp
                                                 (pr22 CD)
                                                 f
                                                 g)
                                              h =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 CD)
        (id_two_disp ((pr21 (id₁ CD)) w x f))
        (functor_double_comp_cell (pr22 (id₁ CD))
           g h) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                      (pr22 (id₁ CD)) f
                      (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) g
                         h) ;;2 (#2 (pr21 (id₁ CD)))
                                  (double_associator
                                     FF f g h))
pr1 FF w x y z f g h = pr1 GG w x y z f g h

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_lassociator CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
w, x, y, z: pr11 CD
f: (pr121 CD) w x
g: (pr121 CD) x y
h: (pr121 CD) y z
p:= H₁ w x y z f g h: double_associator GG f g h ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                 (pr22 CD)
                                 (id_two_disp
                                    (double_hor_comp
                                       (pr22 CD) f
                                       g))
                                 (id_two_disp h) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD)
     (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) f g) h) =
double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 CD) (id_two_disp f)
  (id_two_disp (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) g h)) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) f
     (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) g h)) ;;2 double_associator
                                            FF f g
                                            h
pr1 FF w x y z f g h = pr1 GG w x y z f g h

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_lassociator CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
w, x, y, z: pr11 CD
f: (pr121 CD) w x
g: (pr121 CD) x y
h: (pr121 CD) y z
p: trb₂ (double_associator GG f g h ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                       (pr22 CD)
                                       (id_two_disp
                                          (double_hor_comp
                                             (pr22 CD)
                                             f g))
                                       (id_two_disp
                                          h)) =
double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 CD) (id_two_disp f)
  (id_two_disp (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) g h)) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) f
     (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) g h)) ;;2 double_associator
                                            FF f g
                                            h
pr1 FF w x y z f g h = pr1 GG w x y z f g h

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_lassociator CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
w, x, y, z: pr11 CD
f: (pr121 CD) w x
g: (pr121 CD) x y
h: (pr121 CD) y z
p: trb₂ (double_associator GG f g h ;;2 id_two_disp
                                       (double_hor_comp
                                          (pr22 CD)
                                          (double_hor_comp
                                             (pr22 CD)
                                             f g)
                                          h)) =
double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 CD) (id_two_disp f)
  (id_two_disp (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) g h)) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) f
     (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) g h)) ;;2 double_associator
                                            FF f g
                                            h
pr1 FF w x y z f g h = pr1 GG w x y z f g h

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_lassociator CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
w, x, y, z: pr11 CD
f: (pr121 CD) w x
g: (pr121 CD) x y
h: (pr121 CD) y z
p: trb₂ (trb₂ double_associator GG f g h) =
double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 CD) (id_two_disp f)
  (id_two_disp (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) g h)) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) f
     (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) g h)) ;;2 double_associator
                                            FF f g
                                            h
pr1 FF w x y z f g h = pr1 GG w x y z f g h

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_lassociator CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
w, x, y, z: pr11 CD
f: (pr121 CD) w x
g: (pr121 CD) x y
h: (pr121 CD) y z
p: trb₂ double_associator GG f g h =
double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 CD) (id_two_disp f)
  (id_two_disp (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) g h)) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) f
     (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) g h)) ;;2 double_associator
                                            FF f g
                                            h
pr1 FF w x y z f g h = pr1 GG w x y z f g h

    
CD: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
FF, GG: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_cat_data_lassociator CD
H₁: FF -->[ id₁ CD] GG
H₂: GG -->[ id₁ CD] FF
w, x, y, z: pr11 CD
f: (pr121 CD) w x
g: (pr121 CD) x y
h: (pr121 CD) y z
p: trb₂ double_associator GG f g h =
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) f
     (double_hor_comp (pr22 CD) g h)) ;;2 id_two_disp
                                            (double_hor_comp
                                               (pr22 CD)
                                               f
                                               (double_hor_comp
                                                 (pr22 CD)
                                                 g
                                                 h)) ;;2 
double_associator FF f g h
pr1 FF w x y z f g h = pr1 GG w x y z f g h

    apply transportf_disp_mor2_idpath.
Qed.


disp_univalent_2 disp_bicat_lassociator


disp_univalent_2 disp_bicat_lassociator

  
disp_univalent_2_0 disp_bicat_lassociator
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_bicat_lassociator

  
disp_univalent_2_0 disp_bicat_lassociator
 exact disp_univalent_2_0_disp_bicat_lassociator.
  
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_bicat_lassociator
 exact disp_univalent_2_1_disp_bicat_lassociator.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
F: adjoint_equivalence C₁ C₂
a₁: disp_bicat_lassociator C₁
a₂: disp_bicat_lassociator C₂
Fa: a₁ -->[ F] a₂
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence F Fa


C₁, C₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
F: adjoint_equivalence C₁ C₂
a₁: disp_bicat_lassociator C₁
a₂: disp_bicat_lassociator C₂
Fa: a₁ -->[ F] a₂
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence F Fa

  
∏ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
(F : adjoint_equivalence C₁ C₂)
(a₁ : disp_bicat_lassociator C₁)
(a₂ : disp_bicat_lassociator C₂) (Fa : a₁ -->[ F] a₂),
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence F Fa

  
is_univalent_2_0 bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
∏ a : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp,
(λ (a0 b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
 (f : adjoint_equivalence a0 b),
 ∏ (a₁ : disp_bicat_lassociator a0)
 (a₂ : disp_bicat_lassociator b) (Fa : a₁ -->[ f] a₂),
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f Fa) a a
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)

  
is_univalent_2_0 bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
 exact is_univalent_2_0_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp.
  
∏ a : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp,
(λ (a0 b : bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp)
 (f : adjoint_equivalence a0 b),
 ∏ (a₁ : disp_bicat_lassociator a0)
 (a₂ : disp_bicat_lassociator b) (Fa : a₁ -->[ f] a₂),
 disp_left_adjoint_equivalence f Fa) a a
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)

a₁, a₂: disp_bicat_lassociator C
Fa: a₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C] a₂
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C) Fa

a₂ -->[
left_adjoint_right_adjoint
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C)] a₁

    
C: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
a₁, a₂: disp_bicat_lassociator C
Fa: a₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C] a₂
w, x, y, z: pr11 C
f: (pr121 C) w x
g: (pr121 C) x y
h: (pr121 C) y z
double_associator a₁ f g h ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                 (pr22 C)
                                 (id_two_disp
                                    (double_hor_comp
                                       (pr22 C) f g))
                                 (id_two_disp h) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp (pr22 C)
     (double_hor_comp (pr22 C) f g) h) =
double_hor_comp_mor (pr22 C) (id_two_disp f)
  (id_two_disp (double_hor_comp (pr22 C) g h)) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp (pr22 C) f
     (double_hor_comp (pr22 C) g h)) ;;2 double_associator
                                           a₂ f g h

                                                 g
                                                 h)) ;;2 
double_associator a₁ f g h
trf₂ double_associator a₁ f g h =
trf₂ id_two_disp
       (double_hor_comp (pr22 C) f
          (double_hor_comp (pr22 C) g h)) ;;2 double_associator
                                                a₂ f g
                                                h

    
C: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
a₁, a₂: disp_bicat_lassociator C
Fa: a₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C] a₂
w, x, y, z: pr11 C
f: (pr121 C) w x
g: (pr121 C) x y
h: (pr121 C) y z
p: trb₂ (double_associator a₂ f g h ;;2 id_two_disp
                                       (double_hor_comp
                                          (pr22 C)
                                          (double_hor_comp
                                             (pr22 C)
                                             f g)
                                          h)) =
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp (pr22 C) f
     (double_hor_comp (pr22 C) g h)) ;;2 id_two_disp
                                           (double_hor_comp
                                              (pr22 C)
                                              f
                                              (double_hor_comp
                                                 (pr22 C)
                                                 g
                                                 h)) ;;2 
double_associator a₁ f g h
trf₂ double_associator a₁ f g h =
trf₂ id_two_disp
       (double_hor_comp (pr22 C) f
          (double_hor_comp (pr22 C) g h)) ;;2 double_associator
                                                a₂ f g
                                                h

a₁, a₂: disp_bicat_lassociator C
Fa: a₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C] a₂
w, x, y, z: pr11 C
f: (pr121 C) w x
g: (pr121 C) x y
h: (pr121 C) y z
p: trf₂ double_associator a₂ f g h =
trf₂ double_associator a₁ f g h
double_associator a₁ f g h =
double_associator a₁ f g h

      apply idpath.
    
C: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
a₁, a₂: disp_bicat_lassociator C
Fa: a₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C] a₂
w, x, y, z: pr11 C
f: (pr121 C) w x
g: (pr121 C) x y
h: (pr121 C) y z
p: trf₂ double_associator a₂ f g h =

C: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
a₁, a₂: disp_bicat_lassociator C
Fa: a₁ -->[
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C] a₂
w, x, y, z: pr11 C
f: (pr121 C) w x
g: (pr121 C) x y
h: (pr121 C) y z
p: trf₂ double_associator a₂ f g h =
trf₂ double_associator a₁ f g h
double_associator a₂ f g h =
double_associator a₂ f g h

      apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: left_adjoint_equivalence F
a₁: disp_bicat_lassociator C₁
a₂: disp_bicat_lassociator C₂
Fa: a₁ -->[ F] a₂
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence HF Fa


C₁, C₂: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
F: bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HF: left_adjoint_equivalence F
a₁: disp_bicat_lassociator C₁
a₂: disp_bicat_lassociator C₂
Fa: a₁ -->[ F] a₂
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence HF Fa

  exact (is_disp_left_adjoint_equivalence_disp_bicat_lassociator_help (F ,, HF) Fa).
Qed.

(** * 7. Two-sided displayed categories with unitors and associators *)
Definition disp_bicat_unitors_and_associator
  : disp_bicat bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
  := disp_dirprod_bicat
       disp_bicat_lunitor
       (disp_dirprod_bicat
          disp_bicat_runitor
          disp_bicat_lassociator).


disp_univalent_2 disp_bicat_unitors_and_associator


disp_univalent_2 disp_bicat_unitors_and_associator

  
is_univalent_2_1 bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
disp_univalent_2 disp_bicat_lunitor
disp_univalent_2
  (disp_dirprod_bicat disp_bicat_runitor
     disp_bicat_lassociator)

  
is_univalent_2_1 bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
 exact is_univalent_2_1_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp.
  
disp_univalent_2 disp_bicat_lunitor
 exact disp_univalent_2_disp_bicat_lunitor.
  
disp_univalent_2
  (disp_dirprod_bicat disp_bicat_runitor
     disp_bicat_lassociator)
 
is_univalent_2_1 bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
disp_univalent_2 disp_bicat_runitor
disp_univalent_2 disp_bicat_lassociator

    
is_univalent_2_1 bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
 exact is_univalent_2_1_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp.
    
disp_univalent_2 disp_bicat_runitor
 exact disp_univalent_2_disp_bicat_runitor.
    
disp_univalent_2 disp_bicat_lassociator
 exact disp_univalent_2_disp_bicat_lassociator.
Qed.

Definition bicat_unitors_and_associator
  : bicat
  := total_bicat disp_bicat_unitors_and_associator.


is_univalent_2 bicat_unitors_and_associator


is_univalent_2 bicat_unitors_and_associator

  
disp_univalent_2 disp_bicat_unitors_and_associator
is_univalent_2 bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp

  
disp_univalent_2 disp_bicat_unitors_and_associator
 exact disp_univalent_2_disp_bicat_unitors_and_associator.
  
is_univalent_2 bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp
 exact is_univalent_2_bicat_twosided_disp_cat_id_hor_comp.
Qed.


is_univalent_2_1 bicat_unitors_and_associator


is_univalent_2_1 bicat_unitors_and_associator

  exact (pr2 is_univalent_2_bicat_unitors_and_associator).
Qed.


is_univalent_2_0 bicat_unitors_and_associator


is_univalent_2_0 bicat_unitors_and_associator

  exact (pr1 is_univalent_2_bicat_unitors_and_associator).
Qed.

(** * 8. Displayed bicategory of double categories *)
Definition bicat_of_double_cats
  : bicat
  := fullsubbicat bicat_unitors_and_associator
       (λ CD,
        let l := pr12 CD in
        let r := pr122 CD in
        let a := pr222 CD in
        triangle_law l r a × pentagon_law a).


is_univalent_2 bicat_of_double_cats


is_univalent_2 bicat_of_double_cats

  
is_univalent_2 bicat_unitors_and_associator
∏ x : bicat_unitors_and_associator,
isaprop
  ((λ CD : bicat_unitors_and_associator,
    let l := pr12 CD in
    let r := pr122 CD in
    let a := pr222 CD in
    triangle_law l r a × pentagon_law a) x)

  
is_univalent_2 bicat_unitors_and_associator
 exact is_univalent_2_bicat_unitors_and_associator.
  
∏ x : bicat_unitors_and_associator,
isaprop
  ((λ CD : bicat_unitors_and_associator,
    let l := pr12 CD in
    let r := pr122 CD in
    let a := pr222 CD in
    triangle_law l r a × pentagon_law a) x)
 
L: bicat_unitors_and_associator
isaprop
  ((λ CD : bicat_unitors_and_associator,
    let l := pr12 CD in
    let r := pr122 CD in
    let a := pr222 CD in
    triangle_law l r a × pentagon_law a) L)

    
L: bicat_unitors_and_associator
isaprop (triangle_law (pr12 L) (pr122 L) (pr222 L))
L: bicat_unitors_and_associator
isaprop (pentagon_law (pr222 L))

    
L: bicat_unitors_and_associator
isaprop (triangle_law (pr12 L) (pr122 L) (pr222 L))
 apply isaprop_triangle_law.
    
L: bicat_unitors_and_associator
isaprop (pentagon_law (pr222 L))
 apply isaprop_pentagon_law.
Qed.
